135b70e4-b3b9-5992-b295-fb12e2e0381e.name: Armored Berserker
135b70e4-b3b9-5992-b295-fb12e2e0381e.description: The pain caused by the iron plates bolted to its body keep it on the edge of madness. Whenever it starts its turn with 60 hp or fewer roll a d6. On a 6 it goes berserk. While berserk has resistance to B/P/S damage. On each of its turns while berserk it attacks nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack attacks an object with preference for object smaller than itself. Once it goes berserk continues to do so until destroyed or regains all its hp.

attributes.description: The pain caused by the iron plates bolted to its body keep it on the edge of madness. Whenever it starts its turn with 60 hp or fewer roll a d6. On a 6 it goes berserk. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack attacks an object with preference for object smaller than itself. Once it goes berserk continues to do so until destroyed or regains all its hp.

ec60b7c3-a36a-5eb4-abb6-e9780c5dd444.name: Dual Shields
ec60b7c3-a36a-5eb4-abb6-e9780c5dd444.description: Carries two shields which together give it a +3 bonus to its AC (included in its AC).

attributes.description: Carries two shields which together give it a +3 bonus to its AC (included in its AC).

6bd7f712-6f9c-5041-9f0c-f3b4c4cc1197.name: Poor Depth Perception
6bd7f712-6f9c-5041-9f0c-f3b4c4cc1197.description: Has disadvantage on attack rolls vs. a target more than 30' away from it.

attributes.description: Has disadvantage on attack rolls vs. a target more than 30' away from it.

e769b449-437d-593b-bfc9-c29f1459ed08.name: Iron Axe
e769b449-437d-593b-bfc9-c29f1459ed08.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, 10 ft., one target, 18 (3d8+5) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, 10 ft., one target, 18 (3d8+5) slashing damage.

d2d75227-883d-5ac9-94d9-0bbf8a9fc5d3.name: Multiattack
d2d75227-883d-5ac9-94d9-0bbf8a9fc5d3.description: Three melee attacks only one of which can be a Shield Shove. If it uses two hands to make a Spear attack it can't make an Iron Axe attack that turn.

attributes.description: Three melee attacks only one of which can be a Shield Shove. If it uses two hands to make a Spear attack it can't make an Iron Axe attack that turn.

3f0f8d1c-67c2-50ce-8958-bc7a41a66813.name: Construct Nature
3f0f8d1c-67c2-50ce-8958-bc7a41a66813.description: Doesn’t require air food drink or sleep.

attributes.description: Doesn’t require air food drink or sleep.

e6d4fa07-26b5-5bcb-b16b-a5842965722d.name: Critical Malfunction
e6d4fa07-26b5-5bcb-b16b-a5842965722d.description: Critical hit vs. mechanon: 20% chance of striking its soul chamber casing stunning it until end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Critical hit vs. mechanon: 20% chance of striking its soul chamber casing stunning it until end of its next turn.

d3cd10d7-8ac5-572d-b624-b1c4c54fd536.name: Soul Reactivation
d3cd10d7-8ac5-572d-b624-b1c4c54fd536.description: Reduced to 0 hp stops functioning becoming inert. For the next hr if a Small or larger creature that isn’t a Construct or Undead dies within 30' of a deactivated mechanon a portion of creature’s soul is absorbed by mechanon and construct reactivates regaining all its hp + additional hp equal to the dead creature’s CR. If it remains inert for 1 hr it is destroyed and can’t be reactivated.

attributes.description: Reduced to 0 hp stops functioning becoming inert. For the next hr if a Small or larger creature that isn’t a Construct or Undead dies within 30' of a deactivated mechanon a portion of creature’s soul is absorbed by mechanon and construct reactivates regaining all its hp + additional hp equal to the dead creature’s CR. If it remains inert for 1 hr it is destroyed and can’t be reactivated.

5ec6026d-9856-5fe3-ad30-bdf41e08553b.name: Spider Climb
5ec6026d-9856-5fe3-ad30-bdf41e08553b.description: Difficult surfaces even ceilings no ability check.

attributes.description: Difficult surfaces even ceilings no ability check.

7c885cce-a379-5133-8289-f4bc0bf0c4dc.name: Web Sense
7c885cce-a379-5133-8289-f4bc0bf0c4dc.description: While in contact with web it knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

attributes.description: While in contact with web it knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

8ccb53c3-5bf5-5725-bc85-d8366e338a55.name: Web Walker
8ccb53c3-5bf5-5725-bc85-d8366e338a55.description: Ignores move restrictions caused by webbing.

attributes.description: Ignores move restrictions caused by webbing.
Can breathe air and water.
Choose to succeed failed save.
Advantage: spell/magic effect saves.
Weapon attacks are magical.

287f6b76-3f09-5a7e-86d3-a4c96988d68a.name: Offering of Flesh
287f6b76-3f09-5a7e-86d3-a4c96988d68a.description: Can spend 1 min carefully detaching part or all of one of its 100-foot-long tentacles dealing no damage to itself. Tentacle contains a magic-imbued fleshy hook and enough meat for 25 rations (if part of a tentacle) or 50 rations (if a full tentacle) if properly preserved. Fleshy hook remains imbued with magic for 4 hrs or until a creature eats it. A creature that eats magic-infused fleshy hook regains 50 hp then it is cured of blindness deafness and all diseases or restores all lost limbs (creature’s choice). Limb restoration effect works like regenerate spell. Hook’s magic works only if the akkorokamui offered it willingly.

attributes.description: Can spend 1 min carefully detaching part or all of one of its 100-foot-long tentacles dealing no damage to itself. Tentacle contains a magic-imbued fleshy hook and enough meat for 25 rations (if part of a tentacle) or 50 rations (if a full tentacle) if properly preserved. Fleshy hook remains imbued with magic for 4 hrs or until a creature eats it. A creature that eats magic-infused fleshy hook regains 50 hp then it is cured of blindness deafness and all diseases or restores all lost limbs (creature’s choice). Limb restoration effect works like regenerate spell. Hook’s magic works only if the akkorokamui offered it willingly.

4b59a847-2802-59ab-ba28-0d0fb77ecb39.name: Regeneration
4b59a847-2802-59ab-ba28-0d0fb77ecb39.description: Regains 15 hp at start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

attributes.description: Regains 15 hp at start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.
Double damage to objects/structures.
Uses Spellcasting.

a34a33d4-b04d-5cb4-8737-834084fffee1.name: Discern
a34a33d4-b04d-5cb4-8737-834084fffee1.description: Makes a Wis (Perception) or Wis (Insight) check.

attributes.description: Makes a Wis (Perception) or Wis (Insight) check.

9212ece0-7ac2-5cb0-898f-98b1ec2301e2.name: Guardian's Grasp
9212ece0-7ac2-5cb0-898f-98b1ec2301e2.description: When a creature akkorokamui can see within 30' is attack target akkorokamui can pull creature out of harm's way. If creature is willing it is pulled up to 10 ft. closer to akkorokamui and akkorokamui becomes new attack target. If creature isn't willing this reaction fails.

attributes.description: When a creature akkorokamui can see within 30' is attack target akkorokamui can pull creature out of harm's way. If creature is willing it is pulled up to 10 ft. closer to akkorokamui and akkorokamui becomes new attack target. If creature isn't willing this reaction fails.

8ba365e0-8043-5f79-874a-3e383dc24f48.name: Jet
8ba365e0-8043-5f79-874a-3e383dc24f48.description: Swims up to half its swimming speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: Swims up to half its swimming speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

c8bfa67d-69e4-5680-9d5b-6a6169e37d4c.name: Tentacle Sweep
c8bfa67d-69e4-5680-9d5b-6a6169e37d4c.description: Spins in place with its tentacles extended. Each creature within 20' of it that isn't grappled by it: DC 17 Dex save or take 19 (4d6+5) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. Each creature grappled by akkorokamui must make DC 17 Str save or take 12 (2d6+5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Spins in place with its tentacles extended. Each creature within 20' of it that isn't grappled by it: DC 17 Dex save or take 19 (4d6+5) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. Each creature grappled by akkorokamui must make DC 17 Str save or take 12 (2d6+5) bludgeoning damage.

8bc9c344-c26d-5d5e-8b8b-a22c71da77cd.name: Bloodthirsty
8bc9c344-c26d-5d5e-8b8b-a22c71da77cd.description: An alabroza must drink at least 1 pint of fresh blood or milk every 24 hrs or it suffers one level of exhaustion. Each pint of blood or milk the alabroza drinks removes one level of exhaustion.

attributes.description: An alabroza must drink at least 1 pint of fresh blood or milk every 24 hrs or it suffers one level of exhaustion. Each pint of blood or milk the alabroza drinks removes one level of exhaustion.

c21b051d-c604-5d42-9dbb-653441ae5578.name: Bloodthirsty (Alabroza, Bloodfiend)
c21b051d-c604-5d42-9dbb-653441ae5578.description: Must drink 1+ pint of fresh blood or milk every 24 hrs or suffers one level of exhaustion. Each pint it drinks removes one level.

attributes.description: Must drink 1+ pint of fresh blood or milk every 24 hrs or suffers one level of exhaustion. Each pint it drinks removes one level.

da6a80eb-9256-54ef-8718-09132a23da5a.name: Change Shape
da6a80eb-9256-54ef-8718-09132a23da5a.description: Transforms into Med humanoid Small mist cloud or back into true bird-like fiend form. Other than size and speed stats are same in each form with mist form exceptions. Items worn/carried not transformed. Reverts on death. Mist form: can't take any actions speak or manipulate objects resistance to nonmagical damage. Weightless fly speed 20' can hover can enter hostile creature's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space mist can with o squeezing but can't pass through water.

attributes.description: Transforms into Med humanoid Small mist cloud or back into true bird-like fiend form. Other than size and speed stats are same in each form with mist form exceptions. Items worn/carried not transformed. Reverts on death. Mist form: can't take any actions speak or manipulate objects resistance to nonmagical damage. Weightless fly speed 20' can hover can enter hostile creature's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space mist can with o squeezing but can't pass through water.

9dc840b6-794d-5e10-ba16-17e4f006944b.name: Conditional Invisibility
9dc840b6-794d-5e10-ba16-17e4f006944b.description: Is invisible in most situations. The following situations reveal its location and enough of its form that attacks vs. it don’t have disadvantage while the situation lasts:In temperatures lower than 50 degrees Fahrenheit or for 1 round after it takes cold: its natural heat outlines it in steam.Darkness: its burning eyes shine visibly marking its location.

attributes.description: Is invisible in most situations. The following situations reveal its location and enough of its form that attacks vs. it don’t have disadvantage while the situation lasts:In temperatures lower than 50 degrees Fahrenheit or for 1 round after it takes cold: its natural heat outlines it in steam.Darkness: its burning eyes shine visibly marking its location.

938cdc4f-4af9-5588-8fa7-29a5e8d9e5f9.name: Fire Form
938cdc4f-4af9-5588-8fa7-29a5e8d9e5f9.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide with o squeezing. A creature that touches it or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 4 (1d8) fire.

attributes.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide with o squeezing. A creature that touches it or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 4 (1d8) fire.

909bd6aa-3584-50ba-89dc-b05f130bb5be.name: Iron Disruption
909bd6aa-3584-50ba-89dc-b05f130bb5be.description: Struck by a cold iron weapon becomes visible and can’t use Hurl Flame or Scorching Aura until start of its next turn.

attributes.description: Struck by a cold iron weapon becomes visible and can’t use Hurl Flame or Scorching Aura until start of its next turn.

427f871c-e5fa-5093-92c2-d83c01142a85.name: Back Spikes
427f871c-e5fa-5093-92c2-d83c01142a85.description: Any Small or larger creature riding alke against its will: 14 (4d6) piercing damage (DC 15 Dex half).

attributes.description: Any Small or larger creature riding alke against its will: 14 (4d6) piercing damage (DC 15 Dex half).
Advantage: sight Wis (Percept) checks.

407e4be2-6001-564c-934d-ecf808775812.name: Pounce
407e4be2-6001-564c-934d-ecf808775812.description: If it moves 30'+ straight toward a creature and then hits it with Claws on the same turn that target: DC 15 Str save or be knocked prone. If target is prone alke can make one Beak attack vs. it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If it moves 30'+ straight toward a creature and then hits it with Claws on the same turn that target: DC 15 Str save or be knocked prone. If target is prone alke can make one Beak attack vs. it as a bonus action.

ced0b6c3-ef86-5ee8-9b3b-941f73c8e3c0.name: Repelling Spikes
ced0b6c3-ef86-5ee8-9b3b-941f73c8e3c0.description: Adds 3 to its AC vs. one melee or ranged weapon attack that would hit it. To do so the alke must see the attacker and not be prone.

attributes.description: Adds 3 to its AC vs. one melee or ranged weapon attack that would hit it. To do so the alke must see the attacker and not be prone.

5517d18b-51b6-5979-8ecd-d59a52546125.name: Overpowering Stench
5517d18b-51b6-5979-8ecd-d59a52546125.description: Each creature other than an alliumite or garlicle within 5 ft. of the alliumite when it takes damage must make DC 15 Con save or be blinded until the end of its next turn. On a successful save the creature has advantage vs. the Overpowering Stench of all alliumites for 1 min.

attributes.description: Each creature other than an alliumite or garlicle within 5 ft. of the alliumite when it takes damage must make DC 15 Con save or be blinded until the end of its next turn. On a successful save the creature has advantage vs. the Overpowering Stench of all alliumites for 1 min.

fa0e4f76-a6f7-52ae-acf5-0dfcea4e255f.name: Plant Camouflage
fa0e4f76-a6f7-52ae-acf5-0dfcea4e255f.description: Aadvantage on Dex (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

attributes.description: Aadvantage on Dex (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

0261b9d9-3ca5-541b-9494-81529bb5de7c.name: Plant Camouflage (Alliumite, Rapscallion)
0261b9d9-3ca5-541b-9494-81529bb5de7c.description: Advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

attributes.description: Advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

668f3960-bf02-5718-ad26-a9d4e7e651ba.name: Tearful Stench
668f3960-bf02-5718-ad26-a9d4e7e651ba.description: Each creature other than an alliumite within 5 ft. of alliumite when it takes damage: DC 14 Con save or be blinded until start of creature’s next turn. On a successful save creature is immune to Tearful Stench of all alliumites for 1 min.

attributes.description: Each creature other than an alliumite within 5 ft. of alliumite when it takes damage: DC 14 Con save or be blinded until start of creature’s next turn. On a successful save creature is immune to Tearful Stench of all alliumites for 1 min.

eb1e74b0-0f3a-5176-ac5a-50870f4e2d97.name: Grapplevine Escape
eb1e74b0-0f3a-5176-ac5a-50870f4e2d97.description: When a creature rapscallion can see hits it with melee attack can use its whip to swing up to 20' away from attacker provided nearby terrain includes a feature it can use to swing (branch chandelier ledge mast railing or similar). This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: When a creature rapscallion can see hits it with melee attack can use its whip to swing up to 20' away from attacker provided nearby terrain includes a feature it can use to swing (branch chandelier ledge mast railing or similar). This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

4d2f1b5d-d1bc-5e91-b2b7-1b65f910fcf5.name: Pungent Retort
4d2f1b5d-d1bc-5e91-b2b7-1b65f910fcf5.description: When a creature rapscallion can see within 60' of it starts its turn or casts a spell rapscallion issues forth a string of insults cleverly crafted to make a foe cry. If it can hear the rapscallion target: DC 14 Wis save or sob uncontrollably until start of rapscallion's next turn. A sobbing creature has disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls and must make DC 14 Con save to cast a spell that requires spellcaster to see its target. Spellcaster doesn't lose the spell slot on a failure.

attributes.description: When a creature rapscallion can see within 60' of it starts its turn or casts a spell rapscallion issues forth a string of insults cleverly crafted to make a foe cry. If it can hear the rapscallion target: DC 14 Wis save or sob uncontrollably until start of rapscallion's next turn. A sobbing creature has disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls and must make DC 14 Con save to cast a spell that requires spellcaster to see its target. Spellcaster doesn't lose the spell slot on a failure.

64eb39d2-3e2c-55d0-b7db-8f04b6829a43.name: False Appearance
64eb39d2-3e2c-55d0-b7db-8f04b6829a43.description: Motionless: indistinguishable from patch of lichen.

attributes.description: Motionless: indistinguishable from patch of lichen.

2a50e2fe-f845-58e8-a952-5acf889fab7f.name: Mossy Carpet
2a50e2fe-f845-58e8-a952-5acf889fab7f.description: Enter hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through space as narrow as 1' wide with o squeezing.

attributes.description: Enter hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through space as narrow as 1' wide with o squeezing.

a9e76350-4abb-50a0-a619-cd8992995491.name: Lethargic Stupor
a9e76350-4abb-50a0-a619-cd8992995491.description: One unconscious Humanoid or Giant in creeper's space suffers one level of exhaustion. A creature with more than half its hp max can't suffer more than one level of exhaustion from this. This exhaustion lasts until creature finishes short rest.

attributes.description: One unconscious Humanoid or Giant in creeper's space suffers one level of exhaustion. A creature with more than half its hp max can't suffer more than one level of exhaustion from this. This exhaustion lasts until creature finishes short rest.

bff10acb-82ce-5e6f-9ba0-30586852dce1.name: Painted for War
bff10acb-82ce-5e6f-9ba0-30586852dce1.description: Advantage on Cha (Intimidation) checks and advantage on savings throws vs. being frightened. In addition each friendly creature within 10 ft. of warrior and that can see it has advantage on saves vs. being frightened.

attributes.description: Advantage on Cha (Intimidation) checks and advantage on savings throws vs. being frightened. In addition each friendly creature within 10 ft. of warrior and that can see it has advantage on saves vs. being frightened.

2d9385ea-764e-5a84-a8fd-055dfe13e94d.name: Woodfriend
2d9385ea-764e-5a84-a8fd-055dfe13e94d.description: When in a forest alseid leave no tracks and automatically discern true north.

attributes.description: When in a forest alseid leave no tracks and automatically discern true north.

5eea6619-43de-5456-aa2e-3d6b0a6f1bce.name: False Appearance (Amphibolt)
5eea6619-43de-5456-aa2e-3d6b0a6f1bce.description: While motionless indistinguishable from large rock formation.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from large rock formation.

6302028f-9b49-544f-b493-e6e0f490f4b9.name: Lightning Leap
6302028f-9b49-544f-b493-e6e0f490f4b9.description: Its long jump is 30' with or with o a running start. Creatures in the its path: 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage and 7 (2d6) lightning and is knocked prone (DC 15 Dex half damage not prone).

attributes.description: Its long jump is 30' with or with o a running start. Creatures in the its path: 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage and 7 (2d6) lightning and is knocked prone (DC 15 Dex half damage not prone).

e3f7add7-6168-579d-9dd1-1d12192b6792.name: Flyby
e3f7add7-6168-579d-9dd1-1d12192b6792.description: The haladron doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

attributes.description: The haladron doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

7599933b-f8cc-5c8f-93cf-b3be2939a568.name: Immortal Nature
7599933b-f8cc-5c8f-93cf-b3be2939a568.description: Doesn't require food drink or sleep

attributes.description: Doesn't require food drink or sleep
Immune: form-altering spells/effects.

9e365349-97c5-5a08-b748-07120765075a.name: Angelic Weapons
9e365349-97c5-5a08-b748-07120765075a.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 4d8 radiant (included below).

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 4d8 radiant (included below).

0d3b9d4e-dd3c-5218-b898-1437ef75d884.name: Solar Nimbus
0d3b9d4e-dd3c-5218-b898-1437ef75d884.description: When hit by an attack it surrounds itself in a fiery nimbus searing attacker: 9 (2d8) fire and 9 (2d8) radiant and nimbus sheds bright light in 30' radius and dim light an additional 30'. Until start of kalkydra's next turn a creature within 5 ft. of kalkydra that hits it with melee attack takes 9 (2d8) fire and 9 (2d8) radiant.

attributes.description: When hit by an attack it surrounds itself in a fiery nimbus searing attacker: 9 (2d8) fire and 9 (2d8) radiant and nimbus sheds bright light in 30' radius and dim light an additional 30'. Until start of kalkydra's next turn a creature within 5 ft. of kalkydra that hits it with melee attack takes 9 (2d8) fire and 9 (2d8) radiant.

68389ec0-6ffc-534a-a655-8b66b5b5ef63.name: Living Coral Armor
68389ec0-6ffc-534a-a655-8b66b5b5ef63.description: Its armor is made of living coral. If armor is damaged such as from a black pudding’s Pseudopod armor fully repairs itself within 1 min provided it wasn’t destroyed.

attributes.description: Its armor is made of living coral. If armor is damaged such as from a black pudding’s Pseudopod armor fully repairs itself within 1 min provided it wasn’t destroyed.

7dc796be-9bf3-57c8-aedb-c0d49f31eea1.name: Anoxic Aura
7dc796be-9bf3-57c8-aedb-c0d49f31eea1.description: Removes oxygen from nearby water for 1 min. Each creature that requires oxygen to live (including air-breathing creatures under effects of water breathing) and starts its turn within 20' of deva: DC 17 Con save or begin suffocating. Deva never suffers effects of this; can choose any creatures in area to ignore it.

attributes.description: Removes oxygen from nearby water for 1 min. Each creature that requires oxygen to live (including air-breathing creatures under effects of water breathing) and starts its turn within 20' of deva: DC 17 Con save or begin suffocating. Deva never suffers effects of this; can choose any creatures in area to ignore it.

5179b830-e1c5-59f9-85b5-0a0cad1ffc7e.name: Death’s Accomplice
5179b830-e1c5-59f9-85b5-0a0cad1ffc7e.description: When it deals radiant can choose to deal necrotic instead.

attributes.description: When it deals radiant can choose to deal necrotic instead.

e066b345-a109-5602-8398-af53ae980f20.name: Fiendish Countenance
e066b345-a109-5602-8398-af53ae980f20.description: When traveling planes of existence demons and devils are native to (ex: Hell the Abyss) psychopomp appears to be a Fiend of a type native to that plane. Until it reveals its true nature (no action required) or uses Divine Dictum Spirit Usher or Unmake Contract it is undetectable as a Celestial.

attributes.description: When traveling planes of existence demons and devils are native to (ex: Hell the Abyss) psychopomp appears to be a Fiend of a type native to that plane. Until it reveals its true nature (no action required) or uses Divine Dictum Spirit Usher or Unmake Contract it is undetectable as a Celestial.

a122b98f-c632-575c-8315-dc5a33c36489.name: Spirit Usher
a122b98f-c632-575c-8315-dc5a33c36489.description: Wards a creature with divine power for 1 hr. While warded Celestials Fiends and Undead have disadvantage on attack rolls vs. the creature and creature can't be charmed frightened or possessed by them. Warded creature gains 11 temp hp and if slain can't be raised as an Undead for 1 year.

attributes.description: Wards a creature with divine power for 1 hr. While warded Celestials Fiends and Undead have disadvantage on attack rolls vs. the creature and creature can't be charmed frightened or possessed by them. Warded creature gains 11 temp hp and if slain can't be raised as an Undead for 1 year.

5cb0e4f5-d211-51b7-a115-255ff62f8455.name: Angelic Poison
5cb0e4f5-d211-51b7-a115-255ff62f8455.description: Its weapon attacks are magical and its weapons are coated with radiant poison. Creatures with resistance or immunity to poison or the poisoned condition can be affected by angel’s poison. Such creatures have advantage on saves vs. the angel’s poison.

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical and its weapons are coated with radiant poison. Creatures with resistance or immunity to poison or the poisoned condition can be affected by angel’s poison. Such creatures have advantage on saves vs. the angel’s poison.

41117e50-59a3-5777-a657-5a39decf04ab.name: Divine Awareness
41117e50-59a3-5777-a657-5a39decf04ab.description: Knows if it hears a lie.

attributes.description: Knows if it hears a lie.

45be2551-3043-5f03-92c9-a471bba71dac.name: Evasion
45be2551-3043-5f03-92c9-a471bba71dac.description: If subject to effect that allows Dex save for half damage takes no damage on success and only half if it fails.

attributes.description: If subject to effect that allows Dex save for half damage takes no damage on success and only half if it fails.

c811798d-86ec-5063-8a56-d8f73a809f4f.name: Executioner's Judgment
c811798d-86ec-5063-8a56-d8f73a809f4f.description: When a creature poisoned by shrouded angel starts its turn angel demands target repent. If it doesn't repent: DC 17 Con save. Fail: reduced to 0 hp. Success: 22 (5d8) radiant. If target repents its next action is chosen by angel as if it failed a save vs. the command spell: 'Draw Nigh' (approach) 'Clasp Hands in Prayer' (drop) 'Seek Redemption' (flee) 'Be Penitent' (grovel) or 'In Stillness Hear the Truth' (halt). Once angel uses this reaction it must deal poison to a poisoned target before using it again.

4d74b305-3dd5-5221-9169-a262c2474dbc.name: Angelic Weapons (Angel, Zirnitran)
4d74b305-3dd5-5221-9169-a262c2474dbc.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 5d8 radiant (included below).

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 5d8 radiant (included below).

7b484707-83ff-53a1-860d-a38aa9f930ed.name: Aura of Balance
7b484707-83ff-53a1-860d-a38aa9f930ed.description: Affects chance and probability around it. While creature within 20' of it can’t have advantage or disadvantage on any ability check attack roll or save. Aura affects zirnitran. At start of each of its turns zirnitran chooses whether this aura is active.

07e9c197-df15-56af-bfc7-750caa9c4d41.name: Dragon Watcher
07e9c197-df15-56af-bfc7-750caa9c4d41.description: Advantage: saves vs. dragon breath weapons. No damage if it succeeds on such a save and only half if it fails.

attributes.description: Advantage: saves vs. dragon breath weapons. No damage if it succeeds on such a save and only half if it fails.

abbb64e9-1861-53f7-8784-fe9a2a631d4a.name: Glimpse from the Heavens
abbb64e9-1861-53f7-8784-fe9a2a631d4a.description: Its eyes flash with the majesty of a solar eclipse. Each creature of its choice that is within 60' of it and that can see it: DC 19 Wis save or frightened for 1 min. Creature can re-save at end of each of its turns ending the effect on a success. If save is successful or effect ends for it creature is immune to zirnitran’s Glimpse of the Heavens for the next 24 hrs. A creature that fails by 5+ is also blinded. Blindness lasts until removed by a greater restoration spell or similar magic.

32a84b6e-413d-5c9f-80b5-bc76c1e3166f.name: Hardened Scales
32a84b6e-413d-5c9f-80b5-bc76c1e3166f.description: Any critical hit vs. it becomes a normal hit.

29a4d7ac-a684-5b07-bed5-d9e01045597f.name: Secrets of the Hidden Hoard (2/Day)
29a4d7ac-a684-5b07-bed5-d9e01045597f.description: Draws upon ages of study and observation and casts one spell of 8th level or lower that appears on the cleric or wizard spell list. Casts the spell as an action regardless of spell’s normal casting time.

attributes.description: Draws upon ages of study and observation and casts one spell of 8th level or lower that appears on the cleric or wizard spell list. Casts the spell as an action regardless of spell’s normal casting time.

df543646-ef87-5789-ba3c-3f04e8548b07.name: Spellcasting
df543646-ef87-5789-ba3c-3f04e8548b07.description:
Wis (DC 21) no material components:

- **At Will:** Detect Evil and Good, Invisibility (self only), Legend Lore, Thaumaturgy
- **3/Day Each**: Dispel Evil and Good, Geas (as an action)
- **1/Day Each**: Antimagic Field, Plane Shift

ee5cf1e3-b6f1-5b89-a309-32f3992f46e3.name: Detect
ee5cf1e3-b6f1-5b89-a309-32f3992f46e3.description: Knows location of each dragon and each creature with strong connection to dragons such as a sorcerer with the draconic bloodline within 120' of it.

4bda7eae-75db-57af-a32b-542af555eb26.name: Move
4bda7eae-75db-57af-a32b-542af555eb26.description: Flies up to half its fly speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: Flies up to half its fly speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

0d93294e-c7b2-5aab-a3ef-c2a7716caaf9.name: Six-Scaled Aegis
0d93294e-c7b2-5aab-a3ef-c2a7716caaf9.description: When it takes damage it gains resistance to that type of damage including the triggering damage for 1 min or until it uses this reaction again.

attributes.description: When it takes damage it gains resistance to that type of damage including the triggering damage for 1 min or until it uses this reaction again.

fc850e25-d5f0-5749-b24a-ef1a849f3fc1.name: Under Black Wings
fc850e25-d5f0-5749-b24a-ef1a849f3fc1.description: Creates a magical feathered shield around itself or another creature it can see within 120' of it. Target gains +2 to AC and 20 temp hp until the end of zirnitran's next turn.

attributes.description: Creates a magical feathered shield around itself or another creature it can see within 120' of it. Target gains +2 to AC and 20 temp hp until the end of zirnitran's next turn.

3b905e65-815e-517a-9a4d-b1c29dc7709a.name: Elephantine Passivism
3b905e65-815e-517a-9a4d-b1c29dc7709a.description: No elephant mammoth or other elephantine creature can willingly attack her. Can be forced to do so magically.

attributes.description: No elephant mammoth or other elephantine creature can willingly attack her. Can be forced to do so magically.

07194cdb-963a-5cac-8741-1d4282f3ec51.name: Rejuvenation
07194cdb-963a-5cac-8741-1d4282f3ec51.description: If she dies soul reforms on Astral Plane. In 1d6 days it inhabits body of another elephantine creature on Material Plane which becomes the Queen with all hp and abilities thereof. Only killing every elephantine creature on the Material Plane will prevent this.

attributes.description: If she dies soul reforms on Astral Plane. In 1d6 days it inhabits body of another elephantine creature on Material Plane which becomes the Queen with all hp and abilities thereof. Only killing every elephantine creature on the Material Plane will prevent this.

a49b7ccf-334b-546b-bd57-0e3613f9b037.name: Speak with Elephantines
a49b7ccf-334b-546b-bd57-0e3613f9b037.description: Communicate with any elephant mammoth or other elephantine creature as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: Communicate with any elephant mammoth or other elephantine creature as if they shared a language.

9440771d-5646-58bc-9422-057098856f9b.name: Stomp (Elephantine or True Form)
9440771d-5646-58bc-9422-057098856f9b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 34 (5d10+7) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 34 (5d10+7) bludgeoning damage.

d2ea4f04-7049-5c8a-98d0-b1186fcde6e0.name: Trampling Charge
d2ea4f04-7049-5c8a-98d0-b1186fcde6e0.description: If she moves 20'+ straight to creature and then hits it with Gore on same turn target knocked prone (DC 20 Str negates). If target is prone queen can make one Stomp vs. it as a bonus action.

7499193d-99af-5fcb-9d1d-e129205ea6d5.name: Trunk (Elephantine or True Form)
7499193d-99af-5fcb-9d1d-e129205ea6d5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, 15 ft., one creature,. Target is grappled (escape DC 19) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until grapple ends target restrained queen can’t use Trunk on another.

486bf9f4-dfb8-562c-810d-51d4af103c39.name: Tusk Sweep (Elephantine or True Form Recharge 5–6)
486bf9f4-dfb8-562c-810d-51d4af103c39.description: Channels raw magic as she sweeps her tusks in a wide arc. Each creature in a 15 ft. cube: 35 (10d6) bludgeoning damage and is pushed up to 15 ft. away from the queen (DC 20 Dex half damage and isn’t pushed away).

attributes.description: Channels raw magic as she sweeps her tusks in a wide arc. Each creature in a 15 ft. cube: 35 (10d6) bludgeoning damage and is pushed up to 15 ft. away from the queen (DC 20 Dex half damage and isn’t pushed away).

f1e0bf71-d817-5231-9f61-b5435dca08b2.name: Catch Weapon
f1e0bf71-d817-5231-9f61-b5435dca08b2.description: When hit by a melee weapon attack she can reduce the damage by 1d10+17. If this reduces damage to 0 queen can catch the weapon with her trunk if she is not using it to grapple a creature. If Queen catches a weapon in this way she must make a Str (Athletics) check contested by attacker's Str (Athletics) or Dex (Acrobatics) check (target chooses). Queen has disadvantage on the check if wielder is holding item with 2+ hands. If she wins she disarms creature and can throw the weapon up to 60' in a random direction as part of the same reaction.

8337bff1-3909-5405-9191-a583c4f68002.name: Change Shape (Animal Lord, Mammoth Queen)
8337bff1-3909-5405-9191-a583c4f68002.description: Transforms into Gargantuan oliphaunt (see Creature Codex) a Huge mammoth a Med female human with thick brown hair tied back in a braid or back into her true Huge elephant-headed humanoid form. Her stats other than size are the same in each form. Any items worn/carried transform with her.

5e57cf03-613d-5582-b3e8-71908b1d2725.name: Queen's Trumpet
5e57cf03-613d-5582-b3e8-71908b1d2725.description: Emits loud trumpeting audible to 300'. Chooses up to 3 creatures that can hear trumpet. If target is friendly has advantage on its next attack roll ability check or save. If hostile: DC 20 Wis save or frightened til end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Emits loud trumpeting audible to 300'. Chooses up to 3 creatures that can hear trumpet. If target is friendly has advantage on its next attack roll ability check or save. If hostile: DC 20 Wis save or frightened til end of its next turn.

c01d032b-223c-5448-9bff-e0a733605dd1.name: Regenerative Hide
c01d032b-223c-5448-9bff-e0a733605dd1.description: Regains 15 hp. She can't use this legendary action again until the end of her next turn.

attributes.description: Regains 15 hp. She can't use this legendary action again until the end of her next turn.

d50a349c-4bcf-5514-b10a-44100f500191.name: Shoving Stampede
d50a349c-4bcf-5514-b10a-44100f500191.description: Charges becoming unstoppable stampede in line up to 80' long æ00d7 15 ft. wide. All in line: 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage and pushed up to 15 ft. away and knocked prone (DC 20 Dex half not pushed/prone). Queen's move along this line doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

7c95eb3d-0443-5a27-a9db-6f722bc0ae54.description: Incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic instrument must succeed on a Con save vs. caster’s spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 min.

attributes.description: Incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic instrument must succeed on a Con save vs. caster’s spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 min.

53efe5ec-9380-583d-b6d8-dfdef5d4540c.description: While motionless and not flying indistinguishable from normal musical instrument.

attributes.description: While motionless and not flying indistinguishable from normal musical instrument.

fd1e78de-a2f5-553a-8541-d47a91681e9e.description: The quartet is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic the quartet must succeed on a Con save vs. the caster’s spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 min.

5e06d491-424a-517a-85d8-5594793d247e.description: The quartet doesn’t require air food drink or sleep.

39dc84ed-756c-59c0-b6cb-ae59c11f3b10.name: False Appearance (Animated Instrument, Quartet)
39dc84ed-756c-59c0-b6cb-ae59c11f3b10.description: While motionless indistinguishable from group of musical instruments.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from group of musical instruments.

80c8d465-079a-5c26-9a97-52a55b37b423.name: Four-Part Harmony
80c8d465-079a-5c26-9a97-52a55b37b423.description: An animated quartet is always composed of four instruments that sit or hover close together acting with singular intent. If an attack deals at least 25 damage to the quartet then one of the instruments falls unconscious causing the quartet to deal one die less of damage with its Trouble Clef and Orchestra Hit actions.

b5c1e05d-0f5e-5f9b-a807-3467ee7cece9.name: Antimagic Susceptibility (Animated Instrument, Symphony)
b5c1e05d-0f5e-5f9b-a807-3467ee7cece9.description: Incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic instrument must succeed on a Con save vs. caster’s spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 min. Has advantage on this save.

5b2b4a85-370d-5f73-b7e5-ad1848ec9739.name: False Appearance (Animated Instrument, Symphony)
5b2b4a85-370d-5f73-b7e5-ad1848ec9739.description: Motionless and not flying: indistinguishable from large musical instrument collection and performance paraphernalia.

attributes.description: Motionless and not flying: indistinguishable from large musical instrument collection and performance paraphernalia.

f53384fc-6a64-57f2-ab4a-13fbc0b08fbc.name: Grand Composition
f53384fc-6a64-57f2-ab4a-13fbc0b08fbc.description: While it occupies another creature’s space that creature has disadvantage on Con saves to maintain concentration and creature can’t cast spells with verbal components.

attributes.description: While it occupies another creature’s space that creature has disadvantage on Con saves to maintain concentration and creature can’t cast spells with verbal components.

403ed753-32dd-5248-8646-b282158d6505.name: Musical Arrangement
403ed753-32dd-5248-8646-b282158d6505.description: Plays one of the following:Ballet of Quickening Steps Lilting ballet that picks up pace in startling fashion increasing its movement speed by 10 ft. and allowing it to take the Dodge action as a bonus action on each of its turns. Lasts 1 min or until symphony plays a different song.Harrowing Hymn Foreboding verse. Each creature within 30' of symphony that can hear it: DC 19 Wis save or frightened for 1 min. A creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. If creature’s save succeeds or effect ends for it creature immune to symphony’s Harrowing Hymn for next 24 hrs.Concerto for the Luckless Piece pits nearby listeners vs. their own misfortunes. Each creature within 60' of symphony and can hear it: DC 19 Cha save or be cursed 1 min. While cursed creature can’t add its proficiency bonus to attack rolls or ability checks. If cursed creature rolls a 20 on attack roll or ability check curse ends. Curse can be lifted early by remove curse spell or similar magic.Four Winds Canon Trumpets gale force winds in a 90' cone. Each creature in that area: creature is pushed up to 30' away from symphony and knocked prone (DC 19 Str creature is knocked prone but isn’t pushed). Winds also disperse gas or vapor and it extinguishes candles torches and similar unprotected flames in the area. It causes protected flames such as those of lanterns to dance wildly and has a 50% chance to extinguish them.

4ea9a579-be96-5870-aaff-56319662e159.name: Swarm
4ea9a579-be96-5870-aaff-56319662e159.description: Can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and symphony can move through any opening large enough for a Small musical instrument. Except for the Harmonize legendary action symphony can’t regain hp or gain temp hp.

6b7ed880-c49b-50a5-b8dc-c9b88f4fe4d8.name: Harmonize
6b7ed880-c49b-50a5-b8dc-c9b88f4fe4d8.description: Tunes its worn-out instruments back to working harmony regaining 20 hp and ending one condition affecting it.

attributes.description: Tunes its worn-out instruments back to working harmony regaining 20 hp and ending one condition affecting it.

9c375518-3920-5c79-9958-2936114ca499.name: Move (Animated Instrument, Symphony)
9c375518-3920-5c79-9958-2936114ca499.description: Moves up to its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: Moves up to its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

824c9420-5645-5365-afb9-f11aab725350.name: Orchestral Flourish
824c9420-5645-5365-afb9-f11aab725350.description: Plays a short fierce melody. Each creature within 10 ft. of symphony including creatures in its space:  10 (3d6) thunder (DC 19 Con half).

8ab14904-9f17-5a88-b931-39d6500d1c72.name: Syncopated Melody
8ab14904-9f17-5a88-b931-39d6500d1c72.description: Mimics a spell that was cast since the end of its last turn. It makes a Performance check where the DC is the caster's DC+the level of the spell symphony is trying to mimic. If successful symphony casts the spell using original caster's DC and spell attack bonus.

3b3950b4-0555-5750-9c37-b9ed3aa2fc16.name: Flowing Flesh
3b3950b4-0555-5750-9c37-b9ed3aa2fc16.description: Can move through spaces as narrow as 6 inches wide with o squeezing.

attributes.description: Can move through spaces as narrow as 6 inches wide with o squeezing.

8eb7f0ce-78e3-5006-bbdd-4a2a0fab3f31.name: Healing Sense
8eb7f0ce-78e3-5006-bbdd-4a2a0fab3f31.description: Can sense healing spells effects and potions within 120' of it. If the ooze is the target of a healing spell if it consumes a healing potion or if it is affected by a similar magical effect it gains a +2 bonus to its AC has advantage on Dex saves and can use its Pseudopod attack as a bonus action for 1 min.

attributes.description: Can sense healing spells effects and potions within 120' of it. If the ooze is the target of a healing spell if it consumes a healing potion or if it is affected by a similar magical effect it gains a +2 bonus to its AC has advantage on Dex saves and can use its Pseudopod attack as a bonus action for 1 min.
Doesn’t require sleep.

290c6356-4772-5fd4-a8a6-e31d33bb02af.name: Subsume
290c6356-4772-5fd4-a8a6-e31d33bb02af.description: Begins absorbing one creature it is grappling. Creature takes 18 (4d8) necrotic (DC 17 Con half). Offal regains hp equal to half the damage dealt. If offal is at its hp max it gains temp hp for 1 hr instead. Offal can add temp hp gained from this trait to temp hp gained earlier from this trait. Temporary hp can't exceed 48. If its temp hp would exceed 48 a new animated offal appears in an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of offal. The new Ooze is Small doesn't have this bonus action and has 10 hp. Creature killed by this bonus action is fully subsumed into offal and can be restored to life only by means of a resurrection spell or similar magic.

bc9a4dae-c992-565e-ad1f-ab582cfa9c06.name: Amorphous

ab2d4ecf-f0b6-5d2e-bcdc-f0e35fe3212b.name: Aphasic Field
ab2d4ecf-f0b6-5d2e-bcdc-f0e35fe3212b.description: Generates a field of psychic distortion around itself. Each creature that starts its turn within 60' of abomination: DC 17 Int save or lose ability to speak coherently saying coherent words that make no sense in context instead of what it intends to say. If creature attempts to cast a spell with verbal components it fails taking 9 (2d8) psychic per spell level of spell it attempted to cast and expends spell slot.

d989ea4d-d8e7-5f35-a607-cdf6a331a2d7.description: Is formed of magical energy. It temporarily winks out of existence when inside an antimagic field instantly reappearing once space it occupied is no longer within area of effect. If targeted by dispel magic: 21 (6d6) damage + extra 7 (2d6) psychic for each spell level beyond 3rd if spell is cast using a higher spell slot.

2c325135-a1de-5347-9bd9-1fd8eb8eb4c9.name: Impregnable
2c325135-a1de-5347-9bd9-1fd8eb8eb4c9.description: If subjected to an effect that allows it to make a save to take only half damage it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails.

882fec4b-31de-5479-8e5d-fa364de84e1b.name: Arcane Barrage
882fec4b-31de-5479-8e5d-fa364de84e1b.description: Sends arcane energy toward a creature it can see within 120' of it. Target begins to glow with arcane energy and at end of target's next turn: 35 (10d6) radiant (DC 19 Con half). Damage is divided evenly between target and all creatures within 10 ft. of it except leviathan.

8377839b-f078-5d98-8e1c-83dd39568612.name: Eldritch Overload
8377839b-f078-5d98-8e1c-83dd39568612.description: When reduced to half its max hp or fewer its speed is doubled and it gains additional action each turn. The action must be to Dash Disengage Hide or Use an Object or to make one Grabbing Claws or Excavation Beam attack. Effect lasts for 3 rounds. At end of its third turn the scavenger takes 10 (3d6) fire.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from inanimate statue.

4c326453-aaff-5b8f-9656-b3475bfe7d9c.description: If it moves 20'+ straight toward a creature and then hits it with trunk maul on same turn target: DC 19 Str save or be pushed up to 10 ft. and knocked prone. If target is prone archon can make one Stomp attack vs. it as a bonus action.

A friendly creature with o those conditions has advantage on its next attack roll. In addition each friendly creature within 60' of archon that can hear the roar gains 14 (4d6) temp hp.

c2d3f0a9-c043-57cc-927b-a7528deeb44e.description: When reduced to 10 hp or less it feigns death in hopes of deceiving its attackers. A creature that sees it in this state can determine it is a ruse via DC 15 Wis (Medicine) check. Ruse lasts until astralsupial ends it (no action required) up to 8 hrs. 1st attack it makes within 1 round of ending ruse has advantage.

11af70bb-cdd2-5fea-bac4-183a605e151e.description: If a creature that breathes air starts its turn in miasma’s space it must make DC 12 Con save or begin suffocating as its lungs fill with the poisonous air emitted by the miasma. Suffocation lasts until creature ends its turn in a space not occupied by baleful miasma or the baleful miasma dies. When the suffocation ends the creature is poisoned until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Can occupy same space as one other clacker soldier.

a5d1fb02-e0d6-5acd-af17-b3169089e275.name: Healing Lotuscraft
a5d1fb02-e0d6-5acd-af17-b3169089e275.description: (1/Day). Can spend 1 min crafting poultice that lasts 24 hrs. When a creature takes an action to apply poultice to a wound or skin of a creature target regains 18 (4d8) hp and is cured of any diseases or conditions affecting it.

1725f7b9-3b3d-5994-9c94-67baa0a60d0b.description: If it starts its turn in contact with body of water large enough to submerge at least half of its body it regains 10 hp if it has at least 1 hp.

attributes.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in marshland or swamp terrain.

24ef350c-a14a-57a4-8439-6282c2cc2d42.name: Swamp Stalker
24ef350c-a14a-57a4-8439-6282c2cc2d42.description: Leaves behind no tracks or other traces of its passage when it moves through marshland or swamp terrain.

49374c25-1c63-57e5-9867-cd146e8165de.description: Releases all absorbed water as a powerful jet in a 60' line that is 5 ft. wide. Each creature in that line: 40 (9d8) bludgeoning damage and is pushed up to 15 ft. away from it and knocked prone (DC 14 Dex half damage and isn’t pushed or knocked prone). After using Water Jet it is no longer saturated.

c3de4c6d-3876-5826-ae8e-b9542d38b848.name: Saturated Expansion
c3de4c6d-3876-5826-ae8e-b9542d38b848.description: While in contact with body of water it absorbs water that is a cube up to 10 ft. on a side and becomes saturated as water fills its body. While saturated increases in size along with anything it is wearing or carrying becoming Huge and has advantage on Str checks and Str saves. If it lacks room to become Huge it attains max size possible in space available. Ground exposed by the absorbed water becomes difficult terrain.

f0039a60-e0b1-595c-be26-7b0f4dcc3f63.description: If the birgemon seal moves at least 10 ft. in a straight line while on snow or ice during its turn it can slide up to 40 feet.

0285519f-85dc-59c2-9dd0-b657bddbd013.name: Eldritch Luminance
0285519f-85dc-59c2-9dd0-b657bddbd013.description: When a creature that can see the patch starts its turn within 90' of it patch can force it to make a DC 15 Wis save if ooze isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. Fail: creature is mesmerized 1 min. Mesmerized creature over 5 ft. away from patch must move on its turn toward ooze by most direct route trying to get within 5 feet. It doesn’t avoid opportunity attacks but before moving into damaging terrain such as lava or a pit and whenever it takes damage from a source other than ooze target can re-save. Mesmerized target can also re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. If creature’s save succeeds or effect ends for it is immune to patch's Eldritch Luminance for next 24 hrs.

6ac6addc-99f4-5e2a-b25d-92bf1be9b04c.name: Mist Stalker
6ac6addc-99f4-5e2a-b25d-92bf1be9b04c.description: In dim light fog or mist it takes the Hide action.

2c60f108-289e-565e-8f69-1563c5f5d936.name: Steadfast

ee416af8-b3c9-5e90-923f-8d5bdae64175.name: Blur of Motion
ee416af8-b3c9-5e90-923f-8d5bdae64175.description: When it moves 30'+ on its turn ranged attack rolls vs. it have disadvantage until start of its next turn.

8c6af2a8-45b4-5bac-bdd5-5c3f04ff2a31.name: Freedom of Movement
8c6af2a8-45b4-5bac-bdd5-5c3f04ff2a31.description: Ignores difficult terrain and magical effects can’t reduce its speed or cause it to be restrained. Can spend 5 ft. of move to escape nonmagical restraints or being grappled.

30bbcdb3-904d-536f-8e02-ba447b03b152.name: Trampling Charge (Blestsessebe)
30bbcdb3-904d-536f-8e02-ba447b03b152.description: If it moves 30'+ straight toward a creature and then hits it with gore on the same turn target: DC 15 Str save or be knocked prone. If target is prone blestsessebe can make one hooves attack vs. it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If it moves 30'+ straight toward a creature and then hits it with gore on the same turn target: DC 15 Str save or be knocked prone. If target is prone blestsessebe can make one hooves attack vs. it as a bonus action.

ddd8c44c-536d-5942-85f8-27a2f8090566.name: Barnacle Shivers
ddd8c44c-536d-5942-85f8-27a2f8090566.description: Characterized by inescapable cold and shiveringthat slowly pervades victim’s body this is a disease that infects creatures attacked by blood barnacles. Until disease is cured infected creature can’t regain hp except magically and its hp max decreases by 3 (1d6) for every 24 hrs that elapse. Reduction lasts until disease is cured. Creature dies if disease reduces its hp max to 0. A Humanoid or Beast slain by this disease rises 24 hrs later as a zombie. Zombie isn’t under barnacle’s control but it views barnacle as an ally.

3b65ca0f-014c-58f2-8cd7-f0e60966c5c7.name: Blood Sense
3b65ca0f-014c-58f2-8cd7-f0e60966c5c7.description: Can pinpoint by scent location of creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead and that don’t have all of their hp within 60' of it and can sense general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

9b61acfe-d6c1-5235-9d04-b27bcdfc6222.name: False Appearance (Blood Barnacle)
9b61acfe-d6c1-5235-9d04-b27bcdfc6222.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal barnacle.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal barnacle.

60346d60-d881-5b54-a6dc-ba75d9aad3bf.name: Host Defense
60346d60-d881-5b54-a6dc-ba75d9aad3bf.description: When a creature damages an attached blood barnacle with anything other than fire creature hosting barnacle must make DC 12 Wis save or use its reaction to protect the barnacle. Barnacle takes half the damage dealt to it and host takes the other half.

9c7a7c60-631d-5dfb-ac09-02ed75761cda.name: Blood Sense (Blood Flurry)

6a5eb8ae-52a6-5590-a62f-249ebf026f95.name: False Appearance (Blood Flurry)
6a5eb8ae-52a6-5590-a62f-249ebf026f95.description: While motionless indistinguishable from collection of snowflakes whether resting on the ground or carried by natural winds. It loses this trait if it has consumed blood in the last 24 hrs.

e3e43fca-d085-5291-9a87-a3f56d4f7280.name: Rust Vulnerability
e3e43fca-d085-5291-9a87-a3f56d4f7280.description: The large amount of iron in its diet makes it susceptible to effects that harm ferrous metal such as the rust monster’s Antennae.

5d1a042b-cc16-5c3e-b0f7-7ff781c9b9ce.name: Swarm (Blood Flurry)
5d1a042b-cc16-5c3e-b0f7-7ff781c9b9ce.description: Can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and flurry can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny crystalline Aberration. Can't regain hp or gain temp hp.

4ab98d4d-e219-5b5b-9129-49f1c7c80e1c.name: Call of the Grave
4ab98d4d-e219-5b5b-9129-49f1c7c80e1c.description: Attacks made within 60' of the bone collector score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

attributes.description: Attacks made within 60' of the bone collector score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

404c6df4-72e1-5f34-af2e-221b1fbb6c2c.name: Death Sense
404c6df4-72e1-5f34-af2e-221b1fbb6c2c.description: Can pinpoint by scent location of Undead creatures and creatures that have been dead no longer than 1 week within 60' of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

attributes.description: Can pinpoint by scent location of Undead creatures and creatures that have been dead no longer than 1 week within 60' of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

d767aba8-b4fb-5751-b0a2-33d3ba807c6c.name: Undead Nature
d767aba8-b4fb-5751-b0a2-33d3ba807c6c.description: Doesn't require air food drink or sleep.

attributes.description: Doesn't require air food drink or sleep.

e091b00c-bd65-5524-8b8f-d829efa15197.name: Death-Infused Weapons
e091b00c-bd65-5524-8b8f-d829efa15197.description: Weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 2d8 necrotic (included below).

324462ae-07be-5542-95ef-6014149ce6cc.name: Fling
324462ae-07be-5542-95ef-6014149ce6cc.description: One Med or smaller object held or creature grappled by bone lord is thrown up to 60' in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 ft. it was thrown. If target is thrown at another creature that creature: DC 19 Dex save or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

c719af0b-67fa-5f95-8dea-7e7df383b998.name: Master Tactician
c719af0b-67fa-5f95-8dea-7e7df383b998.description: It and any friendly Undead within 60' of it have advantage on attack rolls vs. a creature if at least one of the Undead’s allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and ally isn’t incapacitated.

7724f6c1-65ce-5076-8b66-c7019d9d4e34.name: Pattern of Death (Recharge 6)
7724f6c1-65ce-5076-8b66-c7019d9d4e34.description: Necrotic energy ripples out from the bone lord. Each creature that isn’t a Construct or Undead within 30' of it: 54 (12d8) necrotic (DC 19 Con half). Each friendly Undead within 30' of the bone lord including the bone lord regains hp equal to half the single highest amount of necrotic dealt.

020cbeca-9bd7-54b5-a26f-6547b355819f.name: Rejuvenation (Bone Lord)
020cbeca-9bd7-54b5-a26f-6547b355819f.description: As long as at least one of its bones remains a destroyed bone lord gathers a new body in 1d10 days regaining all its hp and becoming active again. New body appears within 5 ft. of the largest remaining bone from its body.

58140858-1592-54e3-8356-699590da5e2b.name: Servants of Death
58140858-1592-54e3-8356-699590da5e2b.description: The bone lord magically calls 3d6 skeletons or zombies 2d4 ghouls or 2 wights. Called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds acting as allies of bone lord and obeying its spoken commands. The Undead remain for 1 hr until bone lord dies or until bone lord dismisses them as a bonus action. Bone lord can have any number of Undead under its control at one time provided combined total CR of the Undead is no higher than 8.

2c9854e7-5bd7-53a6-bac5-abad844b44d9.name: Tail
2c9854e7-5bd7-53a6-bac5-abad844b44d9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, 15 ft., one target, 16 (2d10+5) bludgeoning damage + 9 (2d8) necrotic. Target: DC 19 Str save or be pushed up to 15 ft. away from bone lord.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, 15 ft., one target, 16 (2d10+5) bludgeoning damage + 9 (2d8) necrotic. Target: DC 19 Str save or be pushed up to 15 ft. away from bone lord.

76c18ac0-6f89-5bbc-8277-63d7dad30956.name: Turning
76c18ac0-6f89-5bbc-8277-63d7dad30956.description: [+]Defiance[/+] It and any Undead within 60' of it: advantage on saves vs. effects that turn Undead.

Uses Servants of Death.

b67c92fa-1b58-5df0-b910-e249f2895bac.name: Sovereign's Onslaught
b67c92fa-1b58-5df0-b910-e249f2895bac.description: Commands up to four friendly Undead it can see within 60' of it to move. Each target can use its reaction to immediately move up to its speed. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: Commands up to four friendly Undead it can see within 60' of it to move. Each target can use its reaction to immediately move up to its speed. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

32fdfd99-5d4c-5a55-89f8-9a4c8d0db509.name: Sovereign's Reprisal
32fdfd99-5d4c-5a55-89f8-9a4c8d0db509.description: Commands one friendly Undead within 30' to attack. Target can make one weapon attack as reaction.

attributes.description: Commands one friendly Undead within 30' to attack. Target can make one weapon attack as reaction.

51feaed4-fceb-5ac9-aac7-6a3ecffb9808.name: Colony Cluster
51feaed4-fceb-5ac9-aac7-6a3ecffb9808.description: Consists of Huge central spire and 3 Small clusters. Each cluster acts on coral’s turn and shares its move allowing spire and clusters to swim total of 120' on coral’s turn. Cluster can’t move more than 120' from spire. Cluster over 120' away from spire for over 24 hrs enters dormant state becoming new brain coral after 30 days. Brain coral and its clusters share hp and damage dealt to cluster or spire reduces shared total. If more than one section of coral is included in damaging spell or effect (ex: Dragon’s breath weapon or lightning bolt spell) coral makes one save and takes damage as if only one section was affected. When coral takes 15+ damage in one turn cluster is destroyed. At end of its turn if coral took damage on previous turn it can expel one new cluster from spire per 15 damage it took. Can’t have more than 5 clusters active at a time.

e62bcee8-b95e-52de-9cc5-5129ab1a1e5e.name: Speak with Beasts
e62bcee8-b95e-52de-9cc5-5129ab1a1e5e.description: Can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

bb2d182d-a1d7-5142-96e9-413f5932dd18.name: Mounted Warrior
bb2d182d-a1d7-5142-96e9-413f5932dd18.description: While mounted the brownie’s mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

attributes.description: While mounted the brownie’s mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

bb2ec6b9-bf48-530e-bc34-19425cba5148.name: Pack Tactics
bb2ec6b9-bf48-530e-bc34-19425cba5148.description: Advantage on attacks vs. creature if 1+ unincapacitated attacker ally is within 5 ft. of target.

attributes.description: Advantage on attacks vs. creature if 1+ unincapacitated attacker ally is within 5 ft. of target.

b96d9a3f-e9c0-5ee6-88a7-81d4cddb7bf1.name: Snow Stride
b96d9a3f-e9c0-5ee6-88a7-81d4cddb7bf1.description: A brumalek can burrow through nonmagical snow and earth. While doing so it doesn’t disturb the material it moves through. In addition difficult terrain composed of snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

339c3692-c5f2-5424-97b1-965d394c6f8b.name: Skittish
339c3692-c5f2-5424-97b1-965d394c6f8b.description: Can take the Dash or Disengage action.

attributes.description: Can take the Dash or Disengage action.

802bc8ea-af41-5e92-ad38-1f72a200c9e0.name: Firesight
802bc8ea-af41-5e92-ad38-1f72a200c9e0.description: Can see through areas obscured by fire smoke and fog with o penalty.

attributes.description: Can see through areas obscured by fire smoke and fog with o penalty.

87d83cf4-3f7d-567e-8fbd-6bf2476c6c56.name: Flyby (Caldera Kite)
87d83cf4-3f7d-567e-8fbd-6bf2476c6c56.description: Doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

attributes.description: Doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

8323f52f-938e-5798-8aa1-ea17e92cd92b.name: Sulfuric Haze
8323f52f-938e-5798-8aa1-ea17e92cd92b.description: A glittering haze emanates from it within 10 ft. of it. Haze moves with kite lightly obscuring area. If dispersed by a wind of moderate or greater speed (10+ miles per hr) haze reappears at start of kite’s next turn. When a creature enters haze’s area for first time on a turn or starts its turn there that creature: 7 (2d6) poison and is poisoned until end of its next turn (DC 14 Con half damage and isn’t poisoned). If a creature’s save is successful it is immune to Sulphuric Haze of all caldera kites for 1 min.

1436016b-3cea-5788-b9ff-7a7681983388.name: Hold Breath (Capybear)
1436016b-3cea-5788-b9ff-7a7681983388.description: Can hold its breath for 30 min.

attributes.description: Can hold its breath for 30 min.

a3f096c9-fba5-5c7e-90ce-fd29ed41ad77.name: Pounce (Capybear)
a3f096c9-fba5-5c7e-90ce-fd29ed41ad77.description: If the capybear moves at least 20' straight toward a creature and then hits it with Slam attack on the same turn that target must make DC 13 Str save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone the capybear can make one Bite attack vs. it as a bonus action.

73c61989-4069-5cc2-b192-6a69604f2b72.name: Swamp Camouflage (Capybear)
73c61989-4069-5cc2-b192-6a69604f2b72.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in swamps or muddy terrain.

attributes.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in swamps or muddy terrain.

24e52393-3d4d-560a-9be1-ece442034a36.name: Protect the Community
24e52393-3d4d-560a-9be1-ece442034a36.description: When another capybear within 5 ft. of this capybear is hit by an attack this capybear can leap in the way becoming the new target of the attack.

attributes.description: When another capybear within 5 ft. of this capybear is hit by an attack this capybear can leap in the way becoming the new target of the attack.

8352905d-a956-523e-b12a-48a0164d6d95.name: Calming Presence
8352905d-a956-523e-b12a-48a0164d6d95.description: A creature that enters a space within 5 ft. of weevil or that starts its turn there: DC 13 Cha save or be indifferent to all creatures that it is hostile toward while it remains within 60' of weevil. This indifference ends if the creature is attacked or harmed by a spell or if it witnesses any of its allies being harmed.

This indifference ends if the creature is attacked or harmed by a spell or if it witnesses any of its allies being harmed.

10ed7486-91b6-5f89-8004-9d40cfb4c7c6.name: Diligent Preservation
10ed7486-91b6-5f89-8004-9d40cfb4c7c6.description: A creature that isn’t a Construct or Undead and that starts its turn with 0 hp within 60' of weevil becomes stable. In addition any corpse within 60' of weevil is protected from decay and can’t become Undead while it remains within 60' of weevil and for 24 hrs after it leaves the area.

In addition any corpse within 60' of weevil is protected from decay and can’t become Undead while it remains within 60' of weevil and for 24 hrs after it leaves the area.

942ca88b-a667-5ba4-8824-cf9e4071322b.name: Well-Grounded
942ca88b-a667-5ba4-8824-cf9e4071322b.description: Has advantage on ability checks and saves made vs. effects that would knock it prone.

attributes.description: Has advantage on ability checks and saves made vs. effects that would knock it prone.

ee0b5594-5347-5dd5-81f4-bb4e332b0921.name: Control Earth
ee0b5594-5347-5dd5-81f4-bb4e332b0921.description: Molds the ground near it causing one of: Stone Wall Causes wall of rock to rise from ground at a point it can see within 30' of it. Wall is up to 30' long 5 ft. high and 5 ft. thick. It can be any shape as long as its base is connected to the ground. If wall cuts through creature's space when it appears creature is pushed to one side (catamount's choice). If creature would be surrounded on all sides by the wall it can make a DC 14 Dex save. On success it can use its reaction to move up to its speed so it is not enclosed by the wall. Wall lasts 1 min or until catamount creates new wall.Fissure Catamount causes a rift to form in the ground at a point it can see within 30' of it. Rift can be up to 15 ft. wide up to 30' long and up to 10 ft. deep and can be any shape. Each creature standing on a spot where fissure opens must make DC 14 Dex save or fall in. Creature that successfully saves moves with fissure's edge as it opens. Fissure that opens beneath a structure causes it to automatically collapse as if structure was in the area of an earthquake spell. It can have only one fissure open at a time. If it opens another previous fissure closes shunting all creatures inside it to surface.Tremors Catamount causes earth beneath its feet to shake and shift. Each creature within 30' of it: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone (DC 14 Str negates both).

2831a8bd-92a0-5d14-b145-eae6424cddb3.description: When a creature catonoctrix can see is stunned by Mind Ravage catonoctrix learns one secret the creature knows.

0df128ea-20b0-52f4-964d-eab35c5e5f97.name: Precognitive Dodge
0df128ea-20b0-52f4-964d-eab35c5e5f97.description: Adds 4 to its AC vs. one attack that would hit it. To do so it must see the attacker and be within 30' of it.

attributes.description: Adds 4 to its AC vs. one attack that would hit it. To do so it must see the attacker and be within 30' of it.

a64a1b58-a2b1-5deb-ab1f-fe794a6d7fc1.name: Rubbery Flesh
a64a1b58-a2b1-5deb-ab1f-fe794a6d7fc1.description: Immune to any form-altering spell/effect and has advantage on ability checks and saves to escape grapple. Can move through a space as narrow as 1ft. wide with o squeezing.

34adfbb7-3a04-5d6e-b9e3-f8ea2790a71c.name: Standing Leap (Ball Form Only)
34adfbb7-3a04-5d6e-b9e3-f8ea2790a71c.description: Its long jump is up to 60' and its high jump is up to 30 feet with or with o a running start.

attributes.description: Its long jump is up to 60' and its high jump is up to 30 feet with or with o a running start.

cbc8be56-a2f2-5c6f-bed5-dd71345ce471.name: Change Form
cbc8be56-a2f2-5c6f-bed5-dd71345ce471.description: Can extend its body roll up into a ball or return to true form. Each time it extends its body its reach with slam increases by 5 feet max 15 feet and Armor Class decreases by 1.

attributes.description: Can extend its body roll up into a ball or return to true form. Each time it extends its body its reach with slam increases by 5 feet max 15 feet and Armor Class decreases by 1.

4797812c-ca37-535e-b8ca-8cb6e6578726.name: Adhesive (Object or Terrain Form)
4797812c-ca37-535e-b8ca-8cb6e6578726.description: Adheres to anything that touches it. Creature adhered is also grappled (escape DC 15). Ability checks to escape: disadvantage. It can choose for creature to not be affected.

attributes.description: Adheres to anything that touches it. Creature adhered is also grappled (escape DC 15). Ability checks to escape: disadvantage. It can choose for creature to not be affected.

2e868425-4120-5cb7-afde-0772ef55d28a.name: False Appearance (Object or Terrain Form)
2e868425-4120-5cb7-afde-0772ef55d28a.description: While motionless it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object or terrain feature.

attributes.description: While motionless it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object or terrain feature.

494c6ec7-4e98-518b-91a7-dff543d28b3f.name: Grappler
494c6ec7-4e98-518b-91a7-dff543d28b3f.description: Advantage on attack rolls vs. any creature grappled by it.

attributes.description: Advantage on attack rolls vs. any creature grappled by it.

c519ea44-aa6a-5567-bcc6-1db9923b8a85.name: Object Mimicry (Object or Terrain Form)
c519ea44-aa6a-5567-bcc6-1db9923b8a85.description: Shape minor pseudopods into Med or smaller objects. Creature that sees one can tell it is an imitation with DC 15 Wis (Insight) check. Creature with half its body in contact with object (ex: sitting on “chair”) is subject to Adhesive.

attributes.description: Shape minor pseudopods into Med or smaller objects. Creature that sees one can tell it is an imitation with DC 15 Wis (Insight) check. Creature with half its body in contact with object (ex: sitting on “chair”) is subject to Adhesive.
Occupy another’s space vice versa.

3801cb9d-8b4c-537f-b56b-531349c50c4d.name: Tunneler
3801cb9d-8b4c-537f-b56b-531349c50c4d.description: Can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 15-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: Can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 15-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

6353e802-154d-5ffa-8929-593143ab2b98.name: Change Shape (Cave Mimic)
6353e802-154d-5ffa-8929-593143ab2b98.description: Into Gargantuan object or stretches out as terrain up to 35 ft. cube or back to true amorphous form. Stats same. Items worn/carried not transformed. Reverts on death.

attributes.description: Into Gargantuan object or stretches out as terrain up to 35 ft. cube or back to true amorphous form. Stats same. Items worn/carried not transformed. Reverts on death.

5f1b8ae4-6c1f-58ac-a3bd-1e681493aa03.name: Deathlights
5f1b8ae4-6c1f-58ac-a3bd-1e681493aa03.description: When a creature that can see sovereigh's glowing antennae starts its turn within 30' of it sovereign can force it to make a DC 18 Wis save if sovereign isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. If save fails by 5+ creature is stunned until the start of its next turn. Otherwise creature that fails is incapacitated and its speed is reduced to 0 until start of its next turn as it remains transfixed in place by the lights. Unless surprised creature can avert its eyes to avoid the save at start of its turn. If creature does so it can’t see sovereign until start of its next turn when it can avert again. If creature looks at sovereign in the meantime it must immediately save.

fc4ddaa5-19e7-576c-807d-809e0d145483.name: Illumination
fc4ddaa5-19e7-576c-807d-809e0d145483.description: Its antennae shed dim light in a 5 ft. radius. Radius increases to 20' while at least one creature is incapacitated or stunned by Deathlights. At start of its turn if no creatures are incapacitated or stunned by Deathlights sovereign can suppress this light until start of its next turn.

5245374c-0d21-5a4d-834d-9645e79e9966.name: Inscrutable
5245374c-0d21-5a4d-834d-9645e79e9966.description: Immune to any effect to sense its emotions or read its thoughts as well as any divination spell it refuses. Wis (Insight) checks made to ascertain sovereign's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

attributes.description: Immune to any effect to sense its emotions or read its thoughts as well as any divination spell it refuses. Wis (Insight) checks made to ascertain sovereign's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

2d5d5acb-1fff-5237-b78d-e4bf9629474f.name: Sinuous Form
2d5d5acb-1fff-5237-b78d-e4bf9629474f.description: Provided there is suitable room to accommodate its bulk can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Small creature.

attributes.description: Provided there is suitable room to accommodate its bulk can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Small creature.

ef62dd20-a193-5777-bfb6-933e215ef67f.name: Move (Cave Sovereign)
ef62dd20-a193-5777-bfb6-933e215ef67f.description: The cave sovereign moves up to its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: The cave sovereign moves up to its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.
Makes one Tail attack.

cec6ac12-1d95-5ace-bdcb-abc9d0442816.name: Telekinetic Reel
cec6ac12-1d95-5ace-bdcb-abc9d0442816.description: Magically pulls incapacitated or stunned creature by its Deathlights it can see up to 20' straight toward it.

attributes.description: Magically pulls incapacitated or stunned creature by its Deathlights it can see up to 20' straight toward it.

0e1f70c2-2993-594c-b549-2efd1328800a.name: Pandemonium Fruit
0e1f70c2-2993-594c-b549-2efd1328800a.description: Produces pitcher-shaped magical fruit. When creature picks fruit is subjected to Wondrous Cornucopia. Fruit withers 24 hrs after picking losing all magic. If creature expends spell slot of 3rd+ level or volunteers 2 Hit Dice of life (rolling them losing hp equal to result) while picking choose effect instead of random.

7acfdf68-bee5-5dc3-91d4-4ee9dfb2b9df.name: Wondrous Cornucopia
7acfdf68-bee5-5dc3-91d4-4ee9dfb2b9df.description: A creature that picks a creeper’s fruit or is struck by Fruit Bomb triggers the fruit's chaotic magic. Roll d8: Butterfly Cloud Fuit explodes into a cloud of butterflies swirling out in 30' radius from fruit for 1 min making area heavily obscured.Restoration Creature eating the fruit ends one condition disease or reduction to one ability score or reduces exhaustion level by one.Poison Gas Fruit bursts into 20' radius red gas cloud centered on fruit. Area heavily obscured and lasts 1 min or until dispersed by strong wind. When creature enters cloud for first time on a turn or starts its turn there creature: 22 (5d8) poison (DC 16 Con half).Healing Creature eating fruit regains 22 (5d8) hp.Swarming Insects Fruit bursts releasing 2d4 swarms of insects.Protection Creature eating the fruit gains resistance to acid cold fire lightning poison or thunder (determined randomly) for 8 hrs.Squirrel Transformation Eaten: become squirrel 10 min (DC 16 Con).Cleansing All curses/diseases afflicting creature end when eaten.

92724f98-22ce-561d-ba72-bbbcf2212a1f.name: Aura of Chaos
92724f98-22ce-561d-ba72-bbbcf2212a1f.description: When a creature with Int of 4 or higher starts its turn within 30' of raptor creature must make a DC 18 Cha save. Fail: creature can’t take reactions until start of its next turn and must roll a d8 to determine what it does during that turn. On 1-4 creature does nothing. On 5-6 creature takes no action but uses all its movement to move in a random direction. On 7-8 creature makes one melee attack vs. randomly determined creature within its reach or it does nothing if no creature is within its reach. At start of raptor’s turn it chooses whether this aura is active.

a539fcee-6166-5e5a-8a4f-935cd38a431f.name: Earth Glide
a539fcee-6166-5e5a-8a4f-935cd38a431f.description: Can burrow through nonmagical unworked earth/stone with o disturbing material it moves through.

attributes.description: Can burrow through nonmagical unworked earth/stone with o disturbing material it moves through.

ae2841fc-ebca-565b-a74a-6350a27be819.name: Regeneration (Chaos Raptor)
ae2841fc-ebca-565b-a74a-6350a27be819.description: Raptor regains 20 hp at start of its turn if at least half of its body is submerged in earth or stone. If raptor takes thunder this trait doesn’t function at start of raptor’s next turn. Raptor dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

1c43729d-467c-5beb-a9cf-a7b494b60ef7.name: Inner Light
1c43729d-467c-5beb-a9cf-a7b494b60ef7.description: Its open mouth emits a red light shedding bright light in 10 ft. radius and dim light additional 10 feet. Opening or closing its mouth doesn’t require an action.

f399b0d2-e3ed-5133-ba76-33263627f044.name: Change Shape (Chemosit)
f399b0d2-e3ed-5133-ba76-33263627f044.description: Magically transforms into a Small or Med Humanoid or back into its true Fiendish form. Its stats other than size are the same in each form. No matter the form chemosit always has only one leg. Its crutch adjusts to fit its new form but no other equipment transforms. Reverts on death. Crutch becomes nonmagical.

b19acf8f-3594-5901-a2c9-0f2fd34eb2aa.name: Regal Bearing
b19acf8f-3594-5901-a2c9-0f2fd34eb2aa.description: The chimera’s AC includes its Cha modifier.

9ace586b-0056-5d23-8cc9-67e48686494f.name: Prideful Prowl
9ace586b-0056-5d23-8cc9-67e48686494f.description: Moves up to its walking speed or flies up to half its flying speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

37eaab23-9713-5faa-a088-b49f85454d20.description: Lion head's bellow spurs allies. Each friendly creature including chimera within 30' of it that can hear roar gains 11 (2d10) temp hp and can't be frightened for 1 min.

9992e8db-0def-5e20-934c-4decde2909f7.name: Mirror Scales
9992e8db-0def-5e20-934c-4decde2909f7.description: While the chroma lizard is in bright light creatures that rely on sight have disadvantage on attack rolls vs. the lizard.

16523103-b031-5a2f-9865-7d20962d3ea5.name: Mirror Shy
16523103-b031-5a2f-9865-7d20962d3ea5.description: If the chroma lizard sees itself reflected in a polished surface within 30' of it and in an area of bright light the lizard immediately closes its eyes and is blinded until the start of its next turn when it can check for the reflection again.

e2388b4e-de20-52b2-8d67-5bead65beccb.name: Radiant Reflection
e2388b4e-de20-52b2-8d67-5bead65beccb.description: When a creature deals radiant to the chroma lizard half the radiant the lizard took is reflected back at that creature.

9462dc1e-e444-5078-a3ec-12a263c3f54f.name: Digestive Dew
9462dc1e-e444-5078-a3ec-12a263c3f54f.description: A creature that starts its turned grappled by the climbing vine takes 2 (1d4) acid.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turned grappled by the climbing vine takes 2 (1d4) acid.

b3638625-a970-54f2-b786-3bae6724113e.name: Flexible Form
b3638625-a970-54f2-b786-3bae6724113e.description: A climbing vine can move through a space as narrow as 6 inches wide with o squeezing.

0b47f1fa-440d-5f9a-903f-69e471c37fd9.description: When a creature hits the climbing vine with melee attack while within 5 ft. of the vine the vine can make one Dewvine attack vs. it.

attributes.description: When a creature hits the climbing vine with melee attack while within 5 ft. of the vine the vine can make one Dewvine attack vs. it.
Advantage on initiative rolls.

046daff1-869e-5f45-86dd-4f24e8470d3c.name: Metronomic Aura
046daff1-869e-5f45-86dd-4f24e8470d3c.description: When a friendly creature within 20' of conductor makes an attack or Cha (Performance) check creature can treat d20 roll as a 10 instead of die’s actual roll.

3fbbceef-7fd1-58d4-8315-56232bc56ae7.description: Inspires itself or one friendly creature it can see within 30' of it until start of conductor's next turn. When target makes an attack roll or a Con save to maintain concentration on a spell target can roll d4 and add result to attack or save.

65946029-ba6e-5053-baa0-83cc305cf45f.description: A clockwork pugilist doesn’t require air food drink or sleep.
