7ce3ea0e-d1e8-5fc2-89be-414e3842f18d.description: When a creature within 5 ft. of the pugilist is targeted by a ranged attack or spell the pugilist steps in the way and the ranged attack or spell targets the pugilist instead.

0a4035b2-4258-54e7-94c5-b8b38a64e30c.description: +2 to its AC vs. one melee attack that would hit it. Must see attacker and have at least one hand empty.

1e8d6f32-5ac0-50db-a3ba-e8406adce8fe.name: Gas Nozzles
1e8d6f32-5ac0-50db-a3ba-e8406adce8fe.description: When it takes damage all within 5 feet: 5 (1d10) poison. If damage taken was fire gas ignites deals + 5 (1d10) fire.

eb772e1c-7bb9-520f-8e35-0cd33331ee43.description: Issues commands to up to 3 friendly creatures it can see within 60' of it. Each target has advantage on its next ability check or attack roll provided it can hear and understand tactician.

daef49af-c056-5e06-81c1-bd530cd2bfbe.name: Press the Attack
daef49af-c056-5e06-81c1-bd530cd2bfbe.description: If the clockwork tactician hits one target with two Multiweapon attacks or scores a critical hit with its multiweapon it can make one additional Multiweapon attack.

attributes.description: If the clockwork tactician hits one target with two Multiweapon attacks or scores a critical hit with its multiweapon it can make one additional Multiweapon attack.

85b09a79-ee0d-549f-a563-47056f51264e.name: Quick Study
85b09a79-ee0d-549f-a563-47056f51264e.description: When a creature hits tactician with attack tactician makes DC 13 Int check. Success: it chooses one of:Tactician has advantage on melee attack rolls vs. the attacker.Attacker has disadvantage on attack rolls vs. the tactician.Tactician has resistance to damage type of attack that hit it.Can have more than one benefit active at a time. They end when it attacks a different creature or uses Quick Study on another.

eb78074a-eb8b-594b-89d1-08fcdebf3e5a.name: Shoving Charge
eb78074a-eb8b-594b-89d1-08fcdebf3e5a.description: If it moves at least 20' straight toward a target and then hits it with Headbutt attack on the same turn that target must make DC 13 Str save or be pushed up to 10 ft. away from the cloudhoof. If a creature fails this save by 5 or more it is pushed up to 15 ft..

e6bba491-2454-5ae6-a031-2412ef947c71.description: Has advantage on Str and Dex checks and saves made vs. effects that would knock it prone. In addition it has advantage on Str (Athletics) checks to climb rocky surfaces and Dex (Acrobatics) checks to maintain its balance on rocky surfaces.

9049df50-e688-59c1-a3ed-07c73e9eff54.name: Glowing Organs
9049df50-e688-59c1-a3ed-07c73e9eff54.description: While underwater its internal organs glow an eerie pale blue shedding dim light in a 10 ft. radius.

c92568aa-b4cf-5cbd-9fa8-86f4acb8d6d8.description: While out of water can hold its breath for 30 min.

attributes.description: While out of water can hold its breath for 30 min.

8f1e9a1a-e9f6-5ada-b601-1e5a2c06965a.name: Death Trap
8f1e9a1a-e9f6-5ada-b601-1e5a2c06965a.description: When it dies its mandibles remain locked in place continuing to grapple beyond its death. Until grapple ends creature takes 4 (1d8) piercing damage at start of each of its turns as if the bug was still alive. Any creature can take an action to remove mandibles with successful DC 11 Str (Athletics) or Wis (Medicine) check.

f278ab08-9bf2-5a86-a7ee-722994a97dff.description: Can breathe air and water but it needs to be submerged at least once every 4 hrs to avoid suffocating.

e1fe8086-d572-5d03-ad8e-dba7c27111ca.name: Vicious Wound

67180a27-b278-537a-a538-6bd361baa830.name: Stretch Body
67180a27-b278-537a-a538-6bd361baa830.description: Stretches its body across surface of a Gargantuan or smaller object or across surface of a wall pillar or similar structure no larger than a 20' square within 5 ft. of it sharing the space of the object or structure. Slime can end the stretch as a bonus action occupying nearest unoccupied space to the object or structure.

3488166f-631e-5e26-9663-449c48afa26b.name: Downdraft
3488166f-631e-5e26-9663-449c48afa26b.description: While it is flying area within 10 ft. of it is difficult terrain.

955c64d3-745d-5d2c-858a-ce39d4ca8ac4.description: The moth casts light from its abdomen shedding bright light in a 20' radius and dim light for an additional 20'.

3d8ff568-ab4f-5c90-a9e4-f859bac171be.name: Extradimensional Bag
3d8ff568-ab4f-5c90-a9e4-f859bac171be.description: Uses an extra-dimensional space such as a bag of holding as its “shell.” Bag can hold creatures in addition to the crab based on extradimensional space's size. Breathing creatures inside bag can survive up to a number of min equal to 10 divided by the number of creatures (minimum 1 min) after which time they begin to suffocate. If bag is overloaded pierced or torn it ruptures and is destroyed. While this would normally cause the contents to be lost in the Astral Plane crab’s half-in half-out existence kept the bag constantly open even when it fully withdrew altering the bag which simply spills out its contents into area when the bag is destroyed or crab dies. Bag becomes a standard bag of holding or similar magic item with extradimensional space 24 hrs after crab dies.

Adopts an offensive stance gaining advantage on the first Crustaceous Sword attack it makes each turn.

When a creature enters aura’s area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there that creature: DC 13 Cha save. Fail: any spell cast by creature can’t affect allies or friendly creatures including spells already in effect such as bless while it remains in the aura. In addition creature can’t use Help action or accept assistance from a friendly creature including assistance from spells such as bless or cure wounds while it remains in aura.

This works like the changing weather conditions aspect of the control weather spell except devil can’t change temperature and conditions change immediately.

6f020daa-32e1-5950-9980-d4703d3f9867.description: The moldering devil can fly up to 40' on its turn but it must start and end its movement on a solid surface such as a roof or the ground. If it is flying at the end of its turn it falls to the ground and takes falling damage.

If a creature consumes such food or drink it must make a DC 11 Con save. On a failure it takes 7 (2d6) poison and is poisoned for 24 hrs. On a success it takes half the damage and is poisoned for 1 hr.

Wind is nonmagical and disperses gas or vapor and extinguishes candles torches and similar unprotected flames in the area. At start of each of its turns rimepacted chooses whether this is active. While active rimepacted has disadvantage on Dex (Stealth) checks.

b6ffbe59-57b2-5ffe-9b80-8c7e936334b9.description: If it takes fire it can’t use Yeast Slurry on its next turn. In addition if drake fails a save vs. a spell or magical effect that deals fire it becomes poisoned until end of its next turn.

c6f1b663-58d2-5ea0-9044-ea43f572cd6c.description: Spends 1 min carefully cutting its own flesh inflicting 10 slashing to itself to remove small piece of pulpy material. Pulp is edible and provides Med or smaller creature 1 quart of water and nourishment equivalent to one meal. Pulp provides nourishment only if drake offered it willingly.

5f758f31-e7d8-534e-87d5-58a3d4099e7b.name: Regeneration (Drake, Cactus)
5f758f31-e7d8-534e-87d5-58a3d4099e7b.description: Regains 5 hp at start of its turn. If it takes cold or poison this doesn’t function at start of its next turn. Dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

cc89abae-604a-55e0-a37e-3a5b58a344a1.name: Ethereal Step

A creature not native to Ethereal Plane returns to Material Plane in 1d4 rounds if brought to the plane while grappled by drake.

8ab3b91f-95fd-5379-9870-12f129bd0679.name: Tunneler (Drake, Reef)

0e415557-cd11-5ee6-ae92-a4051fbcc882.name: Reef Stealth

d12108df-1f87-5c1a-a45b-b5e2ef4c1207.description: If it destroys an object or structure it can make a bite attack vs. a creature it can see within 5 ft. of that object or structure.

f45b357b-20c7-5c49-ad84-b58ba34b31a0.name: Echolocation
f45b357b-20c7-5c49-ad84-b58ba34b31a0.description: Can’t use its blindsight while deafened or out of water.

Advantage: Dex (Stealth) underwater.

90d05691-4677-5854-869a-11503fac34c5.name: Manipulate Currents
90d05691-4677-5854-869a-11503fac34c5.description: While underwater changes water flow within 60' of it. Chooses one of below which lasts until start of its next turn.A 20' cube of rushing water forms on a point drake can see in the water. The cube's space is difficult terrain and a creature that starts its turn swimming in the area must make DC 17 Str save or be pushed out of the cube directly away from drake.The current shoots in a 60' long 10 ft. wide line from drake in a direction it chooses. Each creature in area: pushed up to 15 ft. away from drake in a direction following the line (DC 17 Str negates).The drake takes the Dash action.

97294a2c-0a13-5edb-88a9-417f2d7db0ce.description: If flying and moves 20'+ straight toward a creature and then hits it with claw on the same turn target must make DC 13 Str save or be knocked prone. If target is prone drake can make one Bite vs. it as a bonus action.

877a069b-bd61-5659-bba2-a4225ec599a7.name: Gaseous Ascension
877a069b-bd61-5659-bba2-a4225ec599a7.description: Must regularly inhale swamp gases to maintain its flight. If it can’t breathe or isn’t in swampy terrain loses its fly speed. Also when it uses Poisonous Breath it loses its fly speed until Poisonous Breath recharges.

attributes.description: Advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

66852638-ded7-55ef-ad61-85bdc91d4bf7.name: Aching Venom
66852638-ded7-55ef-ad61-85bdc91d4bf7.description: Produces a potent poison that causes its victims to feel pain from even the most benign contact (weight of their clothing simple sword swing etc.). When a creature that succumbs to this poison takes bludgeoning piercing or slashing it must make DC 16 Con save or be incapacitated until end of its next turn as pain fills its body. This potent poison remains within creature’s body until removed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic or until creature finishes a long rest.

d30f225f-3997-5e4d-861f-b96e7cbf1fdd.name: Shifting Camouflage (Drake, Venom)
d30f225f-3997-5e4d-861f-b96e7cbf1fdd.description: Scales adapt to current surroundings. Advantage: Dex (Stealth) to hide in nonmagical natural terrain.

04aa64fa-dc4d-59ee-b78d-88ccd16eba9f.name: Otherworldly Form
04aa64fa-dc4d-59ee-b78d-88ccd16eba9f.description: Its form is tentative in its cohesion as well as its adherence to physical laws. Immune to effects that cause the loss of limbs such as the effects of a sword of sharpness or vorpal sword. Immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form and it can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide with o squeezing.

7f4b5192-3dd8-53c9-a9c5-5096cba950f3.description: If it is being directly observed at the start of its turn it can immediately make a Wis (Perception) check to notice the observer. Once it has noticed the observer it always knows observer’s exact location regardless of cover obscurement or invisibility as long as observer is within 120' of examiner.

316ffc35-15e8-566e-ab5c-c4b0b252d1c3.name: Sense Magic
316ffc35-15e8-566e-ab5c-c4b0b252d1c3.description: The dread examiner senses magic within 120' of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

713c970c-44cd-5180-8a87-5d4445fe1eb5.name: Psychic Surge
713c970c-44cd-5180-8a87-5d4445fe1eb5.description: The dread examiner releases a wave of psychic energy. Each creature within 20' of it: 21 (6d6) psychic can't use reactions and has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn. (DC 20 Wis half damage and ignores the other effects.)

b5c7c954-83f5-5210-b6ec-d8c678a3096f.description: The dread examiner rearranges its disjointed parts and regains 36 (8d8) hp.

a9c7f522-a94e-52a9-a068-0a84ae3124d6.description: Magically teleports along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying up to 120' to an unoccupied spot it sees.

a066a713-4595-583b-a248-e9706c34052e.name: Undead Creator
a066a713-4595-583b-a248-e9706c34052e.description: When a creature dies while trapped inside it’s pitcher pitcher regains 11 (2d10) hp and corpse of creature rises as a zombie. This works like the animate dead spell except zombie stays under pitcher’s control for 1d4 days. At end of this duration or when pitcher is destroyed corpse melts into a puddle of necrotic slime.

0b7c69f5-1628-5756-ae0d-75c85e75c492.name: Memory of Shame
0b7c69f5-1628-5756-ae0d-75c85e75c492.description: When Humanoid that can see dubius starts its turn within 30' of it dubius can force it to make DC 13 Wis save if dubius isn’t incapacitated and can see Humanoid. Fail: Humanoid frightened 1 min. Humanoid can re-save at end of each of its turns with disadvantage if dubius is within line of sight success ends effect on itself. Once saved/effect ends for it immune to dubius’s Memory of Shame next 24 hrs. Unless surprised Humanoid can avert its eyes to avoid save at start of its turn. If it does so it can’t see dubius until start of its next turn when it can avert again. If it looks at dubius in meantime must immediately save. If dubius sees itself reflected on a polished surface within 30' of it and in bright light dubius due to its unique creation is affected by its own Memory of Shame.

21b68225-3ba3-542b-b035-39d80468f3a3.description: When a creature the dubius can see attacks it dubius can force creature to roll d6 subtracting result from attack. If this causes attack to miss attacker is stunned until start of dubius's next turn.

698875f5-cfe6-5cef-b62c-d12e538047a9.description: If a creature dubius can see within 30' of it regains hp dubius regains hp equal to half that amount.

6f07702b-0e13-5b14-9bd7-0aafb18cf29a.name: Death Spores
6f07702b-0e13-5b14-9bd7-0aafb18cf29a.description: Each creature within 20' of it when it dies: 14 (4d6) poison and infected with grazer spores disease (DC 14 Con not poisoned or infected). Creatures immune to poisoned condition are immune to this. Until disease is cured creature poisoned and can’t regain hp except magically. Every 24 hrs that elapse target: DC 14 Con save or take 7 (2d6) poison and its hp max is reduced by same. Reduction lasts until target finishes a long rest after disease is cured. Target dies if this reduces its hp max to 0. Two days after creature dies rises as dust grazer of its size growing to Large over the course of a week.

26b59bf1-e2c1-597e-a083-17c144cab2eb.name: Dwarven Fleet Foot
26b59bf1-e2c1-597e-a083-17c144cab2eb.description: When the firecracker takes fire its speed increases by 10 ft. until the end of its next turn. In addition it can immediately reroll its initiative and choose to change its place in the initiative order in subsequent rounds to the result.

4b13ad1c-6d02-54d9-a65f-b37ca0374225.name: Forest of Pikes
4b13ad1c-6d02-54d9-a65f-b37ca0374225.description: If a pike guard is within 5 ft. of at least one pike guard or pike guard captain it has half cover vs. ranged attacks.

83397540-8c3b-5c82-899c-7ebc24d314f8.description: When a creature enters the pike guard's reach the pike guard can brace its pike. If it does so it has advantage on its next attack roll vs. that creature.

ef200190-4695-5784-af97-59ef01ab9710.name: Forest of Pikes (Dwarf, Pike Guard Captain)
ef200190-4695-5784-af97-59ef01ab9710.description: If within 5 ft. of at least one pike guard or pike guard captain it has half cover vs. ranged attacks.

92355ff2-b2f8-5265-aea9-20b126ce9683.name: Bring It Down
92355ff2-b2f8-5265-aea9-20b126ce9683.description: When a creature within captain's reach takes damage from a pike guard or pike guard captain captain can make one opportunity attack vs. that creature.

05962b96-8d11-55f0-86ff-965cbc786fde.name: Frigid Footprints
05962b96-8d11-55f0-86ff-965cbc786fde.description: The ground within 10 ft. of the permafrost elemental freezes over and is difficult terrain.

attributes.description: The ground within 10 ft. of the permafrost elemental freezes over and is difficult terrain.

16c9dce4-3f76-58fe-bd63-30801d2ebf75.name: Plague Bearer
16c9dce4-3f76-58fe-bd63-30801d2ebf75.description: If it takes 15+ fire on single turn each creature within 10 ft. of it: infected with primordial plague disease (DC 14 Con negates). Alternatively creature becomes infected with sewer plague or cackle fever (elemental’s choice) instead. Primordial plague takes 1 min to manifest in infected creature. After 1 min creature poisoned until disease cured. Every 24 hrs that elapse creature must re-save reducing its hp max by 5 (1d10) on failure. Disease is cured on success. Reduction lasts until disease is cured. Creature dies if disease reduces its hp max to 0.

f61fc9c9-3037-5514-9d87-ee8f91ad14c0.name: Charge (Elemental, Rockslide)
f61fc9c9-3037-5514-9d87-ee8f91ad14c0.description: If it moves 20'+ straight to foe and hits with Slam attack on same turn target takes an extra 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature it must make DC 16 Str save or be knocked prone. If the elemental used Nimble Separation before making this Slam attack the target has disadvantage on the save.

c79763b3-33d5-5a0e-a224-1a8b38d8947b.description: Can briefly separate its components parts and take the Dash action. Opportunity attacks vs. it have disadvantage until start of its next turn.

801cb781-109a-5009-b28d-81b2814c51ab.name: Necrotic Weapons
801cb781-109a-5009-b28d-81b2814c51ab.description: Its weapon attacks are infused with slain foes' essence. Any weapon hit deals + 2d8 necrotic (included below).

71428eb0-8580-55eb-bec4-3a508011e5a2.name: Relentless Hunter
71428eb0-8580-55eb-bec4-3a508011e5a2.description: Advantage on any Wis (Perception) or Wis (Survival) check it makes to find a creature that shadow fey nobility have tasked it with capturing or killing.

39fef42a-b92e-5c79-ba17-60babad41641.description: Commands all severed heads attached to creatures to detach and return to the executioner's belt.

ca87fe3d-49fe-50f4-8b06-e5d8953cec83.name: Shadow Traveler
ca87fe3d-49fe-50f4-8b06-e5d8953cec83.description: In shadows/dim light/darkness disappears into darkness and reappears in unoccupied space it can see within 30'. Smoke tendril appears at origin and destination.

f45fe4f2-3a14-5663-ac8e-5e90eab3e7bf.name: Fiery Nature
f45fe4f2-3a14-5663-ac8e-5e90eab3e7bf.description: Is infused with elemental power and it requires only half the amount of air food and drink that a typical Monstrosity of its size needs.

attributes.description: Is infused with elemental power and it requires only half the amount of air food and drink that a typical Monstrosity of its size needs.

b7ee48c4-8c7d-503f-b243-1187cb715f0b.name: Glide
b7ee48c4-8c7d-503f-b243-1187cb715f0b.description: Has membranes between its fore and hind limbs that expand while falling to slow its rate of descent to 60' per round landing on its feet and taking no falling damage. It can move up to 5 ft. horizontally for every 1' it falls. Can’t gain height with its gliding membranes alone. If subject to a strong wind or lift of any kind can use updraft to glide farther.

85b8a145-d25c-54a9-8692-742935fdc83f.name: Glow (Ember Glider)
85b8a145-d25c-54a9-8692-742935fdc83f.description: Sheds dim light in a 10 ft. radius.

attributes.description: Sheds dim light in a 10 ft. radius.

13862d4a-9ae4-570c-872c-02de28774830.name: Heated Body
13862d4a-9ae4-570c-872c-02de28774830.description: A creature that touches the ember glider or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 4 (1d8) fire.

01aeb1c0-38ea-5790-ad66-d6b2e5deeb63.name: Befouling Aura
01aeb1c0-38ea-5790-ad66-d6b2e5deeb63.description: At each of its turns' start all within 30': disadvantage on next attack/ability check as moisture within it is diseased (DC 18 Con negates). If creature spends 1+ min in equitox’s aura or drinks water within aura: contract gullylung fever disease (below; DC 18 Con negates). Creatures immune to poisoned are immune to this.

b9d03c48-27cd-5adc-bdb6-8ea3f48449d5.name: Gullylung Fever
b9d03c48-27cd-5adc-bdb6-8ea3f48449d5.description: Creature infected with this disease manifests symptoms 1d4 days after infection: difficulty breathing dehydration and water-themed nightmares. Until cured at end of each long rest infected creature must make DC 18 Con save or its Str score is reduced by 1d4. Reduction lasts until creature finishes long rest after disease is cured. If disease reduces creature’s Str to 0 creature dies. A creature that succeeds on two saves recovers from the disease.

8720768f-9328-5620-aad8-723ea1a487de.name: Teleport (Equitox)
8720768f-9328-5620-aad8-723ea1a487de.description: With items it has up to 60' to unoccupied space it can see.

ba778444-1da3-5940-a96a-ed9d8b40c743.name: Withering Gaze
ba778444-1da3-5940-a96a-ed9d8b40c743.description: Locks eyes with one creature within 60' that can see it. Target: DC 18 Wis or stunned by thirst until end of its next turn.

256288f9-2254-5b38-a72d-f04cae67f533.name: Arm Spine Regrowth
256288f9-2254-5b38-a72d-f04cae67f533.description: The erina has twenty-four arm spines that it can use to make Throw Spine attacks. Used spines regrow when it finishes a long rest.

f8b28421-c4e3-56c3-b804-4156fee3ac6f.description: The erina can grapple creatures two sizes larger than itself and can move at its full speed when dragging a creature it has grappled. If it grapples a Small or smaller creature target has disadvantage on its escape attempts. Erina has advantage on ability checks and saves made to escape a grapple or end restrained condition.

9fa460b0-86eb-57be-8d4d-69a33507a687.name: Hardy
9fa460b0-86eb-57be-8d4d-69a33507a687.description: The erina has advantage on saves vs. poison.

1635c277-e9c3-52b6-b66d-5669026f60b6.description: A creature that touches erina or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage. A creature grappled by or grappling erina takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage at start of the erina’s turn.

575bff24-6f2f-5827-86a4-e6120fb17036.name: Bickering Heads
575bff24-6f2f-5827-86a4-e6120fb17036.description: A kobold ettin’s constant bickering can be easily heard and proves a tough habit to disrupt. It has disadvantage on Dex (Stealth) checks to stay silent but it has advantage on Wis (Perception) checks. Has advantage vs. being blinded charmed deafened frightened stunned and knocked unconscious.

52a4c299-fbd3-5311-bcdb-b17e4a4c8070.name: Might of Giants
52a4c299-fbd3-5311-bcdb-b17e4a4c8070.description: Though squat by ettin standards kobold ettins are as much giant as they are kobold. It is a Large Giant for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

d3c59548-671a-55e5-bb9f-f8be79dfae0a.description: Knows scent and appearance of each creature it was created to kill. Advantage on attacks vs. such creatures and on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find and track them.

f6c3b5a0-de9c-5ef3-be8d-6609075044fe.name: Necrotic Weapons (Faux-Garou)
f6c3b5a0-de9c-5ef3-be8d-6609075044fe.description: Weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 3d6 necrotic (included below).

160d6236-5a75-5b92-96ee-c7fc8ceb5384.name: Change Shape (Faux-Garou)
160d6236-5a75-5b92-96ee-c7fc8ceb5384.description: Transforms into Large or smaller Beast matching type of lycanthrope it resembles (wolf if it resembles a werewolf etc.) or back into its true form. Its stats other than size and speed are same in each form. While transformed retains constructed appearance and claws at end of its forelimbs. Items worn or carried not transformed. Reverts to true form if it dies.

c76aad90-363c-5969-a67d-aed9215cd569.name: Frozen Citizenry (1/Day)
c76aad90-363c-5969-a67d-aed9215cd569.description: Magically calls 2d4 skeletons or zombies (regent’s choice) or two glacial corruptors (see Tome of Beasts 2). Called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds acting as allies of the regent and obeying its spoken commands. The Undead remain for 1 hr until regent dies or until regent dismisses them as a bonus action.

026a32b9-0536-5626-8e03-da22e92a651d.name: Frozen Reign
026a32b9-0536-5626-8e03-da22e92a651d.description: When a friendly Undead within 30' of regent hits with any weapon weapon deals an extra 4 (1d8) cold.

attributes.description: When a friendly Undead within 30' of regent hits with any weapon weapon deals an extra 4 (1d8) cold.

1900f75f-a21d-573e-9907-b8b546f0ba5a.name: Glacier Imprisonment (Recharge 6)
1900f75f-a21d-573e-9907-b8b546f0ba5a.description: One creature regent can see within 60' of it: DC 16 Con save. If save fails by 5+ creature is instantly petrified in magical ice block. Otherwise creature that fails save begins to freeze and is restrained. Restrained creature must re-save at end of its next turn becoming petrified in magical ice block on a failure or ending effect on a success. Petrification lasts until creature is freed by greater restoration spell or other magic. Or the ice block can be attacked and destroyed (AC 15; hp 30; vulnerability to fire; immunity to poison and psychic) freeing the creature. When ice block takes damage that isn’t fire petrified creature takes half the damage dealt to the ice block.

94d5e2c9-be4a-5f89-abac-40cdbf7fd98a.description: [+]Defiance[/+] It and any Undead within 30' of it: advantage on saves vs. turn undead.

attributes.description: [+]Defiance[/+] It and any Undead within 30' of it: advantage on saves vs. turn undead.

77f92e48-9d61-55ad-8837-71dd74d4bf98.name: Army of the Damned
77f92e48-9d61-55ad-8837-71dd74d4bf98.description: Raises an arm into the air sending out a chill wind that empowers Undead allies. Each friendly Undead within 30' of it gains 10 temp hp.

attributes.description: Raises an arm into the air sending out a chill wind that empowers Undead allies. Each friendly Undead within 30' of it gains 10 temp hp.

e669e661-6cd3-5a33-a336-594d1522c559.name: Frozen Rune Maul
e669e661-6cd3-5a33-a336-594d1522c559.description: Makes one Frozen Rune Maul attack.

attributes.description: Makes one Frozen Rune Maul attack.

3c7dc48c-ec62-5fa6-8c92-542ba0496c58.name: Teleport (Forgotten Regent)
3c7dc48c-ec62-5fa6-8c92-542ba0496c58.description: Magically teleports along with any items worn or carried up to 120' to an unoccupied spot it sees.

attributes.description: Magically teleports along with any items worn or carried up to 120' to an unoccupied spot it sees.

7dadd98b-8b19-5bd7-91ce-8b6decb642ec.name: Chilling Presence
7dadd98b-8b19-5bd7-91ce-8b6decb642ec.description: At the start of each of its turns each creature within 15 ft. of it: 5 (2d4) cold (DC 16 Con negates). For each min a creature spends within 15 ft. of it: suffer one level of exhaustion from cold exposure (DC 16 Con negates). Unprotected nonmagical flames within 15 ft. of it are extinguished. Any spells of 3rd level or lower that provide resistance to cold and that are within 15 ft. of it immediately end. Water freezes if it remains within 15 ft. of it for at least 1 min.

70165789-0629-562c-a67b-d70803f4c3ec.description: Move across and climb icy surfaces with o ability check. Difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra move.

a8d2050b-0267-5700-9568-cfad030f75b5.description: When it takes fire it gains resistance to fire including triggering attack until end of its next turn.

attributes.description: When it takes fire it gains resistance to fire including triggering attack until end of its next turn.

d51ac6bd-4e8c-5c80-8240-ff3d62f2d562.name: Light Absorption
d51ac6bd-4e8c-5c80-8240-ff3d62f2d562.description: Light within 60' of the duskwilt is reduced. Bright light in the area becomes dim light and dim light in the area becomes darkness.

feaffd54-2f60-5760-92b2-3cd0455a7749.name: Central Stalk Weakness
feaffd54-2f60-5760-92b2-3cd0455a7749.description: When exposed central stalk can be attacked and destroyed (AC 13; hp 50; vulnerability to acid cold and fire). If central stalk is destroyed mulcher has disadvantage on attacks and can’t use Expose Stalk until it regrows one at end of next long rest.

869d5f01-10a1-5d17-9698-689dfa96534c.name: Mulcher Pit
869d5f01-10a1-5d17-9698-689dfa96534c.description: If it burrows 20'+ straight toward a creature can dig 10 ft. diameter 20' deep pit beneath it. Each Large or smaller creature in pit’s area: fall into mycelium-lined pit and land prone taking 14 (4d6) piercing damage from spiked mycelium + fall damage (DC 15 Dex doesn't fall). Can make one Mycelium Spike vs. prone creature in pit as bonus action.

117e220e-91e8-59fb-92af-3ec3a5f52e68.description: Gains 15 hp at start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

92792997-5ec8-56e9-8a75-85163b5e1e12.description: When reduced below half hp max or creature scores critical hit vs. it immediately uses Expose Stalk.

8854cf87-b4e5-52ed-a78b-9b717e057b2e.description: Exposes central stalk above ground until end of its next turn or until it ends effect as bonus action. If exposed can't burrow.

5785e513-e80d-5983-88fb-1b9d3bb466f3.name: Partial Echolocation
5785e513-e80d-5983-88fb-1b9d3bb466f3.description: Its blindsight is reduced to 10 ft. while deafened.

8f42f41b-c3ca-5a00-aecb-b895e8c34cdc.description: Pulls on the mycelial threads connecting it to its harpoon returning the harpoon to its empty hand. If harpoon is stuck in a creature that creature must make DC 13 Str save or be pulled up to 15 ft. toward marcher.

eaa2d8b2-843c-59b2-bddc-3e56af0e5bfc.name: False Appearance (Fungi, Void Fungus)
eaa2d8b2-843c-59b2-bddc-3e56af0e5bfc.description: While motionless indistinguishable from patch of glowing fungus.

d722a079-25e3-58b6-b84a-51d4e8a654b2.name: Multiple Heads
d722a079-25e3-58b6-b84a-51d4e8a654b2.description: Has three heads. While it has more than one head it has advantage on saves vs. being blinded charmed deafened frightened stunned and knocked unconscious. Whenever it takes 25 or more damage in a single turn one head dies. If all its heads die it dies. At the end of its turn it grows two heads for each head that died since its last turn unless it has taken fire since its last turn. Regains 10 hp for each head regrown in this way.

13443ccf-1df2-52f6-a225-b479ea6f78dd.name: Trampling Charge (Garmvvolf)
13443ccf-1df2-52f6-a225-b479ea6f78dd.description: If it moves 20'+ straight toward creature and then hits it with Bite on same turn target must make a DC 16 Str save or be knocked prone. If target is prone garmvvolf can make one Bite vs. it as a bonus action.

6262f31c-d307-5bcf-b9c3-44ea6cdfb7ff.name: Wakeful
6262f31c-d307-5bcf-b9c3-44ea6cdfb7ff.description: While it sleeps at least one of its heads is awake.

3e030978-b26b-5c25-ac09-cfab7bca7f4d.name: Clanging Mass
3e030978-b26b-5c25-ac09-cfab7bca7f4d.description: Is filled with metal objects that clang scrape and clink together as it moves. When it moves it has disadvantage on Dex (Stealth) checks to stay silent until start of its next turn.

81a925c9-e08a-55a5-a7b1-44eb614ba889.name: Rust Metal
81a925c9-e08a-55a5-a7b1-44eb614ba889.description: Any nonmagic metal weapon that hits gearmass corrodes. After dealing damage weapon: permanent cumulative –1 penalty to damage. If penalty drops to –5 destroyed. Nonmagic metal ammo that hits gearmass destroyed after dealing damage.

9b26c1ed-0b02-5825-8c84-646f8bbffc96.name: Charge (Ghost Knight Templar)
9b26c1ed-0b02-5825-8c84-646f8bbffc96.description: If mounted and it moves 20'+ straight to foe and hits with shadow blade on same turn target takes an extra 10 (3d6) slashing damage.

2b760a48-1c53-5184-9ea6-6397477ca8dd.name: Turning Defiance
2b760a48-1c53-5184-9ea6-6397477ca8dd.description: It and all ghouls within 30' of it: advantage on saves vs. turn undead.

attributes.description: It and all ghouls within 30' of it: advantage on saves vs. turn undead.

fee88378-004a-5b9f-a598-1a89686c81be.name: Ghostly Mount
fee88378-004a-5b9f-a598-1a89686c81be.description: Can summon or dismiss a ghostly mount mounting or dismounting it as part of this bonus action with o spending movement. Mount uses the stats of a warhorse skeleton except it has the Incorporeal Movement trait a flying speed of 60 feet 40 hp and resistance to cold and necrotic and B/P/S damage from nonmagical attacks. If mount is slain it disappears leaving behind no physical form and templar must wait 1 hr before summoning it again.

91a23871-177b-5327-bf67-ef7114ccd770.name: Blood Sense (Giant Flea)
91a23871-177b-5327-bf67-ef7114ccd770.description: Can pinpoint by scent the location of creatures that have blood within 60' of it.

attributes.description: Can pinpoint by scent the location of creatures that have blood within 60' of it.

cc956aee-56e0-5493-ac32-8026ad2640ff.description: Its long jump is up to 30' and its high jump is up to 15 feet with or with o a running start.

55e82192-963f-5d9e-ac4f-0ae7bbe0f091.description: The giant flea can pinpoint by scent the location of creatures that have blood within 60' of it.

b0fc553a-7a61-5d08-ab5a-655a1ba24865.description: When a creature that doesn’t have all of its hp starts its turn in the swarm’s space that creature must make DC 12 Dex save or lose 5 (2d4) hp from blood loss.

attributes.description: When a creature that doesn’t have all of its hp starts its turn in the swarm’s space that creature must make DC 12 Dex save or lose 5 (2d4) hp from blood loss.

9689a068-0abb-597b-b8f8-150c47037aa8.description: The swarm’s long jump is up to 30' and its high jump is up to 15 feet with or with o a running start.

57061153-84cf-5802-b01e-d2ebbd643569.name: Swarm (Giant Flea Swarm)
57061153-84cf-5802-b01e-d2ebbd643569.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny flea. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temp hp.

b3f54799-ae1f-540f-b4b7-018b6b598507.name: Death Malison
b3f54799-ae1f-540f-b4b7-018b6b598507.description: When it dies the runes on its body flash a bright green then turn to mundane malachite. Each creature within 20' of giant: cursed 7 days (DC 16 Con negates) or until lifted by remove curse spell or similar. While cursed creature has disadvantage on saves and on first attack roll it makes on each of its turns. Fiends have disadvantage on the save.

3e687b82-a842-5d4b-a4f6-b0d968f82163.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals extra 2d8 fire (included in below).

b71285ef-6894-5a1f-a1ae-efa7f6ce3a7b.name: Runic Shield
b71285ef-6894-5a1f-a1ae-efa7f6ce3a7b.description: Adds 4 to its AC vs. one attack that would hit it as green runes encircle the giant. To do so giant must see the attacker and can't be invisible

f20ad96e-3bf8-579f-9a11-38df4b8bffa2.name: Hypnotic Luminescence
f20ad96e-3bf8-579f-9a11-38df4b8bffa2.description: Tendril on giant’s head sheds bright light in 60' radius and dim light extra 60'. When creature that can see the light starts its turn within 60' of giant creature charmed 24 hrs (DC 18 Cha negates) regarding giant as friendly acquaintance. If giant or one of its allies harms charmed creature this effect ends. If save succeeds/effect ends for it creature immune to giant's Hypnotic Luminescence for next 24 hrs. At start of its turn lantern giant chooses whether this light is active.

c3227dc9-7a74-5f6d-b513-e5a7f719eff0.description: Advantage on Cha (Intimidation) checks while agitated as its fluorescence flashes in a disorienting array.

d0459b74-316e-5bb1-aa8d-7aaa63c8d011.description: Each creature within 5 ft. of shrimp is blinded until start of its next turn (DC 14 Dex negates). The shrimp then swims up to half its swimming speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

06124534-14f6-564c-8fb9-a56ac8df5c12.description: Is considered to be a Huge Beast for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

attributes.description: Is considered to be a Huge Beast for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

2623b3fa-ffa9-5ab4-a736-1059df4f7346.name: Mass Shove
2623b3fa-ffa9-5ab4-a736-1059df4f7346.description: Each Large or smaller creature within 10 ft. of the giant mole lizard and that isn't grappled by it must make DC 14 Str save or be pushed up to 15 ft. away from the lizard and knocked prone.

d779ad9e-ad35-5723-b239-b09f06c00e49.name: Spiny Body
d779ad9e-ad35-5723-b239-b09f06c00e49.description: A creature that touches pufferfish or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 2 (1d4) piercing damage. While it is puffed up this damage increases to 5 (2d4).

Takes the Dash action.

9a8247dc-43e2-51dd-9a22-81e858771f2b.name: Puff Up
9a8247dc-43e2-51dd-9a22-81e858771f2b.description: For 1 min it increases in size by filling its stomach with air or water. While puffed up it is Medium doubles its damage dice on Bite and Spine attacks (included above) and makes Str checks and Str saves with advantage. If pufferfish lacks the room to become Medium it attains the max size possible in space available.

b92f51ea-d222-52cd-9b89-fa2061a77e0f.name: Forged Forgery
b92f51ea-d222-52cd-9b89-fa2061a77e0f.description: Thursir armorers wear armor forged from dwarven armor and shaped to resemble dwarven armor. Skilled blacksmiths can recognize and exploit this design quirk. When a creature proficient with smith’s tools scores a critical hit vs. thursir armorer armorer’s armor breaks reducing armorer’s AC by 5 until armorer repairs armor. If armorer is critically hit by any creature while its armor is broken armor shatters and is destroyed reducing armorer’s AC to 12.

Armorer has advantage on ability checks when using smith's tools and on attack rolls using a battleaxe handaxe light hammer or warhammer until start of its next turn. It carries six skulls on its belt.

c8d3028f-3244-58c3-9a0a-4d83124b87fc.description: When she is hit by a weapon attack up to two friendly creatures within 60' of her that can see her can use their reactions to move up to their speed toward priestess.

00796991-67db-5c67-bd36-8ef149667922.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal forest vegetation. Ex: small tree large branch.

12b9bfe0-3526-55a0-8c74-fae55fe91724.description: If it moves 20'+ straight toward a creature and then hits it with Ram attack on same turn target: DC 13 Str save or be knocked prone. If target is prone stick can make one Spine attack vs. it as a bonus action.

94d7a6d4-1a36-5a65-83b6-8950a1af3559.description: Each creature within 5 ft. of the stick: DC 13 Int save or be incapacitated until end of its next turn. The walking stick then flies up to its flying speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

9f6e2e18-7613-5cff-b21f-e76bb02fc09a.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on sight and magical darkness doesn’t impede its darkvision. Also disadvantage on ability checks and saves vs. being blinded.

001dabeb-fcfa-5664-bd13-8d9f5a7aaa51.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain.

attributes.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain.

83712f7e-b52c-5737-b159-f5fee62de859.description: Can burrow through ice snow and permafrost and leaves a 5 ft. diameter tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: Can burrow through ice snow and permafrost and leaves a 5 ft. diameter tunnel in its wake.

e98b9ab7-13df-5972-85ea-8812f1fe2c33.name: Aura of Hope
e98b9ab7-13df-5972-85ea-8812f1fe2c33.description: Surrounded by aura of courage. Each friendly creature within 30' of it: advantage on saves vs. being frightened.

attributes.description: Surrounded by aura of courage. Each friendly creature within 30' of it: advantage on saves vs. being frightened.

e3726ecf-bb93-5a82-ba73-4247d6a2684d.name: Glorious Milk
e3726ecf-bb93-5a82-ba73-4247d6a2684d.description: Can spend 1 min slowly drinking from a bowl of melted ice water. When it stops bowl is filled with pale milk. A creature that drinks the milk regains 7 (2d6) hp and its exhaustion level is reduced by up to two levels. After gnyan’s milk has restored a total of 20 hp or reduced a total of four exhaustion levels in creatures gnyan can’t create milk in this way again until it finishes a long rest.

95919317-b301-5e20-b7c6-4c5e40f0d695.description: If it moves 20'+ straight to creature and hits it with Claw attack on same turn target knocked prone (DC 13 Str not prone). If target is prone gnyan can make one Bite vs. it as a bonus action.

232f3b46-e0a5-52e4-9942-33e63535c409.name: Snow Strider
232f3b46-e0a5-52e4-9942-33e63535c409.description: Can move across icy surfaces with o an ability check and difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement. It leaves no tracks or other traces of its passage when moving through snowy terrain.

92a31e06-5d13-5c16-85f6-232af2c1e6b7.name: Snow Step
92a31e06-5d13-5c16-85f6-232af2c1e6b7.description: Teleports with items worn/carried up to 30' to unoccupied space it can see. Origin and destination must have snow.

be226103-92ae-5c60-9f07-3b61c1692b4f.name: Adaptable Locomotion
be226103-92ae-5c60-9f07-3b61c1692b4f.description: Moving through difficult terrain doesn’t cost it extra movement. In addition it has advantage on ability checks and saves made to escape a grapple or end the restrained condition.

attributes.description: Moving through difficult terrain doesn’t cost it extra movement. In addition it has advantage on ability checks and saves made to escape a grapple or end the restrained condition.

e802d661-c7de-549c-8734-49e6ba0a1c47.name: Defensive Mount
e802d661-c7de-549c-8734-49e6ba0a1c47.description: Can serve as a mount for one Large creature up to 4 Med creatures or up to 6 Small or smaller creatures. While mounted creatures riding in siege engine’s turret gain half cover.

682d1111-f504-5c77-b78e-1e6f4b1b652f.name: Arcane Lexicon
682d1111-f504-5c77-b78e-1e6f4b1b652f.description: Glyphs on its body cast ghostly copies into the air forming into eldritch incantations. It chooses up to 3 creatures it can see within 90' of it choosing one of the following options for each. A creature can’t be targeted by more than one effect at a time and godslayer can’t use same option on more than one target.Death Glyph Target marked for death until start of godslayer’s next turn (DC 25 Wis negates). While marked target takes extra 11 (2d10) force each time godslayer hits target with Energy Glaive.Glyph of Despair Target overwhelmed with despair for 1 min (DC 25 Cha negates). While overwhelmed with despair target has disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.Glyph of Pain Target overwhelmed by pain incapacitated until its next turn end (DC 25 Con negates). No effect: Undead/Constructs.Glyph of Summoning Target magically teleported to an unoccupied space within 15 ft. of godslayer (DC 25 Wis negates).Retributive Glyph Target marked with retributive glyph until the end of its next turn (DC 25 Dex negates). While marked creature takes 9 (2d8) force each time it hits a creature with weapon attack.Stupefying Glyph Target blinded and deafened until the end of its next turn (DC 25 Con negates).

attributes.description: Can pinpoint the location of Celestials Fiends divine avatars and deities within 120' of it and can sense general direction of them within 1 mile of it. This extends into Ethereal and Shadow Planes.

aeeac54e-27bf-5430-a2e0-f75311c3d819.name: Divine Slayer
aeeac54e-27bf-5430-a2e0-f75311c3d819.description: Its attacks affect immortal beings such as gods. Celestials Fiends divine avatars and deities don’t have resistance to the damage from its attacks. If such a creature would normally have immunity to the damage from its attacks it has resistance instead. If it reduces a Celestial Fiend divine avatar or deity to 0 hp it absorbs target’s divine energy preventing target from reviving or being resurrected until godslayer is destroyed.

c2238ce1-050b-5585-bccf-32f76a79bdf9.name: Inscrutable (Godslayer)
c2238ce1-050b-5585-bccf-32f76a79bdf9.description: Immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts and any divination spell that it refuses. Wis (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions/sincerity have disadvantage.

attributes.description: Immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts and any divination spell that it refuses. Wis (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions/sincerity have disadvantage.

499cc2e8-996c-58ad-96e0-31881c32b173.name: Arcane Word
499cc2e8-996c-58ad-96e0-31881c32b173.description: One Lexicon glyph on target within 90' it can see.

attributes.description: One Lexicon glyph on target within 90' it can see.

2a4bb9a0-d44c-545d-a06f-de6c12051b28.name: Attack (Godslayer)
2a4bb9a0-d44c-545d-a06f-de6c12051b28.description: Makes one Energy Glaive or Rune Discus attack.

attributes.description: Makes one Energy Glaive or Rune Discus attack.

088aff78-8a1f-51c9-afef-ef0d0620f2f8.name: Hunting Step
088aff78-8a1f-51c9-afef-ef0d0620f2f8.description: Magically teleports with items worn/carried up to 120' to unoccupied space within 15 ft. of a Celestial Fiend divine avatar or deity it senses with Divine Sense magically shifting from Material to Ethereal or Shadow Planes or vice versa. Godslayer has advantage on next attack roll it makes vs. target before start of its next turn. Glowing glyphs appear at origin and destination when it uses this.

1ee6a13c-3809-5998-8b92-2be81f6771f8.name: Move (Godslayer)
1ee6a13c-3809-5998-8b92-2be81f6771f8.description: Up to its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: Up to its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

2436b7e9-a1a7-58ba-8454-6e260f95f7df.name: Parry Spell
2436b7e9-a1a7-58ba-8454-6e260f95f7df.description: If it succeeds on a save vs. spell of up to 8th level that targets only godslayer spell has no effect. If godslayer succeeds on the save by 5+ spell is reflected back at spellcaster using slot level spell save DC attack bonus and spellcasting ability of caster.

Regains 65 (10d12) hp.

2271af46-be96-5dee-9f5c-804933649e5a.name: Easily Distracted
2271af46-be96-5dee-9f5c-804933649e5a.description: Disadvantage on Wis (Perception) checks. In addition a creature that the golem can see or hear and that is within 30' of it can attempt to distract golem as a bonus action. Golem must make DC 10 Wis save or spend its next turn moving up to its speed toward the creature using its available actions on that creature.

Golem must make DC 10 Wis save or spend its next turn moving up to its speed toward the creature using its available actions on that creature.

4497aa54-d6e8-5207-acfb-a3dc1e8eef60.name: Lightning Absorption
4497aa54-d6e8-5207-acfb-a3dc1e8eef60.description: Whenever it is subjected to lightning it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the lightning dealt.

attributes.description: Whenever it is subjected to lightning it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the lightning dealt.

efa882c9-558f-572d-8415-f19f2704638f.name: Infernal Tetanus
efa882c9-558f-572d-8415-f19f2704638f.description: A creature infected with this manifests symptoms 2d4 days after infection: fever headache sore throat and muscle aches. It affects the nervous system causing painful debilitating muscle spasms that eventually inhibit mobility speech and breathing. Until disease is cured at end of each long rest infected creature must make a DC 16 Con save. Fail: Creature's Dex score is reduced by 1d4 and is paralyzed for 24 hrs. Reduction lasts until creature finishes a long rest after disease is cured. If disease reduces creature’s Dex to 0 it dies. Success: creature instead suffers one level of exhaustion and until disease is cured or exhaustion is removed it must make DC 16 Con save to cast a spell with verbal component. A creature that succeeds on three saves recovers from the disease.

679042f6-fc5b-5f66-a4c4-8b8cf4031ed0.name: Ice Cavity
679042f6-fc5b-5f66-a4c4-8b8cf4031ed0.description: Ice block torse it can liquefy and refreeze trapping and preserving creatures. If golem takes 15+ fire on a single turn cavity liquefies if frozen. When cavity is frozen creature that touches golem or hits it with melee attack while within 5 feet: 9 (2d8) cold. When cavity liquefied creature within 5 ft. of golem can use action to pull petrified creature out of golem if golem has one inside. Doing so requires successful DC 16 Str check and creature attempting: 9 (2d8) cold.

7e0e6286-e394-5a8c-925d-1f44675b49a6.name: False Appearance (Unfolded Form)
7e0e6286-e394-5a8c-925d-1f44675b49a6.description: Motionless indistinguishable from ordinary paper screen tapestry or similar flat paper/fabric art.

attributes.description: Motionless indistinguishable from ordinary paper screen tapestry or similar flat paper/fabric art.

f3cdb0a3-49a7-5189-9710-e07920be0cbc.name: Fold
f3cdb0a3-49a7-5189-9710-e07920be0cbc.description: Reshape papery body to resemble Large dragon Large swan or Med frog. Use again to unfold into Large flat piece of fabric/paper. Stats except size same in each form. Unfolded if it dies.

f9748845-4d38-5441-981c-bc565fd07c43.name: Fire Hazard
f9748845-4d38-5441-981c-bc565fd07c43.description: When it takes fire it bursts into flame. Golem continues burning until it takes cold is immersed in water or uses Quench. A creature that touches burning golem or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it: 5 (1d10) fire. While burning golem’s weapon attacks deal extra 5 (1d10) fire on a hit.

465dbf89-5766-5754-9d3f-9556d7628c57.name: Hardened Tar
465dbf89-5766-5754-9d3f-9556d7628c57.description: If it takes cold in the same round it is reduced to 0 hp it is paralyzed for 1 min remaining alive. If it takes fire while paralyzed it regains a number of hp equal to the fire dealt. Otherwise it dies when the condition ends.

622e0165-ec7a-56b4-b092-0ed66ecf61ff.name: Noxious Smoke (Burning Only)
622e0165-ec7a-56b4-b092-0ed66ecf61ff.description: While burning gives off poisonous fumes. A creature that starts its turn within 5 ft. of burning golem: poisoned as it remains within 5 ft. of golem and for 1 round after it leaves the area (DC 13 Con negates).

f5198602-c510-5e75-9d2e-aa84c5e504ca.name: Draw Flames
f5198602-c510-5e75-9d2e-aa84c5e504ca.description: Extinguishes up to 10 ft. cube of nonmagical fire within 5 ft. of it drawing fire into itself and activating its Fire Hazard.

attributes.description: Extinguishes up to 10 ft. cube of nonmagical fire within 5 ft. of it drawing fire into itself and activating its Fire Hazard.

f6f7c8b4-00b4-592c-ab1b-de883ea286d2.name: Quench
f6f7c8b4-00b4-592c-ab1b-de883ea286d2.description: Puts out fire on it deactivating Fire Hazard.

attributes.description: Puts out fire on it deactivating Fire Hazard.

e807a7e5-4ab7-58f7-926f-4f42a3f6a299.name: Aura of Mechanical Mishap
e807a7e5-4ab7-58f7-926f-4f42a3f6a299.description: The bilge gremlin’s presence interferes with nonmagical objects that have moving parts such as clocks crossbows or hinges within 20' of it. Such objects that aren’t being worn or carried malfunction while within the aura and if in the aura for more than 1 min they cease to function until repaired. If a creature in the aura uses a nonmagical object with moving parts roll a d6. On a 5 or 6 weapons such as crossbows or firearms misfire and jam and other objects cease to function. A creature can take its action to restore the malfunctioning object by succeeding on a DC 13 Int check.

1e34049f-e722-5b60-af79-876fc857134e.description: The bilge gremlin is immune to disease.

d2fe85f3-ac5a-5cf7-898e-02da2ff80f26.name: Aura of Mechanical Mishap (Gremlin, Bilge Bosun)

584e551e-14e1-5b0a-b983-f3ce857dc9fe.name: Aura of Drunkenness
584e551e-14e1-5b0a-b983-f3ce857dc9fe.description: Each creature that starts its turn in 20' radius aura: DC 12 Con save or poisoned for 1 hr. Creature that has consumed alcohol within past hr has disadvantage on the save. While poisoned creature falls prone if it tries to move more than half its speed during a turn. Creature that succeeds on the save is immune to Aura of Drunkenness of all rum gremlins for 24 hrs.

2a98c769-dcd1-5738-97c9-1f9ce49efc52.description: Has twenty worms stored in its cheeks. Used worms regrow when the grivid finishes a long rest.

attributes.description: Has twenty worms stored in its cheeks. Used worms regrow when the grivid finishes a long rest.

1064f53c-0d58-5137-9cf9-6566017f5312.name: Parasitic Cheek Worm
1064f53c-0d58-5137-9cf9-6566017f5312.description: Produces parasitic worms in its cheeks and it expels these worms into other creatures when it attacks. Worm burrows into target's flesh and that creature is poisoned while infested with at least one worm. At start of each of infested creature’s turns it takes 5 (2d4) poison. Any creature can take an action to remove one worm with successful DC 12 Wis (Medicine) check. An effect that cures disease removes and kills one worm infesting the creature. When grivid dies all worms currently infesting creatures die ending infestation in all infested creatures.

ee0eaa6e-54df-5e2e-ab6a-1514b8c5be97.description: If it has at least 1 hp grivid regains 5 hp for each worm infesting another creature at start of its turn.

8f534af6-7e03-5fe7-a0bb-4f30d9528e41.description: If it scores a critical hit vs. stunned creature tears off one of creature’s limbs. Creature is immune to this if it is immune to slashing.

c1f5a3e5-aead-5c1e-b387-fb0bae2de6ea.description: Advantage: Dex (Stealth) checks to hide in forest terrain if fur is brown and snowy terrain if fur is white.

5af69941-7fdc-59f2-87e5-6ddc65a0765c.description: White fur white to brown vice versa.

attributes.description: White fur white to brown vice versa.

f8f61aad-8955-5893-96f3-e019acd34af0.name: Hold Breath (Gullkin)
f8f61aad-8955-5893-96f3-e019acd34af0.description: Can hold its breath for 15 min.

attributes.description: Can hold its breath for 15 min.

dda2e99f-b355-5063-a371-f4f0d2624655.name: Hold Breath (Gullkin Hunter)
dda2e99f-b355-5063-a371-f4f0d2624655.description: The gullkin can hold its breath for 5 min.

attributes.description: The gullkin can hold its breath for 5 min.

53a8363f-8fae-547a-be31-e67d295ed431.description: Marks a creature as its quarry. Whenever hunter hits marked creature with weapon attack deals extra 1d6 damage to target.

1cc843c6-2fd4-565b-a6b5-3f38a3d99d22.description: Can climb difficult earth or stone surfaces including upside down on ceilings with o an ability check.

attributes.description: Can climb difficult earth or stone surfaces including upside down on ceilings with o an ability check.

26d01e5b-a410-53fd-894f-623506ae0ae0.name: Earthen Claws
26d01e5b-a410-53fd-894f-623506ae0ae0.description: Its claws easily meld through stone and metal. When it makes a Claw attack vs. creature wearing nonmagical metal armor or wielding a nonmagical metal shield attack ignores AC bonus of armor or shield. If target is a construct made of stone or metal attack ignores AC bonus provided by natural armor if any.

b081f28d-8dec-535a-96d9-8a73e072c5c1.name: Stone Camouflage (Haakjir)
b081f28d-8dec-535a-96d9-8a73e072c5c1.description: Advantage: Dex (Stealth) to hide in rocky terrain.

26382e1a-68a9-5f66-a291-aaa0a5ffb4a6.description: Each creature in same water as hag and that starts its turn within 20' of hag: poisoned while within aura and for 1 min after it leaves (DC 16 Con not poisoned). A poisoned creature that starts its turn outside aura can re-save success ends effect on itself.

4ad8b39c-fc32-5577-a900-8ad39077b238.name: Skilled Submariner
4ad8b39c-fc32-5577-a900-8ad39077b238.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find creatures and objects underwater. Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide while underwater.

72f95176-f1ff-58b9-ab6f-d3bac5b260c8.name: Speak with Aquatic Creatures (Hag, Brine)
72f95176-f1ff-58b9-ab6f-d3bac5b260c8.description: Communicate with Beasts and Monstrosities that have a swimming speed as if they shared a language.

365ff9d4-ff6b-5618-b71e-31a23a9acf41.name: Ice Walk (Hag, Floe)
365ff9d4-ff6b-5618-b71e-31a23a9acf41.description: Can move across and climb icy surfaces with o ability check. Difficult terrain covered in ice or snow doesn’t cost her extra move.

f739b18d-142d-5cb2-b5eb-9ffa5bf86163.description: Can pinpoint location of poisoned creatures or creatures suffering from a disease within 60' of her and can sense general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of her.

83e6062f-e3d9-5cfe-b825-cdbbedd135ee.name: Pestilence Aura
83e6062f-e3d9-5cfe-b825-cdbbedd135ee.description: At start of each of hag’s turns each creature within 10 ft. of her takes 4 (1d8) poison. If a creature remains within aura for more than 1 min it contracts disease of hag’s choice (DC 13 Con negates disease). Disease’s save DC is 13 regardless of type.

0fa44abb-6cb8-5ebb-b8ea-610dad0b3a0a.name: Plague Carrier
0fa44abb-6cb8-5ebb-b8ea-610dad0b3a0a.description: The pesta hag is immune to diseases.

28fb7b89-2cc0-5e5a-a481-0b89c748cfcd.description: While hag remains motionless in forest terrain is indistinguishable from an old decomposing log or tree stump.

attributes.description: While hag remains motionless in forest terrain is indistinguishable from an old decomposing log or tree stump.

7937595a-8715-54fc-ad33-81751a3bb18b.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
7937595a-8715-54fc-ad33-81751a3bb18b.description: Can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: Can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

54abedbd-5dd9-571d-a81f-96cadbdfbc33.name: Woodland Walk
54abedbd-5dd9-571d-a81f-96cadbdfbc33.description: Difficult terrain made of plants doesn’t cost hag extra move. Can pass through plants with o being slowed by them nor taking damage from them if they have thorns spines or similar.

3e771b19-74a2-5c4e-a4e4-93cd0747580d.name: Nettling Word
3e771b19-74a2-5c4e-a4e4-93cd0747580d.description: Heckles mocks or jeers one creature she can see within 30' of her. If creature can hear and understand her enraged until end of its next turn (DC 16 Cha negates). While enraged: advantage on melee attacks unable to distinguish friend from foe and must move to and attack nearest creature (not hag). If none is near enough to move to and attack enraged creature stalks off in random direction. Attacks vs. enraged creature: advantage.

ea776b25-31ff-5322-9070-000a00d047ba.description: A creature infected with harpy's plague becomes contagious 24 hrs after contracting the disease. When a creature starts its turn within 5 ft. of contagious target that creature must make DC 15 Con save or also contract harpy's plague disease.
