4153a6b8-de69-560b-8fd6-9fabb9888beb.name: Beast of Burden (Harvest Horse)
4153a6b8-de69-560b-8fd6-9fabb9888beb.description: Is considered one size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

attributes.description: Is considered one size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

2957fd26-aa0f-56c6-86f9-57c0d4034077.name: Poor Traversal
2957fd26-aa0f-56c6-86f9-57c0d4034077.description: Must spend two additional feet of movement to move through difficult terrain instead of one additional foot.

attributes.description: Must spend two additional feet of movement to move through difficult terrain instead of one additional foot.

4ca27dab-129e-5abf-8cb5-7ec3d5419cab.name: Herd-Hidden (Herd Animal Form Only)
4ca27dab-129e-5abf-8cb5-7ec3d5419cab.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) and Cha (Deception) checks to blend into herd or convince those observing herd it is part of the herd.

attributes.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) and Cha (Deception) checks to blend into herd or convince those observing herd it is part of the herd.

e2fb4587-b860-5cb6-bdd8-64daa7bc1265.name: One of the Herd
e2fb4587-b860-5cb6-bdd8-64daa7bc1265.description: A domesticated herd animal such as a cow horse sheep or chicken that can see the herd skulker treats it as a member of the herd regardless of the form skulker takes. When such an animal sees a herd skulker attack or feed it becomes immune to herd skulker’s One of the Herd for the next 24 hrs acting as it normally would when confronting a predator. Creatures immune to the charmed condition are immune to this.

attributes.description: A domesticated herd animal such as a cow horse sheep or chicken that can see the herd skulker treats it as a member of the herd regardless of the form skulker takes. When such an animal sees a herd skulker attack or feed it becomes immune to herd skulker’s One of the Herd for the next 24 hrs acting as it normally would when confronting a predator. Creatures immune to the charmed condition are immune to this.

a6361130-d354-53fb-89de-440c9a5a5cd8.name: Change Shape (Herd Skulker)
a6361130-d354-53fb-89de-440c9a5a5cd8.description: Transforms into a Large or smaller domesticated herd animal it can see such as a cow horse sheep or chicken or back into its true canine form. Its statistics other than its size are the same in each form. Reverts on death.

attributes.description: Transforms into a Large or smaller domesticated herd animal it can see such as a cow horse sheep or chicken or back into its true canine form. Its statistics other than its size are the same in each form. Reverts on death.

c74544a7-d98f-5b17-ad1f-9a0b7dc7780e.name: Nimble Escape
c74544a7-d98f-5b17-ad1f-9a0b7dc7780e.description: Takes the Disengage or Hide action.

attributes.description: Takes the Disengage or Hide action.

4afbcdc1-58d3-5508-90f3-4e10c1bb94bc.name: Aura of Misfortune
4afbcdc1-58d3-5508-90f3-4e10c1bb94bc.description: Creatures within 15 ft. of it treat attack rolls of 20 as 19 and can’t gain advantage on ability checks attacks and saves.

attributes.description: Creatures within 15 ft. of it treat attack rolls of 20 as 19 and can’t gain advantage on ability checks attacks and saves.

a74d74fa-e6d2-59cc-8e66-01004fb79355.name: Rejuvenation (Hinderling)
a74d74fa-e6d2-59cc-8e66-01004fb79355.description: While hinderling curse remains on a victim a slain hinderling returns to life in 1 day regaining all its hp and becoming active again. Hinderling appears within 100' of victim.

attributes.description: While hinderling curse remains on a victim a slain hinderling returns to life in 1 day regaining all its hp and becoming active again. Hinderling appears within 100' of victim.

e9d6b6d9-1bfc-516b-8ea5-39938802cb73.name: Run and Hide
e9d6b6d9-1bfc-516b-8ea5-39938802cb73.description: When a creature hinderling can see targets it with weapon hinderling chooses another creature within 5 ft. as attack's target then moves up to half its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: When a creature hinderling can see targets it with weapon hinderling chooses another creature within 5 ft. as attack's target then moves up to half its speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

4606c3ea-f860-5fab-968f-7b8deda0f125.name: Divine Jaws
4606c3ea-f860-5fab-968f-7b8deda0f125.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with Gore Gore deals extra 2d8 necrotic or radiant (included) hippo’s choice.

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with Gore Gore deals extra 2d8 necrotic or radiant (included) hippo’s choice.

8442e3ed-e168-5693-b266-4c99182614fd.name: Sacred Guardian
8442e3ed-e168-5693-b266-4c99182614fd.description: Can pinpoint the location of an agent or worshiper of an opposing deity or a creature with ill intent toward its sacred site within 120' of itself. In addition it can sense when such a creature moves within 100' of the site and can sense general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of the site.

attributes.description: Can pinpoint the location of an agent or worshiper of an opposing deity or a creature with ill intent toward its sacred site within 120' of itself. In addition it can sense when such a creature moves within 100' of the site and can sense general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of the site.

7cffada4-d226-58fe-8768-b0046d80a5a3.name: Protector's Step
7cffada4-d226-58fe-8768-b0046d80a5a3.description: Magically teleports with any items worn/carried up to 120' to unoccupied space within its sacred site or within 30' of exterior of its site. Golden light swirls or inky shadown tendrils (hippo's choice) appear at origin and destination.

attributes.description: Magically teleports with any items worn/carried up to 120' to unoccupied space within its sacred site or within 30' of exterior of its site. Golden light swirls or inky shadown tendrils (hippo's choice) appear at origin and destination.

daedb297-111e-55e6-848e-ac5bf994293d.name: Blood Scent
daedb297-111e-55e6-848e-ac5bf994293d.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find or track a creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

attributes.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find or track a creature that doesn’t have all its hp.
Takes the Hide action.

5062a9de-0c8e-5497-ba2c-9c8e5436d4ac.name: Hungry Void Traveler
5062a9de-0c8e-5497-ba2c-9c8e5436d4ac.description: Doesn’t require air drink or sleep.

attributes.description: Doesn’t require air drink or sleep.

79925ee1-b16b-57e1-90db-af9f7aa67e0a.name: Inscrutable (Howler Of The Hill)
79925ee1-b16b-57e1-90db-af9f7aa67e0a.description: Immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts and any divination spell it refuses. Wis (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions/sincerity have disadvantage.

attributes.description: Immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts and any divination spell it refuses. Wis (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions/sincerity have disadvantage.
No blindsight while deafened.

ead33f59-1c9c-5576-880c-1c2bb6abf40f.name: Hold Breath (Hvalfiskr)
ead33f59-1c9c-5576-880c-1c2bb6abf40f.description: Can hold its breath for 1 hr.

attributes.description: Can hold its breath for 1 hr.

d503f741-5fac-53a9-9685-548d3a4493c9.name: Speak with Cetaceans
d503f741-5fac-53a9-9685-548d3a4493c9.description: Can communicate with dolphins porpoises and whales as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: Can communicate with dolphins porpoises and whales as if they shared a language.

bb3e36f2-007c-5068-b61c-64d4f98f8403.name: Change Shape (Hvalfiskr)
bb3e36f2-007c-5068-b61c-64d4f98f8403.description: Transforms into Huge frost giant Huge whale or back into its true whale-giant hybrid form. Its stats are the same in each form. Items worn/carried transform with it. Reverts on death.

attributes.description: Transforms into Huge frost giant Huge whale or back into its true whale-giant hybrid form. Its stats are the same in each form. Items worn/carried transform with it. Reverts on death.

7fe33003-23c5-57d6-8e98-2f268361a0d3.name: Reel Anchor
7fe33003-23c5-57d6-8e98-2f268361a0d3.description: Pulls on the chain connected to anchor returning it to its empty hand. If anchor is hooked around a creature creature: DC 19 Str save or be pulled up to 30' toward hvalfiskr.

attributes.description: Pulls on the chain connected to anchor returning it to its empty hand. If anchor is hooked around a creature creature: DC 19 Str save or be pulled up to 30' toward hvalfiskr.

edf0c820-1630-5e17-876e-14587a55e1f0.name: Fiery Blood
edf0c820-1630-5e17-876e-14587a55e1f0.description: When it takes damage each creature within 5 ft. of it: DC 15 Dex save or take 3 (1d6) fire. The fire ignites flammable objects within 5 ft. of ibexian that aren’t being worn or carried.

attributes.description: When it takes damage each creature within 5 ft. of it: DC 15 Dex save or take 3 (1d6) fire. The fire ignites flammable objects within 5 ft. of ibexian that aren’t being worn or carried.

3e3082ea-b3f0-5d53-8833-33913324b3a4.name: Fiery Charge
3e3082ea-b3f0-5d53-8833-33913324b3a4.description: If it moves 20'+ straight toward a target and then hits it with Ram attack on the same turn target takes extra 7 (2d6) fire. If target is a creature it must make DC 15 Str save or be pushed up to 10 ft. away and knocked prone.

attributes.description: If it moves 20'+ straight toward a target and then hits it with Ram attack on the same turn target takes extra 7 (2d6) fire. If target is a creature it must make DC 15 Str save or be pushed up to 10 ft. away and knocked prone.

5a088fa4-9998-5c76-a7f2-d1396d40f4ab.name: Fear of Fire
5a088fa4-9998-5c76-a7f2-d1396d40f4ab.description: An ice urchin is inherently fearful of fire. If presented forcefully with fire or if it is dealt fire the ice urchin must make DC 13 Wis save or become frightened until the end of its next turn. Once it has been frightened by a specific source of fire (such as a torch) the ice urchin can’t be frightened by that same source again for 24 hrs.

attributes.description: An ice urchin is inherently fearful of fire. If presented forcefully with fire or if it is dealt fire the ice urchin must make DC 13 Wis save or become frightened until the end of its next turn. Once it has been frightened by a specific source of fire (such as a torch) the ice urchin can’t be frightened by that same source again for 24 hrs.

1e5ac7cc-fb59-5d63-b673-5a0d7e323d6d.name: Ice Slide
1e5ac7cc-fb59-5d63-b673-5a0d7e323d6d.description: Its speed increases to 60' when it moves on snow or ice. Additionally difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

attributes.description: Its speed increases to 60' when it moves on snow or ice. Additionally difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

d2dd5581-c5bb-51bb-b18b-d6d297d03d5d.name: Melting Away
d2dd5581-c5bb-51bb-b18b-d6d297d03d5d.description: If it takes fire damage its AC is reduced by 2 and it has disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: If it takes fire damage its AC is reduced by 2 and it has disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

03586cfd-10ff-5efb-9df8-ae19e55cf8c7.name: Spiny Defense
03586cfd-10ff-5efb-9df8-ae19e55cf8c7.description: A creature that touches the ice urchin or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 3 (1d6) piercing damage and 2 (1d4) cold.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the ice urchin or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 3 (1d6) piercing damage and 2 (1d4) cold.

7957ba7f-ca3d-522a-bccc-d44e57f63fbd.name: Venomous Spine Regrowth
7957ba7f-ca3d-522a-bccc-d44e57f63fbd.description: An ice urchin has twelve venomous spines. Used spines regrow when the ice urchin finishes a long rest.

attributes.description: An ice urchin has twelve venomous spines. Used spines regrow when the ice urchin finishes a long rest.

d398801e-791e-5b78-8511-03a3626c577c.name: False Appearance (Ice Willow)
d398801e-791e-5b78-8511-03a3626c577c.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ice-covered willow tree.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ice-covered willow tree.

c5837d1b-63db-5d1a-9617-4042d3f31d86.name: Ice Melt
c5837d1b-63db-5d1a-9617-4042d3f31d86.description: If it takes fire damage its icicles partially melt. Until the end of the ice willow’s next turn creatures have advantage on saves vs. the willow’s Icicle Drop and Icicle Spray.

attributes.description: If it takes fire damage its icicles partially melt. Until the end of the ice willow’s next turn creatures have advantage on saves vs. the willow’s Icicle Drop and Icicle Spray.

70d06837-de37-5e74-b98e-71124b61ef28.name: Melting Icicles
70d06837-de37-5e74-b98e-71124b61ef28.description: When the ice willow takes fire it can immediately use Icicle Drop if available.

attributes.description: When the ice willow takes fire it can immediately use Icicle Drop if available.

72de79b7-7be9-5000-8620-7d3bb60d5c2f.name: Cold Physiology
72de79b7-7be9-5000-8620-7d3bb60d5c2f.description: Can’t abide constant warmth. Each hr it spends in an area with temperature above 40 degrees Fahrenheit worm must make DC 15 Con save or suffer one level of exhaustion that can’t be removed until it finishes a long rest in area with temperature below 40 degrees.

attributes.description: Can’t abide constant warmth. Each hr it spends in an area with temperature above 40 degrees Fahrenheit worm must make DC 15 Con save or suffer one level of exhaustion that can’t be removed until it finishes a long rest in area with temperature below 40 degrees.

ec3c8f71-895a-5fb4-a856-da0f4e41ebf7.name: Heat Sensitivity
ec3c8f71-895a-5fb4-a856-da0f4e41ebf7.description: Has disadvantage on attack rolls when within 5 ft. of a strong source of heat that isn’t a warm-blooded creature’s natural warmth such as a torch or campfire. In addition the iceworm can pinpoint the location of warm-blooded creatures within 90' of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

attributes.description: Has disadvantage on attack rolls when within 5 ft. of a strong source of heat that isn’t a warm-blooded creature’s natural warmth such as a torch or campfire. In addition the iceworm can pinpoint the location of warm-blooded creatures within 90' of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

3068f058-1066-5916-bbd7-bf6b72aa4ac4.name: Slippery (Iceworm)
3068f058-1066-5916-bbd7-bf6b72aa4ac4.description: Has advantage on saves and ability checks made to escape a grapple.

attributes.description: Has advantage on saves and ability checks made to escape a grapple.

fce85987-aa47-586c-bc27-1fcad6ca2016.name: Essential Oiliness
fce85987-aa47-586c-bc27-1fcad6ca2016.description: Has advantage on saves and ability checks made to escape a grapple or end restrained condition.

attributes.description: Has advantage on saves and ability checks made to escape a grapple or end restrained condition.

c105a0ad-614f-5b40-b6e5-eaa7f64a9679.name: Pelagic Bile (Recharge 6)
c105a0ad-614f-5b40-b6e5-eaa7f64a9679.description: The imperator regurgitates its stomach contents in a 60' cone. All in area make a DC 17 Dex save. On a failure a creature takes 17 (5d6) acid and 17 (5d6) poison and is poisoned for 1 min. On a success a creature takes half the damage and isn’t poisoned. A poisoned creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. Swallowed creatures are then regurgitated falling prone in a space within 10 ft. of the imperator.

attributes.description: The imperator regurgitates its stomach contents in a 60' cone. All in area make a DC 17 Dex save. On a failure a creature takes 17 (5d6) acid and 17 (5d6) poison and is poisoned for 1 min. On a success a creature takes half the damage and isn’t poisoned. A poisoned creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. Swallowed creatures are then regurgitated falling prone in a space within 10 ft. of the imperator.

24aed785-3744-5b92-864b-1baa3a2a6a55.name: Penguin Telepathy
24aed785-3744-5b92-864b-1baa3a2a6a55.description: Can magically command any penguin within 120' of it using a limited telepathy.

attributes.description: Can magically command any penguin within 120' of it using a limited telepathy.

9bbf2142-40d7-5fae-90ca-a9f778183585.name: Toboggan Charge (Recharge 5–6)
9bbf2142-40d7-5fae-90ca-a9f778183585.description: The imperator moves up to 30' in a straight line over ice or snow and can move through the space of any Large or smaller creature. The first time it enters a creature’s space during this move that creature must make a DC 17 Str save. On a failure a creature takes 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success a creature takes half the damage and isn’t knocked prone.

attributes.description: The imperator moves up to 30' in a straight line over ice or snow and can move through the space of any Large or smaller creature. The first time it enters a creature’s space during this move that creature must make a DC 17 Str save. On a failure a creature takes 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success a creature takes half the damage and isn’t knocked prone.

a79746eb-362b-58a8-b99c-827ea1deb042.name: Wing Slap
a79746eb-362b-58a8-b99c-827ea1deb042.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, 10 ft., one target, 16 (2d10+5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, 10 ft., one target, 16 (2d10+5) bludgeoning damage.

0770bed6-2958-5232-afdf-0da023e9bde9.name: Muster the Legions
0770bed6-2958-5232-afdf-0da023e9bde9.description: When the imperator is reduced to half its hp or lower it magically calls 1d4 swarms of penguins. The penguins arrive on initiative count 20 of the next round acting as allies of the imperator and obeying its telepathic commands. The penguins remain for 1 hr until the imperator dies or until the imperator dismisses them as a bonus action.

attributes.description: When the imperator is reduced to half its hp or lower it magically calls 1d4 swarms of penguins. The penguins arrive on initiative count 20 of the next round acting as allies of the imperator and obeying its telepathic commands. The penguins remain for 1 hr until the imperator dies or until the imperator dismisses them as a bonus action.

76fd25ee-9de4-52d7-b74a-b1bd15364c19.name: Swarm (Imperator, Penguin Swarm)
76fd25ee-9de4-52d7-b74a-b1bd15364c19.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice-versa and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Med penguin. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temp hp.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice-versa and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Med penguin. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temp hp.

bf78f713-4e4e-525e-9d73-6edf7c0b2448.name: Tobogganing Tide
bf78f713-4e4e-525e-9d73-6edf7c0b2448.description: The swarm can move at double its walking speed over ice and snow.

attributes.description: The swarm can move at double its walking speed over ice and snow.

3f94d21a-bc71-58f1-b224-12334d5844b8.name: Aqueous Form
3f94d21a-bc71-58f1-b224-12334d5844b8.description: Can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide with o squeezing.

attributes.description: Can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide with o squeezing.

88b7e565-097f-530a-bf58-e8e03bf40ff9.name: Luminous
88b7e565-097f-530a-bf58-e8e03bf40ff9.description: Sheds dim light in a 5 ft. radius.

attributes.description: Sheds dim light in a 5 ft. radius.

28353736-2ec7-5249-b9bb-22e57cbfb909.name: Celestial Inspiration
28353736-2ec7-5249-b9bb-22e57cbfb909.description: Inspires one creature it can see within 60' of it. Whenever target makes attack roll or save before start of incandescent one's next turn target can roll a d4 and add number rolled to the attack roll or save.

attributes.description: Inspires one creature it can see within 60' of it. Whenever target makes attack roll or save before start of incandescent one's next turn target can roll a d4 and add number rolled to the attack roll or save.

e5c7a086-f8d5-54ec-8c5f-c8c6360a8130.name: Ionic Form
e5c7a086-f8d5-54ec-8c5f-c8c6360a8130.description: Whenever subjected to lightning it takes no damage and instead regains hp equal to lightning dealt. Its Supercharge then recharges. If it takes cold while supercharged it must roll a d6. On a 1 or 2 it loses the supercharged state.

attributes.description: Whenever subjected to lightning it takes no damage and instead regains hp equal to lightning dealt. Its Supercharge then recharges. If it takes cold while supercharged it must roll a d6. On a 1 or 2 it loses the supercharged state.
Dash or Dodge action.

8d122fbf-6854-5f48-b984-08ef87a8cba9.name: Supercharge
8d122fbf-6854-5f48-b984-08ef87a8cba9.description: Gathers ambient electricity to supercharge itself for 3 rounds. While supercharged slime gains +2 bonus to its AC and it gains an additional action on each of its turns. At end of the third round if the slime hasn't used the Discharge action it suffers feedback taking 18 (4d8) force. Its supercharged state then ends.

attributes.description: Gathers ambient electricity to supercharge itself for 3 rounds. While supercharged slime gains +2 bonus to its AC and it gains an additional action on each of its turns. At end of the third round if the slime hasn't used the Discharge action it suffers feedback taking 18 (4d8) force. Its supercharged state then ends.

38365f1f-7d7b-5ed7-a050-232361777b05.name: Elemental Weapons
38365f1f-7d7b-5ed7-a050-232361777b05.description: Its weapon attacks are imbued with its elemental power. When the jinnborn hits with any weapon the weapon deals an extra 1d6 lightning (included in the attack).

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are imbued with its elemental power. When the jinnborn hits with any weapon the weapon deals an extra 1d6 lightning (included in the attack).

1c5ff86d-f790-537c-8a65-cb0f5c4eceef.name: Flamboyant Defense
1c5ff86d-f790-537c-8a65-cb0f5c4eceef.description: While it is wearing no armor and wielding no shield its AC includes its Cha modifier.

attributes.description: While it is wearing no armor and wielding no shield its AC includes its Cha modifier.

bd9ed287-69a3-5cb3-bcb2-6f00a1ed2d26.name: Knows the Ropes
bd9ed287-69a3-5cb3-bcb2-6f00a1ed2d26.description: Has proficiency with airships sandships or waterborne ships (the jinnborn’s choice). It adds its proficiency bonus to any check it makes to control the chosen type of ship and it adds its proficiency bonus to any saves made while on the chosen type of vehicle.

attributes.description: Has proficiency with airships sandships or waterborne ships (the jinnborn’s choice). It adds its proficiency bonus to any check it makes to control the chosen type of ship and it adds its proficiency bonus to any saves made while on the chosen type of vehicle.

db26a23e-dd56-5f20-a41c-3eb3b0b8a868.name: Parry (Jinnborn Air Pirate)
db26a23e-dd56-5f20-a41c-3eb3b0b8a868.description: + 2 to its AC vs. one melee attack that would hit it if it can see attacker and wielding melee weapon.

attributes.description: + 2 to its AC vs. one melee attack that would hit it if it can see attacker and wielding melee weapon.

a74f727c-7574-56bd-b22f-0b2e6db73be0.name: Shrill Screech
a74f727c-7574-56bd-b22f-0b2e6db73be0.description: When agitated the jubjub bird makes a near constant shrill and high scream giving it advantage on Cha (Intimidation) checks.

attributes.description: When agitated the jubjub bird makes a near constant shrill and high scream giving it advantage on Cha (Intimidation) checks.

08d396d1-1ec2-5bdd-bf7c-d860bdda13cf.name: Stubborn
08d396d1-1ec2-5bdd-bf7c-d860bdda13cf.description: Has advantage on saves vs. being charmed. In addition Wis (Animal Handling) checks are made with disadvantage vs. the jubjub bird.

attributes.description: Has advantage on saves vs. being charmed. In addition Wis (Animal Handling) checks are made with disadvantage vs. the jubjub bird.

6683db54-6b51-5ed2-963e-cdc6763d43f5.name: Unpredictable
6683db54-6b51-5ed2-963e-cdc6763d43f5.description: Opportunity attacks vs. the jubjub bird are made with disadvantage.

attributes.description: Opportunity attacks vs. the jubjub bird are made with disadvantage.

e3fa3421-201c-5d05-aa7a-5563c0cfa248.name: Impassioned Riposte
e3fa3421-201c-5d05-aa7a-5563c0cfa248.description: When a creature the jubjub bird can see misses it with an attack while within 10 ft. of it the jubjub bird can make one Bite attack vs. the attacker.

attributes.description: When a creature the jubjub bird can see misses it with an attack while within 10 ft. of it the jubjub bird can make one Bite attack vs. the attacker.

a897ef2f-2e70-5e1e-a803-380cf0d93e76.name: Aura of Honesty
a897ef2f-2e70-5e1e-a803-380cf0d93e76.description: Creature that enters space within 10 ft. of sheriff for 1st time on a turn or starts turn there: DC 13 Cha save or be unable to speak deliberate lie until it starts its turn more than 10 ft. away from sheriff. Creatures affected by this are aware of it and sheriff knows whether creature in area succeeded/failed save.

attributes.description: Creature that enters space within 10 ft. of sheriff for 1st time on a turn or starts turn there: DC 13 Cha save or be unable to speak deliberate lie until it starts its turn more than 10 ft. away from sheriff. Creatures affected by this are aware of it and sheriff knows whether creature in area succeeded/failed save.

de00b4a7-ab97-5e83-a64a-639f46fd17cf.name: Sheriff’s Duty
de00b4a7-ab97-5e83-a64a-639f46fd17cf.description: Knows if it hears a lie and can’t speak deliberate lie.

attributes.description: Knows if it hears a lie and can’t speak deliberate lie.

2a33d081-0fe6-596b-bd8d-48bbd826a8be.name: Unfailing Memory
2a33d081-0fe6-596b-bd8d-48bbd826a8be.description: Remembers every creature that has ever spoken to it. If creature has spoken to sheriff and speaks to sheriff again while polymorphed or disguised sheriff has advantage on Int (Investigation) Wis (Insight) and Wis (Perception) checks to identify or recognize that creature.

attributes.description: Remembers every creature that has ever spoken to it. If creature has spoken to sheriff and speaks to sheriff again while polymorphed or disguised sheriff has advantage on Int (Investigation) Wis (Insight) and Wis (Perception) checks to identify or recognize that creature.

b61bced6-7ed6-5caf-be61-1e9807ece801.name: Hop Away
b61bced6-7ed6-5caf-be61-1e9807ece801.description: Takes the Dash or Disengage action.

attributes.description: Takes the Dash or Disengage action.

83ac15c1-eab0-52cc-a05e-7fb63313e6f6.name: Impaling Charge
83ac15c1-eab0-52cc-a05e-7fb63313e6f6.description: If it moves 20+' straight toward a target and then hits it with Horn attack on same turn karkadann impales target on its horn grappling the target if it is a Large or smaller creature (escape DC 15). Until the grapple ends the target is restrained takes 18 (4d8) piercing damage at start of each of its turns and karkadann can’t make horn attacks vs. other targets.

ba677cf5-520f-59eb-baa1-201444b8ff48.name: Stinging Dust
ba677cf5-520f-59eb-baa1-201444b8ff48.description: Is surrounded by a cloud of swirling dust and small stones. A creature that starts its turn within 5 ft. of the khamaseen must make DC 12 Con save or have disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of its next turn. On a successful save the creature is immune to the khamaseen’s Stinging Dust for the next 24 hrs.

fe95d202-b9d4-517a-a1a6-c808b8a938f3.name: Shock
fe95d202-b9d4-517a-a1a6-c808b8a938f3.description: If a creature wearing metal armor or wielding a metal weapon or shield moves within 5 ft. of khamaseen it takes 5 (2d4) lightning (DC 12 Dex negates).

f5adc2ef-b9b1-535c-803f-d881d9497f80.name: Deadly Infestation
f5adc2ef-b9b1-535c-803f-d881d9497f80.description: A creature that touches the khargi or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) poison as stinging insects rise up to protect the khargi.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the khargi or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) poison as stinging insects rise up to protect the khargi.

b8e582c7-df6a-5b97-8283-9362bc2f9a4c.name: Death Swarms
b8e582c7-df6a-5b97-8283-9362bc2f9a4c.description: When it dies the insects crawling across and within it burst from its body forming 2d4 swarms of insects that appear in unoccupied spaces within 5 ft. of khargi’s space.

attributes.description: When it dies the insects crawling across and within it burst from its body forming 2d4 swarms of insects that appear in unoccupied spaces within 5 ft. of khargi’s space.

914cd7f4-f2c7-5c98-9481-6a13bd0a5425.name: Infested Weapons
914cd7f4-f2c7-5c98-9481-6a13bd0a5425.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals + 2d6 poison (included below).

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals + 2d6 poison (included below).

4ff92cde-27a3-5089-bdac-b894eb497549.name: Adaptive Carapace
4ff92cde-27a3-5089-bdac-b894eb497549.description: When it takes acid cold force lightning or thunder it can magically attune itself to that type of damage. Until end of its next turn khargi has resistance to damage of the triggering type and when it hits with any weapon target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage of the triggering type.

Until end of its next turn khargi has resistance to damage of the triggering type and when it hits with any weapon target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage of the triggering type.

cc0f0d7e-f599-5657-8a41-7e2e48dd2bc8.name: Drake Mount
cc0f0d7e-f599-5657-8a41-7e2e48dd2bc8.description: Has formed a bond with Med or larger drake mount (found in this or other books or use the statistics of a giant lizard). Regardless of the drake’s intelligence it acts as a controlled mount while carrying a drake rider obeying the rider’s spoken commands. Mounting and dismounting the drake costs the drake rider only 5 ft. of movement.

attributes.description: Has formed a bond with Med or larger drake mount (found in this or other books or use the statistics of a giant lizard). Regardless of the drake’s intelligence it acts as a controlled mount while carrying a drake rider obeying the rider’s spoken commands. Mounting and dismounting the drake costs the drake rider only 5 ft. of movement.

1d763ecc-4351-56a2-8103-6b8236de51ee.name: Mounted Warrior (Kobold, Drake Rider)
1d763ecc-4351-56a2-8103-6b8236de51ee.description: While the drake rider is mounted its mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

attributes.description: While the drake rider is mounted its mount can’t be charmed or frightened.

1767e2b2-fa97-5adf-920e-cc46aaaeff4e.name: Sure Seat
1767e2b2-fa97-5adf-920e-cc46aaaeff4e.description: While mounted and not incapacitated the drake rider can’t be knocked prone dismounted or moved vs. its will.

attributes.description: While mounted and not incapacitated the drake rider can’t be knocked prone dismounted or moved vs. its will.

91d417e6-48bf-5dbc-85b3-575bd27c2980.name: Trained Tactics (Recharge 4–6)
91d417e6-48bf-5dbc-85b3-575bd27c2980.description: The drake rider commands its mount to move up to 30' in a straight line moving through the space of any Large or smaller creature and performing one of the following tactical maneuvers. This movement doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks.Barrel Roll: The mount flies up and over one creature in the line ending its movement at least 10 ft. past the target. As the drake rider hangs upside down at the top of the loop it makes one Spear attack vs. the target with advantage. On a hit the rider rolls damage dice three times. The mount must have a flying speed to use this maneuver.Corkscrew Roll: The mount swims in a corkscrew around the creatures in the line. Each creature in the line must make DC 13 Dex save or be incapacitated with dizziness until the end of its next turn. The mount must have a swimming speed to use this maneuver.Weaving Rush The mount weaves back and forth along the line. Each creature in the line must make DC 13 Str save or take 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.

329165ac-ebc5-5868-824d-cd9866eba375.name: Failsafe Equipment
329165ac-ebc5-5868-824d-cd9866eba375.description: The drake rider wears wing-like arm and feet flaps folded on its back. If its mount dies or it is dismounted the rider descends 60' per round and takes no damage from falling if its mount was flying or it gains a swimming speed of 30' for 1 min if its mount was swimming.

attributes.description: The drake rider wears wing-like arm and feet flaps folded on its back. If its mount dies or it is dismounted the rider descends 60' per round and takes no damage from falling if its mount was flying or it gains a swimming speed of 30' for 1 min if its mount was swimming.

9d3fef5d-5e36-540a-81cd-5dd5e9807ec3.name: Aura of Draconic Virtue
9d3fef5d-5e36-540a-81cd-5dd5e9807ec3.description: Kobolds within 30' of an empyrean kobold have advantage on attack rolls and ability checks. At the start of each of its turns empyrean kobold can choose to exclude any number of kobolds from this aura (no action required).

attributes.description: Kobolds within 30' of an empyrean kobold have advantage on attack rolls and ability checks. At the start of each of its turns empyrean kobold can choose to exclude any number of kobolds from this aura (no action required).

de37ff25-8923-5fac-9867-f35bf7cb6f48.name: Elemental Weapons (Kobold, Empyrean)
de37ff25-8923-5fac-9867-f35bf7cb6f48.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deal extra 3d8 acid cold fire lightning or poison (included below) kobold’s choice.

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deal extra 3d8 acid cold fire lightning or poison (included below) kobold’s choice.

9c47bcf2-0208-5f66-bf0e-b990073e299a.name: Draconic Ascension
9c47bcf2-0208-5f66-bf0e-b990073e299a.description: When a kobold it can see is reduced to 0 hp empyrean can reincarnate the kobold as a wyrmling dragon of a type befitting that kobold and its virtues. Empyrean can provide ascension to up to two kobolds each hr with this reaction.

3242649e-03b5-5b38-9d9b-26743cb263b1.name: Blessed Weapons
3242649e-03b5-5b38-9d9b-26743cb263b1.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When the hunter hits with any weapon the weapon deals an extra 3d8 radiant (included in the attack).

83d1028a-3550-5731-aefa-68e39f839592.name: Ethereal Sight (Kobold, Ghost Hunter)
83d1028a-3550-5731-aefa-68e39f839592.description: Can see 60' into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane and vice versa.

attributes.description: Can see 60' into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane and vice versa.

1a19cad1-1aa3-52a8-a251-2c245943d0d2.name: Flame Jet
1a19cad1-1aa3-52a8-a251-2c245943d0d2.description: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit 5 ft. or range 60' one target 18 (4d6+4) fire. If the target is a creature or a flammable object that isn’t being worn or carried it ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire the target takes 5 (1d10) fire at the start of each of its turns.

716cebf7-9d9e-53ac-81c4-2cf21fbe78bd.name: Hand Crossbow
716cebf7-9d9e-53ac-81c4-2cf21fbe78bd.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit 30/120' one target 9 (1d6+6) piercing damage + 13 (3d8) radiant.

b5b51c00-4581-5041-83bf-e5792583d4c2.name: Hidden Hunter
b5b51c00-4581-5041-83bf-e5792583d4c2.description: While the ghost hunter remains motionless it is invisible to Undead.

attributes.description: While the ghost hunter remains motionless it is invisible to Undead.

f950e11c-c1ab-5630-8b5c-b03f11218530.name: Holy Strike (Recharge 5–6)
f950e11c-c1ab-5630-8b5c-b03f11218530.description: The ghost hunter flips up its eyepatch to reveal a holy relic embedded within the empty socket. Each creature within 30' of the ghost hunter must make a DC 17 Dex save taking 36 (8d8) radiant on a failed save or half damage if made. If an Undead fails the save it is also stunned until the end of its next turn.

21f3721c-3072-5b2c-ad50-11c46131d26f.name: Undead Hunter
21f3721c-3072-5b2c-ad50-11c46131d26f.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find and track Undead.

attributes.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find and track Undead.

740d6dc7-fbab-563e-9bbc-3a5bc01066f0.name: Elusive Hunter
740d6dc7-fbab-563e-9bbc-3a5bc01066f0.description: Takes the Dodge or Hide action.

attributes.description: Takes the Dodge or Hide action.

fc955cd2-c801-53fd-b34b-215bf9361cad.name: Flame Burst
fc955cd2-c801-53fd-b34b-215bf9361cad.description: When a hostile creature enters a space within 5 ft. of the ghost hunter the hunter can release a burst of fire from its clockwork hand. The creature must make DC 17 Dex save or take 7 (2d6) fire and have disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes vs. the ghost hunter before the end of the ghost hunter's next turn.

769ed404-a0ed-5399-897a-94b5bfdeba1f.name: Grappling Hook
769ed404-a0ed-5399-897a-94b5bfdeba1f.description: The ghost hunter launches its grappling hook at a Large or larger object or structure or at a Huge or larger creature it can see within 60' of it and is pulled to an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of the target with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: The ghost hunter launches its grappling hook at a Large or larger object or structure or at a Huge or larger creature it can see within 60' of it and is pulled to an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of the target with o provoking opportunity attacks.

b19eeb67-ed1f-54bb-96f9-f85a07b3e2fa.name: Expert Wrestler (Kobold, Leviathan Hunter)
b19eeb67-ed1f-54bb-96f9-f85a07b3e2fa.description: Can grapple creatures that are two sizes larger than itself and can move at its full speed when dragging a creature it has grappled. If hunter grapples a Med or smaller creature target has disadvantage on its escape attempts. Hunter has advantage on ability checks and saves made to escape a grapple or end the restrained condition.

If hunter grapples a Med or smaller creature target has disadvantage on its escape attempts. Hunter has advantage on ability checks and saves made to escape a grapple or end the restrained condition.

05eadd99-0684-546c-b803-8a9f885eb9f6.name: Hardy Defense
05eadd99-0684-546c-b803-8a9f885eb9f6.description: While hunter is wearing no armor and wielding no shield its AC includes its Con modifier.

attributes.description: While hunter is wearing no armor and wielding no shield its AC includes its Con modifier.

c8213b4d-1336-5727-9225-0081681844e9.name: Leviathan Hunter
c8213b4d-1336-5727-9225-0081681844e9.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find and track Large or larger creatures with swimming speed.

1a30c58b-e2a5-5a44-ba59-93962108677c.name: Marine Weapons
1a30c58b-e2a5-5a44-ba59-93962108677c.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals an extra 2d8 cold or poison (included below) hunter’s choice.

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals an extra 2d8 cold or poison (included below) hunter’s choice.

a1a928c1-81c2-57a8-a75a-06bb001fcf82.name: Grappled Redirect
a1a928c1-81c2-57a8-a75a-06bb001fcf82.description: If it is target of an attack it can see while grappling a creature it can hold the grappled creature in the way and the grappled creature becomes attack's target instead.

attributes.description: If it is target of an attack it can see while grappling a creature it can hold the grappled creature in the way and the grappled creature becomes attack's target instead.

3b7c21ff-bd93-5a5e-8901-88f743a56dff.name: Recall Harpoon (Kobold, Leviathan Hunter)
3b7c21ff-bd93-5a5e-8901-88f743a56dff.description: Pulls on the cord connected to its harpoon returning harpoon to its empty hand. If harpoon is stuck in a creature that creature must make DC 17 Str save or be pulled up to 20' toward the hunter.

attributes.description: Pulls on the cord connected to its harpoon returning harpoon to its empty hand. If harpoon is stuck in a creature that creature must make DC 17 Str save or be pulled up to 20' toward the hunter.

381cd97c-2ab4-5e68-9e0e-1e9ce0fd56d9.name: Planar Attunement
381cd97c-2ab4-5e68-9e0e-1e9ce0fd56d9.description: At the start of each of its turns it chooses one of the following damage types: acid cold fire lightning necrotic radiant or thunder. It has resistance to the chosen damage type until start of its next turn.

attributes.description: At the start of each of its turns it chooses one of the following damage types: acid cold fire lightning necrotic radiant or thunder. It has resistance to the chosen damage type until start of its next turn.

0c3ef082-83c9-517a-bd33-9f3bb3317c33.name: Planar Weapons
0c3ef082-83c9-517a-bd33-9f3bb3317c33.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals extra 3d8 damage of the type chosen with Planar Attunement (included below).

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals extra 3d8 damage of the type chosen with Planar Attunement (included below).

94f1ace5-e730-58a7-8db2-568f4d33f7eb.name: Planes Hunter
94f1ace5-e730-58a7-8db2-568f4d33f7eb.description: Has advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find and track Celestials Fiends and Elementals.

attributes.description: Has advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find and track Celestials Fiends and Elementals.

ac8f33ac-695f-5b13-9f1a-e32c5fbffe36.name: Snaring Blade
ac8f33ac-695f-5b13-9f1a-e32c5fbffe36.description: If it scores a critical hit vs. a creature target can’t use any method of extradimensional movement including teleportation or travel to a different plane of existence for 1 min. The creature can make a DC 16 Cha save at the end of each of its turns ending effect on itself on a success.

561286d1-e631-59da-a85f-8c0cc68ceef5.name: Parry (Kobold, Planes Hunter)
561286d1-e631-59da-a85f-8c0cc68ceef5.description: + 4 to its AC vs. one melee attack that would hit it if it can see attacker and wielding melee weapon.

attributes.description: + 4 to its AC vs. one melee attack that would hit it if it can see attacker and wielding melee weapon.

f6eca8f6-683c-54ea-b166-bb06dd666dea.name: Planar Step
f6eca8f6-683c-54ea-b166-bb06dd666dea.description: Teleports along with any equipment up to 30' to an unoccupied spot it sees. Glowing swirls of elemental energy appear at origin and destination when it uses this.

attributes.description: Teleports along with any equipment up to 30' to an unoccupied spot it sees. Glowing swirls of elemental energy appear at origin and destination when it uses this.

9d794bef-a012-525f-b900-253934819f4f.name: Crafty
9d794bef-a012-525f-b900-253934819f4f.description: The sapper has advantage on ability checks made to pick locks or to detect disarm or set traps.

attributes.description: The sapper has advantage on ability checks made to pick locks or to detect disarm or set traps.

b37cebec-c007-53f8-935b-8d5966453816.name: Toxic Ichor
b37cebec-c007-53f8-935b-8d5966453816.description: While submerged in water it’s ichor taints water within 10 ft. of it. When a creature enters area for the 1st time on a turn or starts its turn there that creature must make DC 15 Con save or be poisoned while it remains in area and for 1 min after it leaves. A poisoned creature that is no longer in the water can re-save at end of each of its turns ending effect on itself on a success. If purify food and drink spell is cast on a space within 5 ft. of lotus or on space it occupies trait ceases to function for 1 min.

d97ff90e-89ed-5017-8650-08f8a2108dbd.name: Waterwalker
d97ff90e-89ed-5017-8650-08f8a2108dbd.description: Can walk across surface of water as if it were solid ground. Otherwise works like water walk but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: Can walk across surface of water as if it were solid ground. Otherwise works like water walk but isn’t itself magical.

5bf7413b-a93b-5042-b84f-f22491e08ba6.name: Life Tether
5bf7413b-a93b-5042-b84f-f22491e08ba6.description: Attaches a symbiotic tether to a creature sitting in the recess in its back. A creature in the recess that isn't attached to the tether takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage at the end of the lesion's turn and the lesion regains hp equal to the damage dealt. While the tether is attached the creature is grappled by the lesion. The lesion or the creature can detach the tether as a bonus action. Lesion can have its symbiotic tether attached to only one creature at a time.

f1a03bf5-f7ee-5fde-b9b7-f149b5bb2cac.name: Sense Magic (Ley Wanderer)
f1a03bf5-f7ee-5fde-b9b7-f149b5bb2cac.description: Senses magic within 120' of it at will. This otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: Senses magic within 120' of it at will. This otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

73c4e42f-10f7-556d-9e08-8215f24b36f1.name: Absorb Spell
73c4e42f-10f7-556d-9e08-8215f24b36f1.description: When a creature wanderer can see within 30' of it casts spell wanderer can absorb spell's energy countering it. Works like counterspell except wanderer must always make spellcasting ability check no matter spell's level. Its ability check for this is +7. If it successfully counters the spell it gains 5 temp hp/spell level.

6c3c9a71-5a69-52e1-b1dc-adda04a1142c.name: Drain Magic Item
6c3c9a71-5a69-52e1-b1dc-adda04a1142c.description: Drains the magic from an item it is holding. Magic item with charges loses 1d6 charges item with limited uses per day loses one daily use and single-use item such as potion or spell scroll is destroyed. All other magic items have their effects suppressed for 1 min. Wanderer gains 5 temp hp each time it drains a magic item. A drained item regains its magic after 24 hrs.

All other magic items have their effects suppressed for 1 min. Wanderer gains 5 temp hp each time it drains a magic item. A drained item regains its magic after 24 hrs.

71bdaa4e-e26a-5245-aa9e-674f4365ab54.name: Draw Life Essence
71bdaa4e-e26a-5245-aa9e-674f4365ab54.description: Can spend 10 min coaxing life essence out of willing creature taking only agreed amount of time from creature’s max lifetime. Essence appears as rosy mist that rises from mouth nose or skin of creature and snakes into carved crystal vial in broker’s cloak where it takes the form of a crimson liquid. Creature that drinks such a vial gains life stored within it provided broker gave vial willingly. If broker draws all remaining life from creature creature dies and can be returned to life only via wish spell.

ff42d2ac-2acf-5ccc-b623-7a4161620641.name: Life Reading
ff42d2ac-2acf-5ccc-b623-7a4161620641.description: If it spends 1 min studying a mortal creature it can see within 30' of it broker can determine the remainder of that creature’s natural life to the second.

c65b0371-c10b-5ca3-8bf4-0957e8c88770.name: Necrotic Weapons (Life Broker)
c65b0371-c10b-5ca3-8bf4-0957e8c88770.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals + 4d8 necrotic (included below).

Takes Dash Disengage or Dodge.

61d91388-9f2b-597b-a941-0bd04354a094.name: False Appearance (Light Eater)
61d91388-9f2b-597b-a941-0bd04354a094.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal rock.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal rock.

f2577ed7-26f3-5baf-a6f4-afc67b9f49ed.name: Light Absorption (Light Eater)
f2577ed7-26f3-5baf-a6f4-afc67b9f49ed.description: When it starts its turn within 5 ft. of a source of light light is reduced while eater remains within 100' of light source. Bright light becomes dim and dim becomes darkness. If eater reduces light source’s light to darkness eater sheds multicolored bright light in 20' radius and dim light for additional 20' for 1 hr and light source is extinguished if it is nonmagical flame or dispelled if it was created by 2nd level or lower spell.

503ad1b5-e3dc-5b05-bf93-e03f377b15c7.name: Emergency Flare
503ad1b5-e3dc-5b05-bf93-e03f377b15c7.description: When it takes damage can emit brilliant flash of light. Each creature within 30': blinded 1 min (DC 12 Con negates). Blinded creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself.

57480437-24bf-536d-89cd-5a38a6ccb1da.name: Brittle
57480437-24bf-536d-89cd-5a38a6ccb1da.description: If it takes cold it partially freezes; its speed is reduced by 10 ft. and its AC is reduced by 2 until end of its next turn.

bdafd7ce-8016-5847-be56-745d2791beae.name: Choking Air Form
bdafd7ce-8016-5847-be56-745d2791beae.description: Can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there and it can move through a space as narrow as 1ft. wide with o squeezing. In addition when creature starts turn in same space as soot creature: 7 (2d6) poison and be unable to breathe until it starts its turn outside soot’s space (DC 15 Con negates).

bd49420f-f01f-53f8-b7db-9a0868e94d96.name: False Appearance (Living Soot)
bd49420f-f01f-53f8-b7db-9a0868e94d96.description: While motionless indistinguishable from tangled mass of blackened dusty webbing.

7a7b4c87-aedd-5c46-8bfb-e93d6161aebc.name: Danger From Above
7a7b4c87-aedd-5c46-8bfb-e93d6161aebc.description: If it jumps 10 ft.+ straight toward a creature from a higher position than the target such as leaping down from a tree it has advantage on next attack roll it makes vs. that creature.

2dce5be7-9393-513b-928d-2b50a207bbc5.name: Swamp Camouflage (Lobe Lemur)
2dce5be7-9393-513b-928d-2b50a207bbc5.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

attributes.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

78ee130f-88d3-52c7-bd5e-ccd0c008c993.name: Change Shape (Lycanthrope, Werecrocodile)
78ee130f-88d3-52c7-bd5e-ccd0c008c993.description: Transforms into a Large crocodile or into a crocodile-humanoid hybrid or back into its true form which is Humanoid. Its stats other than size are the same in each form. Any equipment worn/carried isn't transformed. Reverts to its true form if it dies.

429ac6db-a389-591e-99d4-4599274397eb.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Lycanthrope, Wereotter)
429ac6db-a389-591e-99d4-4599274397eb.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

attributes.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

bdebd46b-311a-5b4c-af32-ed96d9772aa1.name: Change Shape (Lycanthrope, Wereotter)
bdebd46b-311a-5b4c-af32-ed96d9772aa1.description: Transforms into a Med otter-humanoid hybrid or into Large otter or back into true form: Humanoid. Stats other than size are same in each form. Items worn/ carried not transformed. Reverts to its true form if it dies.

89e43dd3-a93c-54ae-845b-dcd5a6be9963.name: Metal Sense
89e43dd3-a93c-54ae-845b-dcd5a6be9963.description: Can pinpoint by scent location of any Small or larger ferrous metal such as an iron deposit or steel armor within 100' of it. It can sense general direction of such metal within 1 mile.

fb264341-e7bf-562a-ba72-dfc7a047f01f.name: Ironhide
fb264341-e7bf-562a-ba72-dfc7a047f01f.description: When hit by a metal weapon fur-like metal spikes grow out of its hide until end of its next turn. While spikes remain its AC increases 2 and any critical hit vs. it becomes a normal hit.

attributes.description: When hit by a metal weapon fur-like metal spikes grow out of its hide until end of its next turn. While spikes remain its AC increases 2 and any critical hit vs. it becomes a normal hit.

3822cb1f-fcf3-52e7-9b23-a82b009eaf2d.name: Metal Eater
3822cb1f-fcf3-52e7-9b23-a82b009eaf2d.description: Swallows one Med or smaller ferrous metal object within 5 ft. of it. If the object is being held or worn by a creature that creature must make DC 18 Str save or malmbjorn swallows the object. If the creature holding or wearing the object is also grappled by the malmbjorn it has disadvantage on this save. Nonmagical objects are digested and destroyed at the start of malmbjorn's next turn. Magic objects remain intact in malmbjorn's stomach for 8 hrs then are destroyed. Artifacts are never destroyed in this way.

6c55f8e6-ca88-5df8-ad73-6b087b6c4c8a.name: Snake Hunter
6c55f8e6-ca88-5df8-ad73-6b087b6c4c8a.description: Has advantage on saves vs. being poisoned.

attributes.description: Has advantage on saves vs. being poisoned.

105c2709-8ee2-53cf-80d1-9f96b3088d7b.name: Corral
105c2709-8ee2-53cf-80d1-9f96b3088d7b.description: A creature in the swarm’s space must make DC 12 Dex save to leave its space. The creature has advantage on its save if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer.

attributes.description: A creature in the swarm’s space must make DC 12 Dex save to leave its space. The creature has advantage on its save if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer.

def565b5-d3c9-57c4-8848-a6e5f2ffaa8d.name: Swarm (Meerkats, Swarm)
def565b5-d3c9-57c4-8848-a6e5f2ffaa8d.description: Can occupy another creature's space and vice versa and swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny meerkat. Swarm can't regain hp or gain temp hp.

ede5702c-7ae4-59e3-9673-6e20996a4d17.name: Grassland Camouflage
ede5702c-7ae4-59e3-9673-6e20996a4d17.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in grassland terrain.

attributes.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in grassland terrain.

84b28554-78ec-51ba-8cce-817447d3fed8.name: Pounce (Megantereon)
84b28554-78ec-51ba-8cce-817447d3fed8.description: If the megantereon moves at least 20' straight toward a creature and then hits with Claw attack on the same turn that target must make DC 14 Str save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone the megantereon can make one Bite attack vs. it as a bonus action.

58ff5f81-421b-58ed-88e0-dfa39f5d6407.name: Running Leap
58ff5f81-421b-58ed-88e0-dfa39f5d6407.description: With a 10 ft. running start the megantereon can long jump up to 20'.

attributes.description: With a 10 ft. running start the megantereon can long jump up to 20'.

95c6c9eb-c6f6-5d3b-9f5e-fe6bc0384662.name: Changing Form
95c6c9eb-c6f6-5d3b-9f5e-fe6bc0384662.description: Automatically changes based on presence light.Day Form. While more than half midnight sun is in darkness it appears as a glowing orb of light but sheds no light. In this form it deals radiant has immunity to radiant and vulnerability to necrotic.Night Form. While more than half the midnight sun is in bright or dim light it appears as an orb of darkness. In this form it deals necrotic has immunity to necrotic and has vulnerability to radiant.Twilight Form. While half of it is in bright or dim light and half is in darkness it appears as split orb of light and darkness. It deals force.

047a6f23-c436-55c5-b217-ba8395ea8af8.name: Energy Being
047a6f23-c436-55c5-b217-ba8395ea8af8.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide with o squeezing and it can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature’s space on a turn that creature takes 3 (1d6) damage of the type determined by the sun’s current form.

745fa4b3-147e-5e27-9a41-20075c039b4f.name: Reality Inversion
745fa4b3-147e-5e27-9a41-20075c039b4f.description: When creature starts turn in sun’s space or within 5 ft. any circumstance trait or feature that would grant it advantage instead grants disadvantage and vice versa until start of its next turn.

c658e873-d50a-5627-bb8a-beb7baa32264.description: When a charmed creature enters a space within 15 ft. of the mindshard on a turn or starts its turn within 15 ft. of the mindshard that creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic.

attributes.description: When a charmed creature enters a space within 15 ft. of the mindshard on a turn or starts its turn within 15 ft. of the mindshard that creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic.

808dd501-ea58-5f23-b07c-b633be261d0e.name: Translucent
808dd501-ea58-5f23-b07c-b633be261d0e.description: Is invisible to creatures more than 60' away from it.

ffbd8422-6a82-53e9-8306-684e33adb4ed.name: Enthralling Defense
ffbd8422-6a82-53e9-8306-684e33adb4ed.description: When a creature the mindshard can see within 30' of it hits it with an attack that creature must make DC 14 Cha save or be charmed until end of its next turn.

e19b63b5-af30-5393-b337-f2449c0825be.name: Charge (Minotaur, Ravening)
e19b63b5-af30-5393-b337-f2449c0825be.description: If it moves 10 ft.+ straight to foe and hits with gore attack on same turn target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature it must make DC 14 Str save or be pushed up to 10 ft. away and knocked prone.

cb8aeb2b-8b29-584a-af1f-002cf34a1049.name: Labyrinthine Recall
cb8aeb2b-8b29-584a-af1f-002cf34a1049.description: Can perfectly recall any path it has traveled.

attributes.description: Can perfectly recall any path it has traveled.

fee8b1b7-a9b9-58ef-becc-266cf28f7b82.name: Ravening Hunger
fee8b1b7-a9b9-58ef-becc-266cf28f7b82.description: When it reduces a creature to 0 hp with melee attack on its turn can take a bonus action to consume creature’s heart. Its hp max increases by 5 for every ten hearts it consumes in this way.

attributes.description: When it reduces a creature to 0 hp with melee attack on its turn can take a bonus action to consume creature’s heart. Its hp max increases by 5 for every ten hearts it consumes in this way.

725f9588-c997-5c28-8ff5-e4a9f73131c2.name: Ravening Madness
725f9588-c997-5c28-8ff5-e4a9f73131c2.description: Disadvantage on Int checks and saves. Considers every creature hostile and doesn’t benefit from Help action or similar spells/effects that involve help to/from friendly creatures. Doesn’t stop spellcaster from restoring hp to it or curing ravening with magic.

5d7bffac-abaa-5459-91fb-a329c6a0b7f0.name: Reckless (Minotaur, Ravening)
5d7bffac-abaa-5459-91fb-a329c6a0b7f0.description: At the start of its turn it can choose to have advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls it makes during that turn but attack rolls vs. it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

0fe56f56-abb3-5ccc-81de-08ea1bab86e9.name: False Appearance (Monkey'S Bane Vine)
0fe56f56-abb3-5ccc-81de-08ea1bab86e9.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal vine.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal vine.

4e88e84e-ee80-5568-9806-2b155c87c1a3.name: Lubricious Plumage
4e88e84e-ee80-5568-9806-2b155c87c1a3.description: Its skin exudes an oil that permeates its plumage. The moon weaver can’t be restrained by magical or nonmagical webbing and it ignores all movement restrictions caused by webbing.

attributes.description: Its skin exudes an oil that permeates its plumage. The moon weaver can’t be restrained by magical or nonmagical webbing and it ignores all movement restrictions caused by webbing.

abfc602e-b9fb-57a3-a79b-0e72656927b5.name: Emboldening Song
abfc602e-b9fb-57a3-a79b-0e72656927b5.description: Delivers a burst of beautiful song that motivates and emboldens one friendly creature the moon weaver can see within 60' of it. If the target can hear the song it gains one Embolden die a d6. Once within the next 10 min the target can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check attack roll or save it makes.

b613bbcb-56a9-5294-aadd-3965a60e805b.name: Deathly Origins
b613bbcb-56a9-5294-aadd-3965a60e805b.description: Can be turned and damaged by holy water as Undead.

7fd8223b-f41a-58ed-99ad-f8258bb22993.name: Nightmare Leap
7fd8223b-f41a-58ed-99ad-f8258bb22993.description: Once on its turn can use half its move to step magically into dreams of sleeping creature within 5 ft. of it. Emerges from dreams of another sleeper within 1 mile of 1st appearing in unoccupied space within 5 ft. of 2nd. Each sleeper suffers a level of exhaustion as nightmares prevent restful sleep (DC 14 Wis negates). Creature that fails save by 5+ also suffers long-term madness.

fe447849-cecd-5b86-872c-9e622f3d43e2.name: Transparent
fe447849-cecd-5b86-872c-9e622f3d43e2.description: Advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks while motionless or in dim light.

c4dbd75b-313e-5bde-8013-72c176f7156f.name: Ethereal Jaunt
c4dbd75b-313e-5bde-8013-72c176f7156f.description: Magically shifts from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane or vice versa.

297c5725-82ce-59b4-9b16-f9ff7a8bd483.name: Psychic Pool
297c5725-82ce-59b4-9b16-f9ff7a8bd483.description: Absorbs psychic energy from creatures in its nightmare holding up to four Psychic Points. As a bonus action while casting a spell within 5 ft. of moppet owner can expend points equal to spell’s level to cast with o using spell slot.

e2788ba4-02fb-505b-8b30-7e70ebd4395d.name: False Appearance (Mortifera)
e2788ba4-02fb-505b-8b30-7e70ebd4395d.description: While motionless indistinguishable from bed of lotus flowers.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from bed of lotus flowers.

f957cfb6-14ed-5755-b52e-9211557722b5.name: Poisonous Tendrils
f957cfb6-14ed-5755-b52e-9211557722b5.description: A creature that starts its turn grappled by the mortifera must make DC 15 Con save or be poisoned for 1 min. A poisoned creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself.

d70307e2-ec99-5b29-9008-0eeadc3ae970.name: Hop By
d70307e2-ec99-5b29-9008-0eeadc3ae970.description: Doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it jumps out of an enemy’s reach.

attributes.description: Doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it jumps out of an enemy’s reach.

5d9e48c6-c883-52a5-af9e-cbdf0b7c4c58.name: Bog Melt
5d9e48c6-c883-52a5-af9e-cbdf0b7c4c58.description: A creature afflicted with bog melt curse can’t regain hp and its hp max is reduced by 7 (2d6) for every 24 hrs that elapse. Also when cursed creature starts its turn within 30' of a creature it can see it has a 50% chance of going into a rage until end of its turn. While raged cursed creature must attack nearest creature. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack cursed creature stalks off in a random direction seeking a target for its rage. Curse lasts until lifted by remove curse spell or similar. If curse reduces creature’s hp max to 0 creature dies and body dissolves into viscous puddle of goo. Carnivorous creatures with an Int of 3 or lower that can see or smell the goo must make DC 15 Wis save or drink the goo. After 1 min creature’s Bite Claw or Slam attack becomes infused with the curse and any creature hit by that attack: DC 15 Con save or be cursed with bog melt.

d12c6701-14f1-5d50-9a0a-e58c679803fa.description: A creature that hits the peat mummy with melee weapon attack that deals slashing damage while within 5 ft. of it:  poisoned until the end of its next turn as noxious fumes and liquefied flesh spray from the wound (DC 15 Con negates).

29d6d180-ffff-52b9-9d1d-78c7f42b735b.name: Musk
29d6d180-ffff-52b9-9d1d-78c7f42b735b.description: Emits a pungent musk around itself for 1 min. While musk is active a creature that starts its turn within 10 ft. of deer: poisoned 1 min (DC 11 Con negates). Poisoned creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. For 1 hr after creature fails this save others have advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find or track the creature unless creature spends 10+ min washing off the musk.

attributes.description: Emits a pungent musk around itself for 1 min. While musk is active a creature that starts its turn within 10 ft. of deer: poisoned 1 min (DC 11 Con negates). Poisoned creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. For 1 hr after creature fails this save others have advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find or track the creature unless creature spends 10+ min washing off the musk.
Takes the Dash action.

706fce4b-1f8d-5ffb-a619-27c9c92f747c.name: Swarm (Musk Deer, Swarm)
706fce4b-1f8d-5ffb-a619-27c9c92f747c.description: Can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny deer. Swarm can’t regain hp or gain temp hp.

attributes.description: Can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny deer. Swarm can’t regain hp or gain temp hp.

677e1c11-ef7d-5615-a43d-383b2de7bfaf.name: Musk (Musk Deer, Swarm)
677e1c11-ef7d-5615-a43d-383b2de7bfaf.description: As musk deer but save DC 12.

attributes.description: As musk deer but save DC 12.

4c012089-c7bb-50e7-bc01-ae40f7f15a23.name: Limited Telepathy (Myrmex)
4c012089-c7bb-50e7-bc01-ae40f7f15a23.description: Magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120' of it that can understand a language. This telepathy doesn’t allow receiving creature to telepathically respond.

attributes.description: Magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120' of it that can understand a language. This telepathy doesn’t allow receiving creature to telepathically respond.

bcb5dbdf-d633-5210-b284-9b3ef666a91c.name: Stone Walk
bcb5dbdf-d633-5210-b284-9b3ef666a91c.description: Difficult terrain composed of earth or stone doesn’t cost the myrmex extra movement.

attributes.description: Difficult terrain composed of earth or stone doesn’t cost the myrmex extra movement.

6d255a49-45a3-5309-98cc-9dc686167af4.name: Earth Manipulation
6d255a49-45a3-5309-98cc-9dc686167af4.description: Can manipulate and move earth within 30' of it that fits within a 5 ft. cube. This manipulation is limited only by its imagination but it often includes creating caricatures of creatures to tell stories of travels or etching symbols to denote dangerous caverns or similar markers for those in the colony. It can also choose to make the ground within 10 ft. of it difficult terrain or to make difficult terrain normal if the ground is earth or stone. Changes caused by Earth Manipulation are permanent.

It can also choose to make the ground within 10 ft. of it difficult terrain or to make difficult terrain normal if the ground is earth or stone. Changes caused by Earth Manipulation are permanent.

6b9e8f03-bfa7-5a16-b92f-7a3193697ad9.name: Earth Manipulation (Myrmex, Young)

afe4ca27-e6cb-5e4a-bb5f-731a41e41a1e.name: False Appearance (Nariphon)
afe4ca27-e6cb-5e4a-bb5f-731a41e41a1e.description: Motionless: indistinguishable from an ordinary tree.

attributes.description: Motionless: indistinguishable from an ordinary tree.

685a650d-d231-5b59-9a79-19f6c8c3b8f8.name: Vegetative Clone
685a650d-d231-5b59-9a79-19f6c8c3b8f8.description: A vegetative clone resembles the creature hit by the nariphon’s Thorn attack. Each clone uses stats of an awakened tree except it has the target’s size speed and any special senses such as darkvision. Clones are extensions of the nariphon and it can see and hear what a clone sees and hears as if it was in the clone’s space. The nariphon can switch from using its senses to using a clone’s or back again as a bonus action. Nariphon can have no more than six vegetative clones under its control at one time. Each clone remains until killed or until the nariphon dismisses it (no action required).

bd9e01b0-0586-5f8f-b14b-0daccebbc4ce.name: Bury
bd9e01b0-0586-5f8f-b14b-0daccebbc4ce.description: One creature grappled by nariphon is knocked prone dragged into ground and buried just below surface ending grapple. Victim is restrained unable to breathe or stand up. Creature including victim can use action to free buried creature via DC 18 Str.

2f3b5267-bc81-5307-8c86-7d3b804d97ba.name: Elemental Traveler
2f3b5267-bc81-5307-8c86-7d3b804d97ba.description: Doesn’t require air food drink sleep or ambient pressure.

attributes.description: Doesn’t require air food drink sleep or ambient pressure.

a18a3206-0647-5754-848c-9e721bc52584.name: Enchanted Shell
a18a3206-0647-5754-848c-9e721bc52584.description: A dome of magic covers the nautiloid just large enough to contain its shell. The nautiloid can control the ambient pressure temperature water levels and breathable air levels (for air-breathing passengers) inside allowing creatures and objects within it to exist comfortably in spite of conditions outside. Creatures and objects within the shell have total cover vs. attacks and other effects outside the nautiloid. Creatures inside the shell can exit whenever they want but nothing can pass into the shell’s dome unless the nautiloid allows it. Area inside dome is a magnificent palace carved into nautiloid’s shell complete with open ‘air’ balconies used as entrances/exits and numerous covered chambers that can comfortably hold up to 50 passengers. Palace is 60' long 30' wide and 80' tall. When it dies any creatures inside dome are expelled into unoccupied spaces near the closest exit.

fc8a2d6b-b571-5cfc-94d1-7a48843f2337.name: Limited Telepathy (Nautiloid)
fc8a2d6b-b571-5cfc-94d1-7a48843f2337.description: The nautiloid can magically communicate simple ideas emotions and images telepathically with any creature inside the magical dome that surrounds it shell. Similarly it can hear and understand any creature inside the dome regardless of the language it speaks.

1c5c4f93-074c-5bb6-80c3-4f858999a27b.name: Withdraw
1c5c4f93-074c-5bb6-80c3-4f858999a27b.description: When a creature the nautiloid can see targets it with an attack the nautiloid can pull its body into its shell gaining a +5 bonus to AC until the start of its next turn.

e19f5d92-1e68-51a3-8501-0b3d3eae9100.name: Necrotic Prison
e19f5d92-1e68-51a3-8501-0b3d3eae9100.description: Creatures restrained by its Encage automatically stabilize at 0 hp and take no further damage from Encage. If creature damaged from another source while restrained suffers death save failure as normal but immediately stabilizes if not its final death save.

6c98670e-5052-5084-b616-2ec1de39367d.description: Advantage: saves vs. turn undead effects.

ef40c3d1-87fc-583c-9347-6a05f7b168f5.description: While enlarged each friendly creature within 30' of it can’t be charmed or frightened.

b156821d-2dde-5e2d-95ea-62829cb427e5.description: If it starts its turn enlarged it can choose to end the effect and return to its normal size (no action required).

While enlarged is Large 2æ00d7 damage dice on weapon attacks (included above) and makes Str checks and Str saves with advantage. Enlarged can no longer use Evasion and Magic Resistance. If it lacks room to become Large this action fails.

While enlarged it also can no longer use the Summon Iceberg action. If it lacks the room to become Large this action fails.

0624c963-0813-5c76-ad53-ed092657ab80.description: The warrior’s long jump is up to 20' and its high jump is up to 10 ft. with or with o a running start. The warrior can’t use this trait while enlarged.

699159ba-418e-560a-832b-ca9d9061a8cd.name: Divine Weapons
699159ba-418e-560a-832b-ca9d9061a8cd.description: When it hits with any weapon deals extra 2d8 necrotic or radiant (included below) apostle’s choice.

7096e54e-371e-5b29-ba95-18abe909e410.name: Faith’s Reward
7096e54e-371e-5b29-ba95-18abe909e410.description: When it casts the bless spell it gains the benefit of the spell even if it doesn’t include itself as a target. In addition when apostle restores hp to another creature it regains hp equal to half that amount.

b49ac6e9-3866-59ca-8081-2f756e1339f5.description: At the start of its turn the atavist gains one of the following benefits until it ends the effect (no action required) or the start of its next turn:Darkvision out to a range of 30 feet.A climbing flying or swimming speed of 30 feet.Advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.Bony spikes sprout along its skin and a creature that touches the atavist or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 4 (1d8) piercing damage.

fcc64538-5210-5262-b554-e7eca7385949.name: Impenetrable Ego
fcc64538-5210-5262-b554-e7eca7385949.description: While it is conscious and wearing no armor and wielding no shield it adds its Cha modifier to its AC (included above) and saves. Advantage on saves vs. being charmed or frightened.

b51e821c-124d-5a98-a0f9-1fc96a4a47ad.description: When a creature psychophant can see targets it with attack psychophant calls for aid from its followers switching places with friendly creature within 5 ft. of it. Friendly creature becomes target of the attack instead.

db680b7a-ff6c-53b5-86d7-ed401d04982f.name: Bend the Spoon
db680b7a-ff6c-53b5-86d7-ed401d04982f.description: Chooses one nonmagical weapon it can see within 30' of it and magically warps it. If weapon is being worn or carried creature doing so can prevent warping via DC 16 Wis save. Warped weapon deals only half its normal damage on a hit and creature wielding warped weapon has disadvantage on attack rolls with it. A creature can repair a warped weapon with mending spell or by spending a short rest repairing it with the appropriate tools.

22b943a8-0c7f-596c-bb9a-058126d45c2c.description: Touches a creature within 5 ft. of it: creature regains 14 (4d6) hp.

e3bd15ea-99d0-5b90-ad7b-10b69a63f386.name: Ritual Cleansing
e3bd15ea-99d0-5b90-ad7b-10b69a63f386.description: The fixer can take 10 min to perform a cleansing ritual on a creature object or an area within 30' that is no larger than a 20' cube. For the next 8 hrs the affected creature or object is hidden from divination magic as if it was under the effects of the nondetection spell. In an area that is ritually cleansed divination spells of 4th level or lower don’t function and creatures within the area can’t be scried.

576acb0f-d81c-536e-a194-7ea09355d3ea.name: Burning Cold
576acb0f-d81c-536e-a194-7ea09355d3ea.description: A creature with resistance to cold doesn’t have resistance to the cold dealt by the frost-afflicted. A creature with immunity to cold is unaffected by this trait.

bb24194f-c1f3-5a5d-8506-dcc6b39ac549.description: The frost-afflicted is infused with minor elemental power and it requires only half the amount of food and drink that a typical humanoid of its size needs.

65441caa-a7f4-56ce-bbc8-65aace110085.description: When a creature hits the frost-afflicted with weapon attack ice bursts from the frost-afflicted. Each creature within 5 ft. of the frost-afflicted must make a DC 13 Con save taking 5 (2d4) cold on a failed save or half damage if made.

4b787968-de80-5b0e-b383-c9ce3da2e19f.name: Parasite Sense
4b787968-de80-5b0e-b383-c9ce3da2e19f.description: Advantage on attacks vs. poisoned creatures.

9b3524ae-f02b-5c4b-88d3-c299ecc36003.name: Plant-Powered Mobility
9b3524ae-f02b-5c4b-88d3-c299ecc36003.description: Opportunity attacks made vs. duelist have disadvantage. If the duelist is prone at the start of its turn it can immediately stand with o costing movement.

139cdbea-47bf-5644-9e06-8de17426c08a.name: Spore Cloud
139cdbea-47bf-5644-9e06-8de17426c08a.description: When it takes damage from a ranged attack emits a burst of thick yellow spores that surround infested duelist and heavily obscure area within 5 ft. of it. Spores dissipate at start of duelist's next turn.

2e61ec4b-1642-52e0-8452-11797da4fdfa.name: Knowledge Charm
2e61ec4b-1642-52e0-8452-11797da4fdfa.description: Carries a minor magical charm gifted to it by the organization. While wearing or carrying the charm infiltrator has proficiency in any two skills and is fluent in any one language (not included above). This proficiency and fluency last until charm is lost or destroyed or until infiltrator performs a 10-minute ritual to change the proficiency and fluency provided by the charm. If infiltrator dies charm becomes nonmagical.

9e064cf7-5a72-5a1a-a037-969a06f05522.description: When it hits with any weapon deals extra 3d6 acid cold fire lightning or thunder (included below) warlock’s choice.

9dc09148-7e23-55db-8d2b-a39cbad675d0.name: Genie Lord's Favor
9dc09148-7e23-55db-8d2b-a39cbad675d0.description: When it takes acid cold fire lightning or thunder warlock has advantage on next Elemental Burst attack it makes before end of its next turn provided Elemental Burst deals same damage as damage warlock took.

attributes.description: When it takes acid cold fire lightning or thunder warlock has advantage on next Elemental Burst attack it makes before end of its next turn provided Elemental Burst deals same damage as damage warlock took.

c3c1ce54-2d00-54d8-941b-834a11e862f3.name: Air Senses
c3c1ce54-2d00-54d8-941b-834a11e862f3.description: Can’t use blindsight underwater or in an area with o air.

attributes.description: Can’t use blindsight underwater or in an area with o air.

36a08ab7-91a1-59a3-ac08-442aa14ca2c5.name: Air Weapons
36a08ab7-91a1-59a3-ac08-442aa14ca2c5.description: When it attacks it conjures a weapon out of the air itself weapon appearing and disappearing in the blink of an eye. Air weapon is a swirl of wind in the shape of a simple or martial weapon but always deals 2d6 damage of the same type as that weapon. Air weapon shaped like a ranged weapon uses the range of that weapon except acolyte doesn’t have disadvantage on ranged attack rolls when attacking a target beyond weapon’s normal range. Air weapons don’t use any other weapon properties of weapons they mimic. Air weapon attacks are magical.
