d2880667-051e-50a7-8b27-8a5333f18ee4.name: Buoying Wind
d2880667-051e-50a7-8b27-8a5333f18ee4.description: Summons winds to break the fall of up to 5 falling creatures it can see within 60' of it. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60' per round for 1 min. If a falling creature lands before effect ends it takes no falling damage and can land on its feet.

attributes.description: Summons winds to break the fall of up to 5 falling creatures it can see within 60' of it. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60' per round for 1 min. If a falling creature lands before effect ends it takes no falling damage and can land on its feet.

6a1a7e1e-405f-5220-b951-a1e0e9a669cf.name: Drift
6a1a7e1e-405f-5220-b951-a1e0e9a669cf.description: When a creature moves to within 15 ft. of the wind acolyte the acolyte can fly up to half its flying speed.

attributes.description: When a creature moves to within 15 ft. of the wind acolyte the acolyte can fly up to half its flying speed.

4e4cb0f8-5372-54f2-8bd6-10a7b4fe2b7c.name: Limited Magic Immunity
4e4cb0f8-5372-54f2-8bd6-10a7b4fe2b7c.description: At the end of its turn any spell or magical effect with duration that is affecting the nullicorn such as hold monster or mage armor immediately ends.

attributes.description: At the end of its turn any spell or magical effect with duration that is affecting the nullicorn such as hold monster or mage armor immediately ends.

13fce0de-09f8-5c5f-9879-9ed67dc46164.name: Magic Evasion
13fce0de-09f8-5c5f-9879-9ed67dc46164.description: If it is subjected to a spell or magical effect that allows it to make a save to take only half damage it instead takes no damage if it makes the save and only half damage if it fails.

attributes.description: If it is subjected to a spell or magical effect that allows it to make a save to take only half damage it instead takes no damage if it makes the save and only half damage if it fails.

79c9a1af-b734-51fe-8d26-bc10279d7c81.name: Nullifying Blight
79c9a1af-b734-51fe-8d26-bc10279d7c81.description: A creature infected with this disease manifests symptoms 1d4 hrs after infection: fatigue light-headedness and blurry vision. When infected creature casts a spell or activates a magic item itchy rash appears and spreads as more magic is used. Until disease is cured when infected creature starts its turn wielding or wearing magic item and each time it casts a spell or activates a magic item it loses 5 (2d4) hp. At end of each long rest infected creature must make a DC 13 Con save. Fail: hp the creature loses each time it uses magic increases by 2 (1d4). A creature that makes 3 saves recovers.

5d033650-b136-517d-81a1-281df3d0ae7b.name: Sense Magic (Nullicorn)
5d033650-b136-517d-81a1-281df3d0ae7b.description: Senses magic within 120' of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: Senses magic within 120' of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

fee4872f-ed62-5ee5-bb2c-e4c8ede961cb.name: False Appearance (Oaken Sentinel)
fee4872f-ed62-5ee5-bb2c-e4c8ede961cb.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary oak tree.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary oak tree.

eca85504-72fa-54b1-af9d-4bb4041bdad7.name: Grasping Branches
eca85504-72fa-54b1-af9d-4bb4041bdad7.description: Can have up to six Grasping Branches at a time. Each Grasping Branch can be attacked (AC 16; 25 hp; vulnerability to lightning; immunity to poison and psychic). Destroying a Grasping Branch deals no damage to the oaken sentinel which can extend a replacement branch on its next turn. A Grasping Branch can also be broken if a creature takes an action and succeeds on a DC 16 Str check vs. it.

2412238d-5bb2-5447-9340-224b5fecdffa.name: False Appearance (Obeleric)
2412238d-5bb2-5447-9340-224b5fecdffa.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal boulder.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal boulder.

aab0e9f0-5adc-55e6-8383-d910035a00f0.name: Ricochet Charge (Defensive Form Only)
aab0e9f0-5adc-55e6-8383-d910035a00f0.description: If it moves 15 ft.+ straight to target and then hits target with Boulder Bash attack on same turn target has disadvantage on save vs. being knocked prone. If target is prone obeleric can move up to 15 ft. straight to 2nd target with o provoking opportunity attacks from 1st target and make one Boulder Bash attack vs. 2nd target as a bonus action if 2nd target is within its reach.

d4d666e8-4cee-56c8-85fa-24b8cc81511e.name: Defensive Roll
d4d666e8-4cee-56c8-85fa-24b8cc81511e.description: Can roll itself into a boulder-like defensive form or back into its tentacled true form. While in defensive form it has resistance to B/P/S damage from nonmagical attacks can't make Tentacle Slam or Spit Acid attacks and can't use Reflux.

attributes.description: Can roll itself into a boulder-like defensive form or back into its tentacled true form. While in defensive form it has resistance to B/P/S damage from nonmagical attacks can't make Tentacle Slam or Spit Acid attacks and can't use Reflux.

e5c4668b-fdc3-5108-876f-581132d8a053.name: Reflux
e5c4668b-fdc3-5108-876f-581132d8a053.description: When the obeleric takes bludgeoning it can vomit acid at one creature within 5 ft. of it. That creature must make DC 13 Dex save or take 3 (1d6) acid.

attributes.description: When the obeleric takes bludgeoning it can vomit acid at one creature within 5 ft. of it. That creature must make DC 13 Dex save or take 3 (1d6) acid.

466bdb60-b49a-5fe8-99c7-8b35f7caee52.name: Lava Walker
466bdb60-b49a-5fe8-99c7-8b35f7caee52.description: Can move across lava surface as if harmless solid ground. In addition can swim through lava at its walk speed.

attributes.description: Can move across lava surface as if harmless solid ground. In addition can swim through lava at its walk speed.

4c159549-114e-59d4-8258-54532214dccb.name: One with Lava
4c159549-114e-59d4-8258-54532214dccb.description: Can’t be surprised by creatures within 5 ft. of lava and  can sense any creature touching same pool of lava it is touching.

attributes.description: Can’t be surprised by creatures within 5 ft. of lava and  can sense any creature touching same pool of lava it is touching.

539012ea-929c-5a4a-9acb-e03089f5f992.name: Sharp Fragments
539012ea-929c-5a4a-9acb-e03089f5f992.description: When it takes bludgeoning each creature within 5 ft. of it takes 2 (1d4) piercing damage as shards of obsidian fly from it.

attributes.description: When it takes bludgeoning each creature within 5 ft. of it takes 2 (1d4) piercing damage as shards of obsidian fly from it.

10b983b4-37f1-5fcf-991c-6c8019bb3a57.name: Volcanic Rejuvenation
10b983b4-37f1-5fcf-991c-6c8019bb3a57.description: Regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if at least part of its body is in contact with lava. If it takes cold dmage this doesn't function at the start of its next turn. Dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

attributes.description: Regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if at least part of its body is in contact with lava. If it takes cold dmage this doesn't function at the start of its next turn. Dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

090623be-3b90-55a2-9dd2-8e2458fa1160.name: Gut Lassos
090623be-3b90-55a2-9dd2-8e2458fa1160.description: Can have up to three gut lassos at a time. Each gut lasso can be attacked (AC 13; 5 hp; immunity to poison). Destroying a lasso deals no damage to the offal walker which can extrude a replacement gut lasso on its next turn. A gut lasso can also be broken if a creature takes an action and succeeds on a DC 13 Str check vs. it.

5ef37a9b-775b-59c2-bd35-f0e3a23702c1.name: I Work for the Boss (3/Day)
5ef37a9b-775b-59c2-bd35-f0e3a23702c1.description: If subjected to an effect that would force it to make an Int Wis or Cha save while it is within 30' of its superior can use the superior’s Int Wis or Cha modifier for the save instead of its own.

attributes.description: If subjected to an effect that would force it to make an Int Wis or Cha save while it is within 30' of its superior can use the superior’s Int Wis or Cha modifier for the save instead of its own.

976dd560-0392-53d6-ad46-75681deb14e2.name: Imposing Figure
976dd560-0392-53d6-ad46-75681deb14e2.description: Uses its Str modifier instead of its Cha when making Intimidation checks (included above).

attributes.description: Uses its Str modifier instead of its Cha when making Intimidation checks (included above).

5d0f0253-8dbe-548d-b6e5-87df20d5a8dd.name: Intimidating Rebuff
5d0f0253-8dbe-548d-b6e5-87df20d5a8dd.description: When a creature the alleybasher can see within 30' of it targets it with an attack ogre can make a Str (Intimidation) check taking half a step forward snarling or otherwise spooking the attacker. If check is equal to or higher than attack roll attacker must reroll the attack using lower of the two results.

9a86edee-91fe-5690-9413-7f8ace696be7.name: Infernal Runes
9a86edee-91fe-5690-9413-7f8ace696be7.description: Its tattoos give it a +2 bonus to its AC (included above). In addition the ogre has advantage on saves vs. spells and other magical effects.

9f8054f5-8cc2-58f6-929c-8944b3e5a94c.name: Unholy Blade
9f8054f5-8cc2-58f6-929c-8944b3e5a94c.description: Infused with unholy power the ogre’s weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals an extra 2d6 necrotic (included below).

e6ae5976-ca1f-511d-a65a-8228c00ae1ea.name: Gauntleted Backhand
e6ae5976-ca1f-511d-a65a-8228c00ae1ea.description: When a creature within 5 ft. of the ogre misses the ogre with melee attack the attacker must make DC 16 Dex save or be knocked prone

962af24d-d9c0-5889-a80b-c8a4412d1ba4.name: Arcane Weapons
962af24d-d9c0-5889-a80b-c8a4412d1ba4.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals an extra 1d8 force (included below).

a39a594b-874d-517d-aad2-bd5cd7058c66.name: Artisan’s Prowess
a39a594b-874d-517d-aad2-bd5cd7058c66.description: If a magic item requires an action to activate ogre can activate it as a bonus action instead.

d1b6aa69-c048-5a13-888e-3ca87951c8a4.name: Sense Magic (Ogre, Cunning Artisan)
d1b6aa69-c048-5a13-888e-3ca87951c8a4.description: Senses magic within 120' of it at will. Otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: Senses magic within 120' of it at will. Otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn’t itself magical.

97a90881-e4f4-5049-b7ab-d235b6c158e5.name: Scent of Death
97a90881-e4f4-5049-b7ab-d235b6c158e5.description: Any creature that isn’t Undead and that starts its turn within 5 ft. of the kadag ogre: poisoned until the start of its next turn (DC 15 Con negates and target immune to the kadag ogre’s Scent of Death for 1 hr).

attributes.description: Any creature that isn’t Undead and that starts its turn within 5 ft. of the kadag ogre: poisoned until the start of its next turn (DC 15 Con negates and target immune to the kadag ogre’s Scent of Death for 1 hr).

7da3ea7f-f3d8-5d9b-90b5-fd1e5b203509.name: Undead Affinity
7da3ea7f-f3d8-5d9b-90b5-fd1e5b203509.description: An Undead has disadvantage on attack rolls vs. the kadag ogre if the ogre hasn’t attacked that Undead within the past 24 hrs. In addition each skeleton and zombie within 30' of the kadag ogre that has no master follows ogre’s verbal commands until a master asserts magical control over it.

52c95e37-a91b-5a81-b002-0cc2fdf54e37.name: Devouring Charge (Boar Form Only)
52c95e37-a91b-5a81-b002-0cc2fdf54e37.description: If it moves at least 20' straight toward a target and then hits it with Tusk attack on the same turn the target must make DC 14 Str save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone the ogre can make one Bite attack vs. it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If it moves at least 20' straight toward a target and then hits it with Tusk attack on the same turn the target must make DC 14 Str save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone the ogre can make one Bite attack vs. it as a bonus action.

2fde6c14-5294-5bc1-b81c-23ab67edea83.name: Change Shape (Ogre, Rainforest)
2fde6c14-5294-5bc1-b81c-23ab67edea83.description: Transforms into a Large boar or back into its true ogre form. Its stats are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Reverts on death.

attributes.description: Transforms into a Large boar or back into its true ogre form. Its stats are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Reverts on death.

ff70709d-c5e3-52d7-b2b1-eb7a527e1b96.name: Stone Chomper
ff70709d-c5e3-52d7-b2b1-eb7a527e1b96.description: The rockchewer ogre deals double damage to stone objects and structures with its bite attack.

attributes.description: The rockchewer ogre deals double damage to stone objects and structures with its bite attack.
Uses Chew Rock.

303fc3f9-414e-5977-b71c-a45f004241bf.name: Rock Catching
303fc3f9-414e-5977-b71c-a45f004241bf.description: If a rock or similar object is hurled at the rockchewer ogre the ogre can with successful DC 10 Dex save catch the missile and take no bludgeoning from it.

attributes.description: If a rock or similar object is hurled at the rockchewer ogre the ogre can with successful DC 10 Dex save catch the missile and take no bludgeoning from it.

71b6a3e4-5601-54df-a12d-04a0d48fa7ea.name: Tentacle Senses
71b6a3e4-5601-54df-a12d-04a0d48fa7ea.description: Can’t use its tremorsense while grappled or restrained.

attributes.description: Can’t use its tremorsense while grappled or restrained.

58a96128-f457-539c-bc25-f504f3027bed.name: Volatile Stomach
58a96128-f457-539c-bc25-f504f3027bed.description: When it takes bludgeoning piercing or slashing can regurgitate some of its stomach contents. Each creature within 5 ft. of it: 4 (1d8) necrotic and be poisoned until end of its next turn (DC 15 Con negates). A pool of Void infused stomach contents forms in a space ogre can see within 5 ft. of it and lasts until start of ogre's next turn. A creature that enters pool for first time on a turn or starts its turn there: 4 (1d8) necrotic.

9f31df37-5967-564f-a93d-fd7caf72331f.name: Experienced Sailor
9f31df37-5967-564f-a93d-fd7caf72331f.description: Advantage on Str (Athletics) checks made to climb while on a sailing ship and on Dex (Acrobatics) checks to maintain its footing while on a sailing ship.

attributes.description: Advantage on Str (Athletics) checks made to climb while on a sailing ship and on Dex (Acrobatics) checks to maintain its footing while on a sailing ship.

1ed55757-d13c-5233-a799-bee312923219.name: Seaside Rejuvenation
1ed55757-d13c-5233-a799-bee312923219.description: If at least one of its accusers is still alive or if its name hasn’t been cleared destroyed old salt gains new body in 13 days regaining all hp and becoming active again. New body appears on beach or dock nearest one of its living accusers.

attributes.description: If at least one of its accusers is still alive or if its name hasn’t been cleared destroyed old salt gains new body in 13 days regaining all hp and becoming active again. New body appears on beach or dock nearest one of its living accusers.
Take Dash Disengage or Hide.

cebfa6c6-34e7-5bcb-a772-eef376f1a6b2.name: False Appearance (Ooze, Leavesrot)
cebfa6c6-34e7-5bcb-a772-eef376f1a6b2.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary pile of leaves.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary pile of leaves.

dcd9bfb1-8299-5f24-a32c-f84b8e6fbaa3.name: Rotting Leaves
dcd9bfb1-8299-5f24-a32c-f84b8e6fbaa3.description: When a creature hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it mold spores and decomposing matter fly from the wound. Each creature within 5 ft. of it: poisoned until the end of its next turn (DC 13 Con negates).

attributes.description: When a creature hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it mold spores and decomposing matter fly from the wound. Each creature within 5 ft. of it: poisoned until the end of its next turn (DC 13 Con negates).

3fcd86a6-6c5e-5a7d-a8c8-811be105f27b.name: Eye-Watering Stench
3fcd86a6-6c5e-5a7d-a8c8-811be105f27b.description: Gives off an odor so pungent it can bring tears to the eyes. A creature that starts its turn within 20' of the ooze: disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of its next turn (DC 13 Con negates).

attributes.description: Gives off an odor so pungent it can bring tears to the eyes. A creature that starts its turn within 20' of the ooze: disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of its next turn (DC 13 Con negates).

73fa92bb-6f01-5ae9-ad4a-3e4bcfcde5eb.name: Flammable
73fa92bb-6f01-5ae9-ad4a-3e4bcfcde5eb.description: If it takes fire damage it bursts into flame until the end of its next turn. When it hits with Pseudopod attack while on fire the Pseudopod deals an extra 3 (1d6) fire.

attributes.description: If it takes fire damage it bursts into flame until the end of its next turn. When it hits with Pseudopod attack while on fire the Pseudopod deals an extra 3 (1d6) fire.

dffa4510-c11d-564c-a5ac-3eb3b231bebf.name: Split
dffa4510-c11d-564c-a5ac-3eb3b231bebf.description: When a Med or larger manure ooze is subjected to slashing damagesplits into 2 new oozes if it has 10+ hp. Each new ooze has half original's hp rounded down. New oozes are one size smaller than original.

attributes.description: When a Med or larger manure ooze is subjected to slashing damagesplits into 2 new oozes if it has 10+ hp. Each new ooze has half original's hp rounded down. New oozes are one size smaller than original.

f2ea5b36-df30-5271-811a-3f1879493291.name: Corrosive Form
f2ea5b36-df30-5271-811a-3f1879493291.description: A creature that touches it or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 10 (3d6) acid.

2665c45b-886d-5e4a-b65c-e1b40c49f6dc.name: Grasping Pseudopod
2665c45b-886d-5e4a-b65c-e1b40c49f6dc.description: Launches a pseudopod at one creature it can see within 30' of it. Target must make DC 17 Str save or be pulled up to 30' toward the ooze.

attributes.description: Launches a pseudopod at one creature it can see within 30' of it. Target must make DC 17 Str save or be pulled up to 30' toward the ooze.

03d34d4b-8793-59d4-b91e-011903436529.name: Lunging Attack
03d34d4b-8793-59d4-b91e-011903436529.description: Makes one Weapon Thrash attack at a creature it can see within 10 ft. of it.

attributes.description: Makes one Weapon Thrash attack at a creature it can see within 10 ft. of it.

ebb81197-69d5-5a66-8f93-b6c2170d6c1f.name: Shed Oozling
ebb81197-69d5-5a66-8f93-b6c2170d6c1f.description: When it has more than 10 hp and is subjected to acid cold lightning or slashing it can lose 10 hp to create an oozling: same stats as scintillating ooze except it is Tiny has 10 hp can't make Weapon Thrashes and can't use this reaction or legendary actions.

b1ab009c-f877-5afa-9c63-72e9636b7409.name: False Appearance (Ooze, Shoal)
b1ab009c-f877-5afa-9c63-72e9636b7409.description: Until it attacks indistinguishable from a large school of fish.

600e720a-ea6c-54b1-b8df-95c01abf1dc9.name: Symbiotically Bound
600e720a-ea6c-54b1-b8df-95c01abf1dc9.description: The ooze and fish’s life force have become entwined. Share stats as if one creature and can't be separated.

16586e7b-2b6a-5dce-95d1-8967df305424.name: Hollow Cylindrical Form (Stretched Body Only)
16586e7b-2b6a-5dce-95d1-8967df305424.description: Creatures can occupy space in center of cylinder formed by the ooze and each such space is always within ooze’s reach regardless of cylinder's size.

attributes.description: Creatures can occupy space in center of cylinder formed by the ooze and each such space is always within ooze’s reach regardless of cylinder's size.

bee51e05-3e83-51c5-8f55-6402920df835.name: Ooze Nature (Ooze, Sinkhole)
bee51e05-3e83-51c5-8f55-6402920df835.description: The sinkhole ooze doesn’t require sleep.

attributes.description: The sinkhole ooze doesn’t require sleep.

71a4bec7-8527-553c-a7c9-8e73fbe10937.name: Seizing Pseudopods
71a4bec7-8527-553c-a7c9-8e73fbe10937.description: Can have up to 6 tendril-like Pseudopods at a time. Each can be attacked (AC 10; 10 hp; immunity to acid poison and psychic). Destroying Pseudopod deals no damage to ooze which can extrude a replacement on its next turn. Pseudopod can also be broken if creature takes an action and makes DC 14 Str check.

ec919f94-4b09-51ed-ae95-03fdf03601c8.name: Slimy Appearance (Stretched Body Only)
ec919f94-4b09-51ed-ae95-03fdf03601c8.description: While it remains motionless is indistinguishable from interior of the pit or hole in the ground it is stretched across though interior walls appear wet.

10a829b6-c1e1-5aa6-938d-ce2be174c1ef.name: Pluck
10a829b6-c1e1-5aa6-938d-ce2be174c1ef.description: When 1+ creature falls down center of its cylinder can try to grab up to 2 of them. Each must make DC 14 Dex save or grappled (escape DC 14) in Pseudopod.

6f00b082-e6ba-54ca-a6db-02b5fe1a876e.name: Stretch Body (Ooze, Sinkhole)
6f00b082-e6ba-54ca-a6db-02b5fe1a876e.description: Stretches body around inner walls of a pit sinkhole or other circular opening in the ground. Stretched this way it forms a hollow cylinder up to 25 ft. tall up to 25 ft. radius. Ooze can end stretch as a bonus action occupying nearest unoccupied space to the hole.

86cc3ff6-5a05-5cc2-bded-b8c933f3feb9.name: False Appearance (Ooze, Sinoper)
86cc3ff6-5a05-5cc2-bded-b8c933f3feb9.description: While motionless indistinguishable from that work of art.

811744f5-759b-5ecc-9be0-12eda6187ef9.name: False Appearance (Ooze, Snow)
811744f5-759b-5ecc-9be0-12eda6187ef9.description: While motionless indistinguishable from patch of snow.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from patch of snow.

da4a0437-500f-5302-b7f0-28ae352f848d.name: Ice Walk (Ooze, Snow)
da4a0437-500f-5302-b7f0-28ae352f848d.description: Can move across icy surfaces with o ability check. Difficult terrain of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra move.

attributes.description: Can move across icy surfaces with o ability check. Difficult terrain of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra move.

0e153c8d-ec47-556b-a5c4-83b46f033c84.name: Snow Blindness
0e153c8d-ec47-556b-a5c4-83b46f033c84.description: When a creature that can see the snow ooze starts its turn within 30' of it that creature is blinded until the start of its next turn (DC 15 Con negates). This doesn’t function while ooze is in dim light or darkness.

attributes.description: When a creature that can see the snow ooze starts its turn within 30' of it that creature is blinded until the start of its next turn (DC 15 Con negates). This doesn’t function while ooze is in dim light or darkness.

7feef72e-7f1f-5ec9-8562-229e448f8ddb.name: Snow Burrower (Ooze, Snow)
7feef72e-7f1f-5ec9-8562-229e448f8ddb.description: Can burrow through nonmagical snow and ice in addition to sand earth and mud.

attributes.description: Can burrow through nonmagical snow and ice in addition to sand earth and mud.

b749f216-4929-559e-b0c3-176e427467a4.name: Painting Portal
b749f216-4929-559e-b0c3-176e427467a4.description: Uses 10 ft. of move to step magically into one artwork within reach and emerge from 2nd artwork within 100' of 1st appearing in unoccupied space within 5 ft. of 2nd. If both are Large or larger can bring up to 3 willing creatures.

attributes.description: Uses 10 ft. of move to step magically into one artwork within reach and emerge from 2nd artwork within 100' of 1st appearing in unoccupied space within 5 ft. of 2nd. If both are Large or larger can bring up to 3 willing creatures.

223c2731-6ccb-5c3c-b431-5751db693ad1.name: Echolocation (Pelagic Blush Worm)
223c2731-6ccb-5c3c-b431-5751db693ad1.description: Can’t use its blindsight while deafened.

attributes.description: Can’t use its blindsight while deafened.

a6c86a46-7d21-5099-a9ba-85052a746108.name: Elemental Demise (Peri)
a6c86a46-7d21-5099-a9ba-85052a746108.description: If the peri dies its body disintegrates into a warm breeze leaving behind only the equipment the peri was wearing or carrying.

attributes.description: If the peri dies its body disintegrates into a warm breeze leaving behind only the equipment the peri was wearing or carrying.

bcda7bf7-aa44-557f-9797-a93982587467.name: Celestial Weapons (Pescavitus)
bcda7bf7-aa44-557f-9797-a93982587467.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon does extra 2d4 radiant (included below).

attributes.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon does extra 2d4 radiant (included below).

4f2458ee-267f-5988-8da8-ef52611387a9.name: Piscine Curse
4f2458ee-267f-5988-8da8-ef52611387a9.description: When a creature reduces the pescavitus to 0 hp that creature is cursed for 5 days (DC 13 Cha negates). Cursed creature can be detected as a fiend with spells such as detect evil and good. In addition for the duration cursed creature gains only half the benefit of magic that restores hp and gains no benefits from finishing a long rest. A creature that consumes any amount of the flesh of a pescavitus is automatically cursed. Curse can be lifted by a remove curse spell or similar magic.

c918a700-7bd1-5b5a-ac5d-9bcc24561733.name: Fiery Feathers
c918a700-7bd1-5b5a-ac5d-9bcc24561733.description: Sheds 10 ft. radius bright light dim light extra 10 ft..

attributes.description: Sheds 10 ft. radius bright light dim light extra 10 ft..

633fcaff-f1f1-5fd1-b1a6-16dfee81d97a.name: Rebirth (1/Day)
633fcaff-f1f1-5fd1-b1a6-16dfee81d97a.description: If reduced to 0 hp it erupts in a burst of flame. Each creature within 10 ft. of it takes 3 (1d6) fire and the phoenixborn regains hp equal to the total damage taken.

attributes.description: If reduced to 0 hp it erupts in a burst of flame. Each creature within 10 ft. of it takes 3 (1d6) fire and the phoenixborn regains hp equal to the total damage taken.
As above but rebirth: 7 (2d6).

763cecb4-42ea-5ae0-b63a-6924532dde64.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Porcellina)
763cecb4-42ea-5ae0-b63a-6924532dde64.description: The porcillina has advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

attributes.description: The porcillina has advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

e8ca83d7-c906-5f2b-bbf2-541755525467.name: Poisonous Flesh
e8ca83d7-c906-5f2b-bbf2-541755525467.description: A creature that touches the porcellina or consumes the meat of the porcellina must make DC 11 Con save or become poisoned for 1 hr.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the porcellina or consumes the meat of the porcellina must make DC 11 Con save or become poisoned for 1 hr.

3e16dad3-03e0-5f40-912d-d5d9c251d30c.name: Squeal
3e16dad3-03e0-5f40-912d-d5d9c251d30c.description: When a porcellina is hit with an attack it can let out a blood-curdling scream. Each creature within 10 ft. of the porcellina must make DC 11 Wis save or become frightened until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: When a porcellina is hit with an attack it can let out a blood-curdling scream. Each creature within 10 ft. of the porcellina must make DC 11 Wis save or become frightened until the end of its next turn.

397f3dd9-62f0-5277-b756-aa1ecaa76ad1.name: Elemental Attacks
397f3dd9-62f0-5277-b756-aa1ecaa76ad1.description: Her weapon attacks are magical. When she hits with any weapon it deals extra 5d6 damage of Roiling Elements type.

attributes.description: Her weapon attacks are magical. When she hits with any weapon it deals extra 5d6 damage of Roiling Elements type.

07082d34-a130-57ef-b666-435a8d630387.name: Elemental Aura
07082d34-a130-57ef-b666-435a8d630387.description: At start of each of her turns each creature within 5 ft. of her takes 10 (3d6) damage of Roiling Elements type. Creature that touches her or hits her with melee attack while within 10 ft. of her: 10 (3d6) damage of Roiling Elements type. Nonmagical weapon that hits her is destroyed after dealing damage.

Creature that touches her or hits her with melee attack while within 10 ft. of her: 10 (3d6) damage of Roiling Elements type. Nonmagical weapon that hits her is destroyed after dealing damage.

af32b25a-7e13-5ccd-b7f3-599af8065ad5.name: Elemental Lash
af32b25a-7e13-5ccd-b7f3-599af8065ad5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, 15 ft., one target, 32 (4d10+10) bludgeoning damage + 17 (5d6) damage of the type determined by Roiling Elements.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, 15 ft., one target, 32 (4d10+10) bludgeoning damage + 17 (5d6) damage of the type determined by Roiling Elements.

50edbf09-b0c0-50bd-8444-b74012787139.name: Roiling Elements
50edbf09-b0c0-50bd-8444-b74012787139.description: At the start of each of her turns she chooses one of the following damage types: acid cold fire lightning or thunder. She has immunity to that damage type until the start of her next turn.

attributes.description: At the start of each of her turns she chooses one of the following damage types: acid cold fire lightning or thunder. She has immunity to that damage type until the start of her next turn.

799e5949-1092-54ca-8748-9db9095d06fc.name: Storm Blast
799e5949-1092-54ca-8748-9db9095d06fc.description: The primordial matriarch emits elemental energy in a 90' cone. Each creature in the area: 21 (6d6) damage of the type determined by Roiling Elements and suffers one of the following effects depending on the damage type (DC 20 Dex half damage and no additional effect unless specified below).Acid Blast Fail: creature is covered in acid. At the start of each of its turns it takes 7 (2d6) acid until it or another creature takes an action to scrape or wash off the acid.Cold Blast Fail: creature is restrained by ice until end of its next turn or until it or another creature takes an action to break it free. Success: creature’s speed is reduced by 10 ft. until end of its next turn.Fire Blast Fail: creature catches fire. Until it or another creature takes an action to douse the fire creature takes 7 (2d6) fire at the start of each of its turns.Lightning Blast Fail: creature incapacitated until end of its next turn. Succcess: creature can’t take reactions until start of its next turn.Thunder Blast Fail: creature is deafened for 1 min. At the end of each of its turns a deafened creature can repeat the save ending deafness on itself on a success. Success: creature is deafened until the end of its next turn.

2d904a89-9154-54e8-8c35-e5e657661c33.name: Elemental Adaptation
2d904a89-9154-54e8-8c35-e5e657661c33.description: When she would take acid cold fire lightning or thunder she can change the element selected with Roiling Elements to that type of damage gaining immunity to that damage type including the triggering damage.

attributes.description: When she would take acid cold fire lightning or thunder she can change the element selected with Roiling Elements to that type of damage gaining immunity to that damage type including the triggering damage.

49cdf11c-1275-523c-a088-493c485c1f81.name: Elemental Change
49cdf11c-1275-523c-a088-493c485c1f81.description: Changes the damage immunity granted by Roiling Elements.

attributes.description: Changes the damage immunity granted by Roiling Elements.

7d9ea0d9-ed80-5015-a17a-6fec02564696.name: Fly (Primordial Matriarch)
7d9ea0d9-ed80-5015-a17a-6fec02564696.description: Up to half her flying speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: Up to half her flying speed with o provoking opportunity attacks.

fcfeac4a-5aa6-5747-b3fb-e1164c6ebdb5.name: Return to Mother
fcfeac4a-5aa6-5747-b3fb-e1164c6ebdb5.description: Absorbs Elemental within 10 ft. of her gaining temp hp equal to 10 times the CR of Elemental absorbed.

attributes.description: Absorbs Elemental within 10 ft. of her gaining temp hp equal to 10 times the CR of Elemental absorbed.

89fd1928-9064-55f9-9d7f-a7bae01bbc4b.name: Life From Death
89fd1928-9064-55f9-9d7f-a7bae01bbc4b.description: When it dies explodes in burst of raw creation. 50' radius area centered on it is blanketed in lush native flora providing food to feed 12 Large or smaller creatures for 6 (1d12) days. Creatures in area dead up to 1 day are returned to life with 4 (1d8) hp.

de3227f6-1b97-5ab6-b6dc-80bf82652b6d.name: Primordial Form
de3227f6-1b97-5ab6-b6dc-80bf82652b6d.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide with o squeezing. A creature that touches it or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) acid cold fire lightning or thunder (surge’s choice). Also it can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. The 1st time it enters a creature’s space on a turn that creature takes 7 (2d6) acid cold fire lightning or thunder (surge’s choice). A creature that starts its turn in surge’s space: blinded and deafened until it starts its turn outside surge’s space (DC 18 Con negates).

71a5b383-41e6-5ea0-8ec0-89a8b920c328.name: Beguiling Aura
71a5b383-41e6-5ea0-8ec0-89a8b920c328.description: The mere sight of the púca is a temptation for road-weary travelers. Whenever a creature that can see it starts its turn within 30' of it creature is charmed 1 min (DC 15 Wis negates). A charmed creature must take Dash action and move toward púca by safest available route on each of its turns trying to get within 5 ft. of the horse to mount it. Each time creature takes damage and at end of each of its turns it can re-save ending effect on itself on success. If creature’s save succeeds or effect ends creature immune to púca’s Beguiling Aura next 24 hrs.

22e42ae9-7276-5f96-84e7-c355d6a8391b.name: Nightmarish Ride
22e42ae9-7276-5f96-84e7-c355d6a8391b.description: If a creature mounts the púca creature paralyzed and restrained by chains on púca’s back until the next dawn (DC 15 Cha negates paralysis and restrained). While it has a rider captured this way púca takes Dash or Disengage actions on each of its turns to flee with rider. After it moves 100' it disappears with captured rider magically racing along a nightmarish landscape. At the next dawn it returns to the space where it disappeared or the nearest unoccupied space the rider lands in an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of púca and púca flees. At the end of the ride rider suffers one level of exhaustion.

6cde75fc-912a-5211-be0d-30cb9b85ff18.name: Blessings of the Sea Gods
6cde75fc-912a-5211-be0d-30cb9b85ff18.description: Has advantage on saves while flying over or swimming in ocean waters.

attributes.description: Has advantage on saves while flying over or swimming in ocean waters.

de7f1261-7958-5f71-b6cf-44166d7a1ee3.name: Hardy Ocean Explorers
de7f1261-7958-5f71-b6cf-44166d7a1ee3.description: Considered a Med creature when determining its carrying capacity. Holds its breath 30 min.

attributes.description: Considered a Med creature when determining its carrying capacity. Holds its breath 30 min.

472d8322-9993-5f9f-8096-3b298a10b813.name: Oceanic Recall
472d8322-9993-5f9f-8096-3b298a10b813.description: Can perfectly recall any path it has traveled above or within an ocean.

attributes.description: Can perfectly recall any path it has traveled above or within an ocean.

fb3f47f5-7389-5ff7-9d7a-f99c26c8fff9.name: Quick and Nimble
fb3f47f5-7389-5ff7-9d7a-f99c26c8fff9.description: When a creature the puffinfolk can see targets it with melee or ranged weapon attack puffinfolk darts out of the way and attacker has disadvantage on the attack.

attributes.description: When a creature the puffinfolk can see targets it with melee or ranged weapon attack puffinfolk darts out of the way and attacker has disadvantage on the attack.

7253c57a-bfbf-59cd-945e-5bf2a1afe21e.name: False Appearance (Pyrite Pile)
7253c57a-bfbf-59cd-945e-5bf2a1afe21e.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal pile of gold nuggets.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from normal pile of gold nuggets.

89e61eae-22f9-540c-8fd7-bdb6d9cdb3cf.name: Gold Fever
89e61eae-22f9-540c-8fd7-bdb6d9cdb3cf.description: When a Humanoid or xorn that can see the pile starts its turn within 60' of pile creature must make DC 15 Wis save or be charmed until end of its next turn. Charmed creature must take Dash action and move toward pile by safest available route on its next turn trying to get within 5 ft. of pile.

689fbc4e-2f51-54a4-9b5b-6ba1ef976afe.name: Metal Sense (Pyrite Pile)
689fbc4e-2f51-54a4-9b5b-6ba1ef976afe.description: Can pinpoint by scent the location of precious metals within 60' of it and can sense the general direction of Small or larger deposits of such metals within 1 mile.

b578b4ce-e35e-5e33-90b9-43b79214b33d.name: False Appearance (Pyrrhic Podthrower)
b578b4ce-e35e-5e33-90b9-43b79214b33d.description: While motionless indistinguishable from clump of crabgrass.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from clump of crabgrass.

2b95f14f-a39b-5047-a3dd-4973dcc312c9.name: Flaming Seedpod Regrowth
2b95f14f-a39b-5047-a3dd-4973dcc312c9.description: Has four Flaming Seedpods. Used Flaming Seedpods may regrow each turn. If podthrower starts its turn with less than four Flaming Seedpods roll a d6. On a roll of 5 or 6 it regrows 1d4 Flaming Seedpods to a max of 4.

839a8918-f2ab-50d1-a9f5-f4df255a7877.name: Regeneration (Pyrrhic Podthrower)
839a8918-f2ab-50d1-a9f5-f4df255a7877.description: Regains 10 hp at the start of its turn. If it takes necrotic or if it is grappled and removed from the ground this trait doesn’t function at start of its next turn. It dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

d7019fd8-c197-531d-bde2-bab0cf6ffc55.name: Unstable Bulb
d7019fd8-c197-531d-bde2-bab0cf6ffc55.description: When podthrower is grappled and removed from the ground while above 0 hp its bulb bursts. Each creature within 10 ft.: 12 (5d4) fire (DC 15 Dex half).

attributes.description: When podthrower is grappled and removed from the ground while above 0 hp its bulb bursts. Each creature within 10 ft.: 12 (5d4) fire (DC 15 Dex half).

c7ac57f1-4bc3-5c12-bc10-fb8f6a9f2fdc.name: Knife Dancer
c7ac57f1-4bc3-5c12-bc10-fb8f6a9f2fdc.description: When the quagga hits a creature with Twin Blade attack it doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it moves out of that creature’s reach.

attributes.description: When the quagga hits a creature with Twin Blade attack it doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it moves out of that creature’s reach.

a43e40bf-c8b2-5b35-a488-fa102e8a512e.name: Trampling Charge (Quagga)
a43e40bf-c8b2-5b35-a488-fa102e8a512e.description: If the quagga moves at least 20' straight toward a target and then hits it with Twin Blade attack on the same turn that target must make DC 14 Str save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone the quagga can make one Hooves attack vs. it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If the quagga moves at least 20' straight toward a target and then hits it with Twin Blade attack on the same turn that target must make DC 14 Str save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone the quagga can make one Hooves attack vs. it as a bonus action.

8693fd8e-6218-5c14-a204-f6adb8917d0d.name: War Surge
8693fd8e-6218-5c14-a204-f6adb8917d0d.description: When the quagga reduces a creature to 0 hp with melee attack on its turn the quagga can move up to half its speed and make a Twin Blade attack.

attributes.description: When the quagga reduces a creature to 0 hp with melee attack on its turn the quagga can move up to half its speed and make a Twin Blade attack.

7087eb63-9fdc-5e40-b0a5-ff3f4c83400b.name: Final Gift
7087eb63-9fdc-5e40-b0a5-ff3f4c83400b.description: When it dies it bursts in a shower of sand. A qumdaq of dying qumdaq’s choice within 10 ft. of it regains 5 (2d4) hp or target gains 5 (2d4) temp hp if at its max.

attributes.description: When it dies it bursts in a shower of sand. A qumdaq of dying qumdaq’s choice within 10 ft. of it regains 5 (2d4) hp or target gains 5 (2d4) temp hp if at its max.

26801165-196e-52e8-9663-52b893603efc.name: Horde Tactics
26801165-196e-52e8-9663-52b893603efc.description: Has advantage on attack rolls vs. a creature if 1+ qumdaq’s ally is within 5 ft. of creature and ally isn’t incapacitated. Also qumdaq’s weapon attacks deal extra 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage on a hit if 3+ qumdaq’s allies are within 5 ft. of target and allies aren’t incapacitated.

96bdf3c4-f526-5fbe-ab08-624d69a5c4dd.name: Sense Magic (Qumdaq)
96bdf3c4-f526-5fbe-ab08-624d69a5c4dd.description: Senses magic within 60' of it at will. This otherwise works like detect magic but isn’t itself magical.

attributes.description: Senses magic within 60' of it at will. This otherwise works like detect magic but isn’t itself magical.

d83b9a26-fb54-50b0-8a3f-83a6d096ae24.name: Symbiote
d83b9a26-fb54-50b0-8a3f-83a6d096ae24.description: Can bond with willing Humanoid creature that remains in physical contact with it for 10 min. While bonded this way host gains +2 bonus to AC and saves and resistance to all damage and rafflesian’s speed is 0 moving with host when it moves. Each time host takes damage rafflesian takes same amount. If host is subjected to effect that would force it to save host can use its save bonuses or rafflesian’s. If both are subjected to same effect only one is affected rafflesian’s choice. Rafflesian and host otherwise retain their own stats and take separate turns. Rafflesian and host can’t be separated unless rafflesian chooses to terminate connection. Rafflesian can detach itself safely from host over course of 1 hr or can detach itself from creature as an action which immediately kills host.

3c75d9e5-929a-5d2c-b814-315d297d3d34.name: Symbiotic Thought
3c75d9e5-929a-5d2c-b814-315d297d3d34.description: Bonded it and host communicate telepathically.

attributes.description: Bonded it and host communicate telepathically.

2315d43a-735e-5ef5-9bcc-1383f35219ab.name: Last Resort
2315d43a-735e-5ef5-9bcc-1383f35219ab.description: When host dies rafflesian can reanimate it up to 10 days if body is still intact. During this time host protected from decay and can't become undead. Rafflesian can use bonus action to cause host to move as in life but host can't take other actions. If host could speak in life rafflesian can speak with host's voice. Host reanimated this way can be restored to life by any spell capable of that.

3842ce8b-af9f-5b6a-995f-ae41e928012c.description: Can’t be affected or detected by spells of 1st level or lower unless it wishes to be. Has advantage on saves vs. all other spells and magical effects.

e2cf60f5-0fb5-58d0-80fa-70bc0931c4e6.description: When a creature myrmidon can see attacks creature within 5 ft. of it myrmidon can impose disadvantage on attack roll. To do so myrmidon must be wielding a shield.

91000ff8-a3b9-55df-8263-b5cdc7839594.description: While it remains motionless it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

7ef757a1-0f2b-5518-9ace-7f913b91c271.description: Can't be affected or detected by spells of 2nd level or lower unless it wishes to be. Has advantage on saves vs. all other spells and magical effects.

attributes.description: Can't be affected or detected by spells of 2nd level or lower unless it wishes to be. Has advantage on saves vs. all other spells and magical effects.

8994d2ec-640e-5e58-85be-f36eb7949943.description: Transforms into Tiny object or back into true fiend form. Its stats except size are same in each form. Items worn/carried not transformed. Reverts on death.

683da47f-a48a-537b-ab7f-cd81f0cf6b32.name: Limited Magic Immunity (Rakshasa, Servitor)
683da47f-a48a-537b-ab7f-cd81f0cf6b32.description: Can’t be affected or detected by cantrips unless it wishes to be. Has advantage on saves vs. all other spells and magical effects.

22bed083-8df2-53a6-8215-3dbafe989e84.name: Protecting Pounce
22bed083-8df2-53a6-8215-3dbafe989e84.description: When a rakshasa the servitor can see within 15 ft. of it is the target of an attack the servitor can move up to half its speed toward that rakshasa with o provoking opportunity attacks. If it ends this movement within 5 ft. of the rakshasa the servitor becomes the target of the attack instead.

834f3a1e-1986-5887-814c-279699d65263.description: The slayer studies one creature it can see within 30' of it granting the slayer advantage on the next attack roll it makes vs. the target before start of the slayer's next turn. If the attack hits slayer's weapon attack deals extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage.

c045e10b-7fd2-52dc-baf3-b37bb0b64305.description: When a creature moves into a space within 5 ft. of slayer while slayer is in dim light or darkness slayer can teleport to unoccupied space it can see within 30' of it. Destination must also be in dim light or darkness.

25187f55-9a12-5ab0-aa2a-5864bc48786e.name: Good Dog
25187f55-9a12-5ab0-aa2a-5864bc48786e.description: If a Humanoid that hasn’t harmed hound in last 24 hrs and takes action to offer it bit of food or speak kind words to it hound must make DC 12 Wis save or be charmed by that Humanoid for 1 hr or until Humanoid or its companions do anything harmful to hound. Also hound has disadvantage on saves vs. command spell.

Also hound has disadvantage on saves vs. command spell.

c6953dfc-537b-5c1a-8748-e392ce3e2086.name: Multiply
c6953dfc-537b-5c1a-8748-e392ce3e2086.description: When it takes damage while below half its hp max it creates a spectral hound. Spectral hound uses the stats of a shadow except it doesn't have Sunlight Weakness trait and can't make new shadows when it kills Humanoids. It appears in an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of the relentless hound and acts on same initiative as that hound. After spectral hound finishes a long rest it becomes a relentless hound.

c0d3c81a-c201-5644-8697-b472a9cf19ba.description: Teleports one object it is holding that weighs up to 10 pounds into empty hand of one friendly creature it can see within 30' of it. If target isn't a rochade it must make DC 14 Dex save to catch the object otherwise object falls to the ground in a space within 5 ft. of target.

An unwilling creature must make DC 14 Dex save to avoid the switch. If the switch is successful switched creature becomes attack's target instead.

43603443-a386-52b0-9b9a-f109e3ae8a35.description: Considered to be a single Large creature to determine its carrying capacity and has advantage on Str checks made to push pull lift or break objects.

At the start of each hr sazakan can choose to change the precipitation and temperature within 1 mile of it by one stage up or down (no action required). This works like the changing weather conditions aspect of the control weather spell except sazakan can’t change wind conditions change immediately and sazakan can never make it warm hot or unbearable heat.

30f0dccf-5927-5cff-90fe-772e8879a06b.description: When creature that doesn’t have all of its hp starts its turn within 10 ft. of scarab creature takes 2 (1d4) necrotic. Also magical healing within 10 ft. of it is halved.

aec33105-048a-500b-af6e-287532590ad2.description: No sound emanates from it whether moving attacking or ripping into a corpse. Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks and each creature within 5 ft. of it is deafened.

If the target is knocked prone the scarsupial can make a bite attack as a bonus action.

db8624fa-47bf-5795-8ac0-aa585f257891.description: While in sunlight the jackal takes the Dash or Dodge action.

914437bf-e7d4-5300-85c1-fbdea24408ac.description: If it takes fire it erupts in a gout of flame. The weird immediately takes 5 (2d4) thunder and each creature within 10 ft. of the weird must make DC 15 Dex save or take 3 (1d6) thunder and 7 (2d6) fire.

5b37d0c5-b712-5dbf-b0ea-ed89f813d0fd.description: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon weapon deals+4d8 necrotic (included below).

232760c1-7208-5f3e-a0ea-65d60e2896cc.description: Transforms into a Large or smaller Beast or Humanoid or back into its true form which is a Fiend. Without wings it loses its flying speed. Its statistics other than size and speed are the same in each form. Items worn/carried transformed as desired by the shetani taking whatever color or shape it deems appropriate. Reverts on death.

Its statistics other than size and speed are the same in each form. Items worn/carried transformed as desired by the shetani taking whatever color or shape it deems appropriate. Reverts on death.

160303ba-12a6-5d1f-8c22-e367672d5e24.name: Broken Silence
160303ba-12a6-5d1f-8c22-e367672d5e24.description: Bell is infused with ancient and powerful magic ensuring all creatures know bell’s significance. Its Bell Toll action affects even creatures that are deafened or can’t otherwise hear the bell’s ringing.

attributes.description: Bell is infused with ancient and powerful magic ensuring all creatures know bell’s significance. Its Bell Toll action affects even creatures that are deafened or can’t otherwise hear the bell’s ringing.

9eaf80d6-023f-559f-9c31-c298bf920139.name: Spiny Defense (Sinstar)
9eaf80d6-023f-559f-9c31-c298bf920139.description: A creature that touches the sinstar or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 10 (3d6) piercing damage and if the target is a Humanoid it must make DC 19 Con save or contract the thrall sickness disease (see the Thrall Sickness trait).

attributes.description: A creature that touches the sinstar or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 10 (3d6) piercing damage and if the target is a Humanoid it must make DC 19 Con save or contract the thrall sickness disease (see the Thrall Sickness trait).

22d19620-4ed0-523a-a781-3a4b17a1027e.name: Thrall Sickness
22d19620-4ed0-523a-a781-3a4b17a1027e.description: A Humanoid infected with this disease manifests symptoms 1d4 days after infection which include excessive thirst increased desire for exposure to sunlight and the appearance of itchy bumps on the skin. This disease wears down the victim’s psyche while slowly transforming its body. Until the disease is cured at the end of each long rest the infected creature must make a DC 19 Con save. On a failure the creature’s Dex and Int scores are each reduced by 1d4. The reductions last until the infected creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. The infected creature dies if the disease reduces its Dex or Int score to 0. A Humanoid that dies from this disease transforms into a star thrall under the complete psychic control of the sinstar that infected it. This otherworldly disease can be removed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic.

44fc0c9d-13b8-5a55-b734-b804d0d0777d.name: Detonate Thrall
44fc0c9d-13b8-5a55-b734-b804d0d0777d.description: Orders one of its star thralls to explode. Each creature within 10 ft. of the thrall must make a DC 19 Dex save taking 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage and 7 (2d6) piercing damage on a failed save or half damage if made.

ed1dc49b-f990-5a76-ae2a-40f9124e53ac.name: Teleport (Sinstar)
ed1dc49b-f990-5a76-ae2a-40f9124e53ac.description: Magically teleports up to 120' to an unoccupied spot it sees.

attributes.description: Magically teleports up to 120' to an unoccupied spot it sees.

452daf42-0aa6-5788-9672-0ec22017d71c.name: Spiny Defense (Sinstar Thrall)
452daf42-0aa6-5788-9672-0ec22017d71c.description: A creature that touches the star thrall or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 3 (1d6) piercing damage and must make DC 13 Con save or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the star thrall or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 3 (1d6) piercing damage and must make DC 13 Con save or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn.

0088c257-de1b-53ae-9c2e-4b25e2e32823.name: Telepathic Bond
0088c257-de1b-53ae-9c2e-4b25e2e32823.description: While the star thrall is on the same plane of existence as the sinstar that created it the star thrall can magically convey what it senses to the sinstar and the two can communicate telepathically.

a770ca0e-0933-5995-a3ba-df7f59f4377a.name: Distraction
a770ca0e-0933-5995-a3ba-df7f59f4377a.description: Each creature with Int 5+ that starts its turn within 5 ft. of the slithy tove must make DC 13 Wis save or be incapacitated until start of its next turn as it hears imaginary murmurings and sees movement in its peripheral vision. On success creature has advantage on saves vs. the Distraction of all slighty toves for the next 24 hrs.

0d908126-cce6-5ab6-8433-1a55a9405af4.name: Hidden Step
0d908126-cce6-5ab6-8433-1a55a9405af4.description: Magically teleports along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying up to 30' to an unoccupied space it can see and takes the Hide action.

bcab46cf-70a4-5332-aaf3-c575486af64d.name: Regeneration (Snallygaster)
bcab46cf-70a4-5332-aaf3-c575486af64d.description: Regains 15 hp at start of its turn if it has 1+ hp.

762387a4-b480-5cdd-9cf8-2880f4212552.name: Nimble Flier
762387a4-b480-5cdd-9cf8-2880f4212552.description: Takes the Dash or Disengage action. It must be flying to use this bonus action.

8e3de3ba-f133-597f-bae7-51a30f49a89c.description: If it succeeds on save vs. spell of 5th level or lower that targets only snallygaster spell has no effect. If snallygaster succeeds on save by 5+ spell is reflected back at spellcaster using slot level spell save DC attack bonus and spellcasting ability of caster

f57cd2fd-b6d6-521e-a1ef-04d368644d05.name: Treasure Sense
f57cd2fd-b6d6-521e-a1ef-04d368644d05.description: Can pinpoint by scent the location of precious metals gemstones and jewelry within 60' of it and can sense the general direction of such objects within 1 mile of it.

89bd025b-d200-5def-9d2c-df65cc8b7013.name: Grassland Camouflage (Sodwose)
89bd025b-d200-5def-9d2c-df65cc8b7013.description: Advantage: Dex (Stealth) to hide in grassland.

attributes.description: Advantage: Dex (Stealth) to hide in grassland.

8a5adcf7-148b-5a99-8153-9485c3f2e5d4.name: Scarecrow
8a5adcf7-148b-5a99-8153-9485c3f2e5d4.description: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 ft. of sodwose: frightened until the end of its next turn (DC 15 Wis negates and is immune to sodwose’s Scarecrow for the next 24 hrs).

db421d46-0058-51ff-a37e-8cef708000af.name: Grass Step
db421d46-0058-51ff-a37e-8cef708000af.description: Teleports along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying up to 30' to an unoccupied spot it sees. The origin and destination spaces must contain grass.

8bb4e7f4-0338-5a36-9231-9f2940bd33ad.name: Set Snare
8bb4e7f4-0338-5a36-9231-9f2940bd33ad.description: Creates a snare in a square area it can see within 30' of it that is 5 ft. on a side and 50%+ grass. 1st creature to moves into that space within next min: DC 15 Str save or be restrained by grasses. A creature including restrained creature can use action to free restrained creature via DC 15 Str check. It can have at most 3 snares set at a time. If it sets a 4th oldest ceases to function.

c507e79b-abe9-5a24-80a1-ecff25a5deb7.name: Protective Frenzy
c507e79b-abe9-5a24-80a1-ecff25a5deb7.description: For 1 min after a splinter matron’s tree takes damage she has advantage on attack rolls vs. any creature that damaged her tree and when she hits such a creature with her Claw the Claw deals an extra 1d8 slashing.

f6ae44c6-24dc-58bb-98e7-63f7d3af76e0.name: False Appearance (Stained-Glass Moth)
f6ae44c6-24dc-58bb-98e7-63f7d3af76e0.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary stained-glass window or artwork.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary stained-glass window or artwork.

c2c552d0-0729-533b-8059-f39c0b4f2445.name: Mutagenic Venom
c2c552d0-0729-533b-8059-f39c0b4f2445.description: Produces potent poison that envenoms Humanoid victim and slowly transforms it into new diopsid. While envenomed treats all diopsid as if charmed by them. Every 24 hrs that elapse victim : DC 16 Con save reducing hp max by 5 (2d4) on failure. Reduction lasts until creature finishes long rest after venom removed. Creature dies if this reduces hp max to 0. Humanoid that dies from this horrifically transformed becoming new diopsid and losing all memory of its former life. Poison remains within creature’s body until removed by greater restoration or similar.

23eac346-5008-517e-9ea4-85a9a7cf08e5.description: Has 12 tendrils. If all are destroyed can't use Tendril Whip. Destroyed tendrils regrow when it finishes long rest.

f0977c16-2d2d-52d2-8d34-c2d70171d522.name: Reel

6ea632db-c279-58cb-be48-cbd54858d202.name: Wing Trap Snap
6ea632db-c279-58cb-be48-cbd54858d202.description: When 1+ creatures step onto a space on ground within 10 ft. directly above a hidden stargazer stargazer can burrow up to 10 ft. and snap its wing-like appendages shut emerging on the ground in space directly above where it was buried and that contains one or more other creatures. Each creature must make DC 16 Dex save or be trapped as if it failed save vs. Wing Trap.

46603371-8be8-5997-9d99-1960fb3a6e86.name: Aura of the Forgotten
46603371-8be8-5997-9d99-1960fb3a6e86.description: Beasts and Humanoids within 10 ft. of the starving specter have disadvantage on saves.

68a0dc84-80d4-5f5b-bf92-4df485859fea.name: Ethereal Sight (Starving Specter)
68a0dc84-80d4-5f5b-bf92-4df485859fea.description: Can see 60' into the Ethereal Plane.

attributes.description: Can see 60' into the Ethereal Plane.

d522c819-502f-5d74-9c5e-9c411c1e15aa.name: Life Hunger
d522c819-502f-5d74-9c5e-9c411c1e15aa.description: When a creature specter can see regains hp specter's next Bite deals extra 7 (2d6) necrotic on a hit.

a4854f82-1b2a-5434-a1f2-5e272116ade0.name: Unnerving Visage
a4854f82-1b2a-5434-a1f2-5e272116ade0.description: When a creature that can see specter’s faces starts its turn within 30' of it at least one of specter’s faces shifts to look like one of the creature’s departed loved ones or bitter enemies if specter isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. Creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic and is frightened of specter until start of its next turn (DC 14 Wis negates both). Unless surprised a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the save at start of its turn. If creature does so it can’t see the specter until the start of its next turn when it can avert again. If creature looks at specter in the meantime it must immediately save.

0a80a1d5-25ad-53e2-b474-d2629ebca426.name: Diurnal
0a80a1d5-25ad-53e2-b474-d2629ebca426.description: At night or when underground it has disadvantage on initiative rolls and Wis (Perception) checks.

b5b3e4ae-0ed5-5039-a725-b397774fdaf8.name: Speak with Plants
b5b3e4ae-0ed5-5039-a725-b397774fdaf8.description: Can communicate with plants as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: Can communicate with plants as if they shared a language.

f5549478-f8d4-5062-9876-e6428d2156cd.description: Sheds bright light in a 5 ft. to 20' radius and dim light for extra number of feet equal to chosen radius. It can alter radius as a bonus action. It can’t use this trait if it hasn’t been exposed to sunlight in past 24 hrs.

73bcdd0e-f69e-5434-bf48-9f075af67528.description: If it dies within its bound region shade returns to life in 1d4 days and regains all hp. This doesn’t function if shade is put to rest which occurs after its corpse has been reburied outside swamp.

6441c3d8-d319-5953-8698-cfea0ef3782f.name: Swamp Camouflage (Swampgas Shade)
6441c3d8-d319-5953-8698-cfea0ef3782f.description: Advantage: Dex (Stealth) to hide in swamp.

9f195b11-61f5-55c7-a3af-04999fc9116a.description: Is bound to a region of swamp within 1 mile of its body. If shade leaves region loses its Soul Drain action until it returns to the region. If it remains outside region automatically teleports back to its corpse after 24 hrs regardless of distance.

91fe025e-b68b-5e6b-962c-c0e308def1cb.description: Takes the Hide action. It must be in swampy terrain to use this bonus action.

8c468a65-ecb6-52f0-8e3c-ccf676728641.name: Blood Sense (Swarm, Biting Gnat)
8c468a65-ecb6-52f0-8e3c-ccf676728641.description: Can pinpoint by scent the location of warm-blooded creatures within 20' of it.

89682ac1-0cd1-5014-9bb3-0f66a3c98837.name: Distracting Buzz
89682ac1-0cd1-5014-9bb3-0f66a3c98837.description: A creature that is not deafened and starts its turn in a space occupied by a swarm of biting gnats must make DC 10 Wis save or become distracted by the droning of the gnats’ wings. A distracted creature has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks that use Int Wis or Cha for 1 min. A creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. If a creature’s save is successful the creature is immune to the swarm’s Distracting Buzz for the next 10 min.

4c1d59a6-766e-5804-a515-d680c833ec21.description: Hp max is reduced by 1 every min it is more than 60' from its book. When hp max reaches 0 dies. If its book is destroyed or moved to another plane of existence separate from swarm must make DC 11 Con save or be reduced to 10 hp. Swarm can bind itself to new book by spending a short rest in contact with the new book.

41d4b295-1ab1-5c13-b94a-777b03a2bd00.description: Can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny plant. Swarm can’t regain hp or gain temp hp.

cc17c7ec-26f0-5c09-bf96-a6f6afe98442.name: Scree Form
cc17c7ec-26f0-5c09-bf96-a6f6afe98442.description: Can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. Flow can move through a space as narrow as 3 inches wide with o squeezing. Flow’s space is difficult terrain. When a creature starts its turn in flow’s space it must make DC 13 Dex save or be knocked prone.

923525de-2820-59aa-bd7d-c6797fb02232.name: Poisonous Blood
923525de-2820-59aa-bd7d-c6797fb02232.description: Its blood is as toxic as its bite. When it takes piercing or slashing each creature within 5 ft. of it: DC 14 Con save or take 5 (2d4) poison. A creature that consumes flesh of tatzelwurm: DC 14 Con save or poisoned 8 hrs.

e8f705bb-98ea-5bb6-afc4-31fa5ee01690.description: If it moves 20'+ straight to creature and then hits it with Claw on same turn target knocked prone (DC 14 Str negates). If target prone wurm can make one Bite vs. it as a bonus action.

5201c63d-fb5b-5c97-a70a-94ccc7e92b32.description: Swings its tail in a wide arc around it. Each creature within 10 ft. knocked prone (DC 14 Str negates).

03487885-90f2-547a-afb5-5909d331668c.name: Amorphous (True Form Only)
03487885-90f2-547a-afb5-5909d331668c.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide with o squeezing.

3de26a13-331e-5e1a-8094-fe4c819c2298.description: Can mimic the sounds and voice of its assumed form. A creature that hears these sounds can tell they are imitations with successful DC 14 Wis (Insight) check.

79f1d81d-f106-5f31-af0c-7b119a9f0673.description: Regains 5 hp at the start of its turn. If it takes acid or fire this trait doesn’t function at the start of its next turn. Dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

13912f86-c7f1-523e-a811-adb6db26d442.name: Assume Form
13912f86-c7f1-523e-a811-adb6db26d442.description: Consumes corpse of Med or smaller Humanoid or Beast within 5 ft. and transforms into it. Stats other than size are the same in new form. Any items worn/carried meld into new form. Can't activate use wield or otherwise benefit from any of its equipment. It reverts to its true aberrant form if it dies makes a Manipulate Flesh attack or uses Assume Form while transformed.

f1288991-99e6-5dbd-ac63-c0b5389d533c.description: Its weapons are cold iron and are magical when used vs. fey. When it hits a fey with any weapon the weapon’s damage is force instead of its normal damage type.

6d95f05b-7d9a-58c6-88ce-f1b518537f82.name: Soft Wings
6d95f05b-7d9a-58c6-88ce-f1b518537f82.description: Can fly up to 40' on its turn but must start and end its move on solid surface (roof ground etc.). If it is flying at the end of its turn it falls to the ground and takes falling damage.

d83f7d1b-bff1-5d56-a14b-68c39a6a4f7e.description: When creature thripper can see within 30' of it casts spell can counter the spell. This works like counterspell spell with +6 spellcasting ability check except thripper can counter only enchantment or illusion spells and it must make the ability check regardless of spell's level.

e342072b-d5fb-5322-8a7f-0cab57bf8017.name: Final Fury
e342072b-d5fb-5322-8a7f-0cab57bf8017.description: When reduced to 0 hp its head and neck separate from body. Snake-like remnant immediately attacks nearest creature moving up to its speed if necessary even if it has already taken its turn this round. This remnant has same stats as original tigebra except it is Medium has 30 hp and can make only one Bite on its turn. Head remains active for 1d4 rounds or until killed.

9133201a-ae23-5ef0-a069-142f5329dc9f.name: Potent Poison
9133201a-ae23-5ef0-a069-142f5329dc9f.description: A creature that normally has resistance to poison doesn’t have resistance to the tigebra’s poison. If a creature normally has immunity to poison it has resistance to the tigebra’s poison instead.

fcde9d44-3c4a-5222-b9c8-72ed9e66bdce.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary torch.

d421794e-13d4-5fdd-91dd-208c2393bf82.name: Fiery Soul
d421794e-13d4-5fdd-91dd-208c2393bf82.description: Can ignite or extinguish fire that crowns its head as a bonus action. While ignited it sheds bright light in a 20' radius and dim light for an extra 20 feet. When mimic is subjected to effect that would extinguish its flames vs. its will (ex: submerged in area of create or destroy water or gust of wind spells) mimic must make DC 11 Con save or fall unconscious until it takes damage or someone uses action to wake it. If effect is nonmagical mimic has advantage on the save.

5144aef3-0010-5235-8719-b9837040f381.description: Regains 2 hp at start of its turn. If mimic takes cold this doesn’t function at start of its next turn. Dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

1d7ecbfb-e289-5aa2-9a98-1b1f5aa874a4.name: Bountiful Death
1d7ecbfb-e289-5aa2-9a98-1b1f5aa874a4.description: When the tripwire patch reduces a creature to 0 hp nearby plants erupt with growth. Plants within 20' of the body become thick overgrown difficult terrain and all plants within a 2-mile radius centered on the point where the creature was killed become enriched for 7 days for each CR of the slain creature (minimum of 7 days) cumulatively increasing in duration each time the patch kills a creature. Enriched plants yield twice the normal amount of food when harvested.

52e1bee0-62bb-50d3-8039-1b3ca4a3b109.description: When it regains hp from its Regeneration gains random teratoma. Teratoma and effects last until removed or replaced by another. Troll can have only 3 at a time. If it would gain a 4th oldest fades and is replaced. Teratomas (d6):1 New Senses: A bevy of new ears and noses give troll advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.2 Many Feet: The troll can’t be knocked prone.3 Adrenal Overdrive: Can’t be frightened or suffer exhaustion.4 Clinging Limbs: When this teratoma is removed with Fling Limb action it attaches to target. While attached to target target takes 3 (1d6) poison at start of each of its turns. A creature including target can use its action to detach teratoma.5 Echo Chambers: Has blindsight out to a range of 60'.6 New Pain Nerves: Disadvantage on any non-attack roll.

20bdfbad-316a-58c5-9594-12e9841e9ac7.description: Enters special rage that lets it channel elemental power for 1 min. While ragecasting: disadvantage on Wis saves and gains fly speed of 60'. It can end ragecasting as a bonus action. When ragecasting ends it descends 60'/round until it lands on a solid surface and can continue concentrating on spell it cast while ragecasting.

attributes.description: Its skin is embedded with vines and poisonous leaves that burn on contact. A non-Construct or Undead creature that touches the constrictor or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) poison.

74785219-83a4-544e-ba68-cda1e5fec14a.name: Urushi Blight
74785219-83a4-544e-ba68-cda1e5fec14a.description: A creature infected with this disease manifests symptoms within 1d4 hrs which includes gradual spread of painful itchy rash that develops into inflamed and blistered skin during 1st day. Until disease is cured infected creature: disadvantage on Con saves to maintain concentration on a spell and disadvantage on Dex and Cha saves and ability checks. At end of each long rest infected creature: DC 15 Con save. If it succeeds on two saves it recovers.

Until disease is cured infected creature: disadvantage on Con saves to maintain concentration on a spell and disadvantage on Dex and Cha saves and ability checks. At end of each long rest infected creature: DC 15 Con save. If it succeeds on two saves it recovers.

e1185659-6240-5e82-be29-f25379206b6f.name: Bloodthirsty (Vampiric Vanguard)
e1185659-6240-5e82-be29-f25379206b6f.description: When the vampiric vanguard is below half its hp max it has advantage on all melee attack rolls vs. creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead.

attributes.description: When the vampiric vanguard is below half its hp max it has advantage on all melee attack rolls vs. creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead.

6f7633b1-b8c7-56f0-a056-ac799e30b644.name: Vampire Weaknesses
6f7633b1-b8c7-56f0-a056-ac799e30b644.description: Has the following flaws: Forbiddance: Can't enter a residence with o an invitation from one of the occupants.Harmed by Running Water: Takes 20 acid when it ends its turn in running water.Stake to the Heart: Destroyed if a wood piercing weapon is driven into its heart while it is incapacitated in its resting place.Sunlight Hypersensitivity: Takes 20 radiant when it starts its turn in sunlight. If in sunlight disadvantage on attacks/ability checks.

191c3488-62bb-5738-a920-2c4841df8ece.name: Fortissimo Fibber
191c3488-62bb-5738-a920-2c4841df8ece.description: Can’t be magically silenced or forced to tell the truth by any means and it knows if it hears a lie.

attributes.description: Can’t be magically silenced or forced to tell the truth by any means and it knows if it hears a lie.

a263584b-ad57-5fc7-a5ff-4c3cde501869.name: Ventriloquist
a263584b-ad57-5fc7-a5ff-4c3cde501869.description: Can make its voice sound as though it originates from any point it can see within 60' of it.

attributes.description: Can make its voice sound as though it originates from any point it can see within 60' of it.

bf268d77-8e6c-5520-aa42-8bd5b510a84c.name: Liar Liar
bf268d77-8e6c-5520-aa42-8bd5b510a84c.description: When a creature lies while within 30' of the veritigibbet that creature: 3 (1d6) fire and it ignites (DC 14 Dex negates). Until creature uses action to douse the fire target takes 3 (1d6) fire at start of each of its turns.

f2028cec-9a19-52ae-93f6-0f1c555740ed.name: Mobile Grappler
f2028cec-9a19-52ae-93f6-0f1c555740ed.description: While grappling a creature the constructor can move at its full speed carrying the grappled creature along with it.

attributes.description: While grappling a creature the constructor can move at its full speed carrying the grappled creature along with it.

65848a53-6507-5099-bf46-e5dec9808e36.name: Tainted Aura
65848a53-6507-5099-bf46-e5dec9808e36.description: A Void constructor that has completed a Void henge gains necrotic energy while within 1 mile of the henge. At the start of each of the Void constructor’s turns each creature within 10 ft. of it must make DC 13 Cha save or take 2 (1d4) necrotic. The Void constructor can choose for a creature it is grappling to be immune to the Tainted Auras of all Void constructors.

At the start of each of the Void constructor’s turns each creature within 10 ft. of it must make DC 13 Cha save or take 2 (1d4) necrotic. The Void constructor can choose for a creature it is grappling to be immune to the Tainted Auras of all Void constructors.

6200b888-66b9-575c-b8ef-f2382ac2e453.name: Call of the Void
6200b888-66b9-575c-b8ef-f2382ac2e453.description: If creature within 5 ft. of knight attempts to move away from it that creature: DC 13 Str save or be unable to move away from knight. If creature uses magic to move (ex: misty step or freedom of movement) it automatically succeeds.

attributes.description: If creature within 5 ft. of knight attempts to move away from it that creature: DC 13 Str save or be unable to move away from knight. If creature uses magic to move (ex: misty step or freedom of movement) it automatically succeeds.

4a2e9cb8-99af-5ffe-9762-2a09356e1176.name: Immoveable
4a2e9cb8-99af-5ffe-9762-2a09356e1176.description: Can’t be moved vs. its will except by magical means. In addition knight has disadvantage on Dex (Acrobatics) and Dex (Stealth) checks.

attributes.description: Can’t be moved vs. its will except by magical means. In addition knight has disadvantage on Dex (Acrobatics) and Dex (Stealth) checks.

683c8f1e-b69b-5e05-84e8-5aa92fee998b.name: Implosive End
683c8f1e-b69b-5e05-84e8-5aa92fee998b.description: When Void knight dies it collapses in on itself releasing a wave of Void energy. Creature within 5 ft. of it: 18 (4d8) force (DC 16 Dex half).

attributes.description: When Void knight dies it collapses in on itself releasing a wave of Void energy. Creature within 5 ft. of it: 18 (4d8) force (DC 16 Dex half).

3b5fcc04-8b49-52d8-90a0-757cb5ef8451.name: Lava Bound
3b5fcc04-8b49-52d8-90a0-757cb5ef8451.description: Can exist outside of lava or magma for up to 4 hrs each day. If it starts its turn outside of lava and didn’t take fire since end of its previous turn its shell begins to cool and harden. While its shell is hardened has walking speed of 20' AC 18 and vulnerability to bludgeoning. If it starts its turn in lava or if it took fire damage since end of its previous turn its shell becomes molten again. If vorthropod remains outside of lava for more than 4 hrs its shell becomes petrified transforming into basalt and vorthropod within goes into hibernation. Its body returns to normal if it is submerged in lava or magma for 1 round. It can stay petrified in hibernation for up to 1d100+10 years after which it dies.

f30cc3b1-269e-51a6-8abd-86f2aca4e0fb.name: Lava Camouflage
f30cc3b1-269e-51a6-8abd-86f2aca4e0fb.description: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide in lava and volcanic terrain.

6502c70a-4d7e-5206-b406-43c8ef08fccf.name: Molten Shell
6502c70a-4d7e-5206-b406-43c8ef08fccf.description: If Its shell isn’t hardened creature that touches it or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) fire.

attributes.description: If Its shell isn’t hardened creature that touches it or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) fire.

a651394c-84be-55be-a205-fecd2611d957.name: Bloodthirsty Pounce
a651394c-84be-55be-a205-fecd2611d957.description: If the wakwak moves at least 20' straight toward a creature and then hits it with Talon attack on the same turn that target must make DC 13 Str save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone the wakwak can make one Beak attack vs. it as a bonus action gaining temp hp equal to half the damage dealt.

9a2a433d-e99d-5c3e-9fae-a771fb915a5f.name: Acidic Fog
9a2a433d-e99d-5c3e-9fae-a771fb915a5f.description: A creature that starts its turn in the wandering haze’s space takes 7 (2d6) acid.

cd550a57-821c-5dbb-a370-aac2271009c5.name: Cloud Form
cd550a57-821c-5dbb-a370-aac2271009c5.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide with o squeezing and can enter a hostile creature’s space and vice versa. The haze’s space is heavily obscured.

7e4b0c11-b81f-51f5-88a8-a9e2e2dd2823.name: False Appearance (Wandering Haze)
7e4b0c11-b81f-51f5-88a8-a9e2e2dd2823.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary cloud or fog bank.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary cloud or fog bank.

1ed0929e-995d-5b04-91e8-55ca2f48f572.name: Change Shape (Waterkledde)
1ed0929e-995d-5b04-91e8-55ca2f48f572.description: Magically transforms into a Small or Med Beast or back into its true fiendish form. Without wings it loses its flying speed. Its statistics other than its size and speed are the same in each form. No matter the form its eyes are always an unnatural green. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Reverts on death.

0bf158d6-265a-53c8-bb62-dcb3b71a2723.name: Blazing Maelstrom Form
0bf158d6-265a-53c8-bb62-dcb3b71a2723.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide with o squeezing. A creature that touches the sirocco or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 3 (1d6) fire. In addition sirocco can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature’s space on a turn creature takes 3 (1d6) fire and must make DC 15 Str save or be knocked prone.

12a0430b-7cf8-5833-9c83-14aa99544714.name: Water Susceptibility
12a0430b-7cf8-5833-9c83-14aa99544714.description: For every 5 ft. it moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it it takes 1 cold.

d3fb015c-3e30-5bda-940e-c5685346fdeb.name: Beast Passivism
d3fb015c-3e30-5bda-940e-c5685346fdeb.description: No beast with Int 3 or less can willingly attack the crone. They can be forced to do so through magical means.

8e28abc3-5425-508a-953c-59c59e0f87a8.name: Transmigratory Strike
8e28abc3-5425-508a-953c-59c59e0f87a8.description: When she kills a Humanoid can immediately restore it to life as a Beast with CR no higher the Humanoid's CR or level. Otherwise works as reincarnate spell.

650190c1-08b4-5151-b955-33fb87658d7f.name: Cursed Plant
650190c1-08b4-5151-b955-33fb87658d7f.description: If damage reduces it to 0 hp becomes inanimate tumbleweed and travels via wind. Regains 5 hp every hr regaining consciousness after the first. This doesn’t function if it took fire on same round it was reduced to 0 hp or if its body was destroyed.

6688658a-b36b-5b8d-b4ce-0e0057812296.name: Flammable (Wind Witch)
6688658a-b36b-5b8d-b4ce-0e0057812296.description: When it takes fire damage catches fire taking 3 (1d6) fire at start of each of its turns. Burns until it takes cold or is immersed in water. Creature that touches wind witch or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it while it is burning takes 3 (1d6) fire. While burning deals extra 3 (1d6) fire on each melee attack and deals 7 (2d6) fire to a captured creature at start of its turn.

ceea191c-0c61-58c3-ba64-66f35d4bc602.name: Tumbleweed Form
ceea191c-0c61-58c3-ba64-66f35d4bc602.description: Can enter hostile creature’s space and stop there.

attributes.description: Can enter hostile creature’s space and stop there.

a344be79-c7c1-584b-bc0f-064b82c080aa.name: Bouncy Escape
a344be79-c7c1-584b-bc0f-064b82c080aa.description: When it takes damage from a melee attack can move up to half its fly speed. This move doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. It releases a captured creature when it uses this.
