a3085ef6-6e45-591e-acc8-c9ddc3dba59a.name: False Appearance (Witchalder)
a3085ef6-6e45-591e-acc8-c9ddc3dba59a.description: While motionless indistinguishable from diseased or dying alder tree.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from diseased or dying alder tree.

5fdccee4-eb31-5781-821e-abee59663ac1.name: Speak with Plants (Witchalder)
5fdccee4-eb31-5781-821e-abee59663ac1.description: Communicate with Plants as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: Communicate with Plants as if they shared a language.

3ba31551-564c-5cb3-b53c-0a4ed301b5bd.name: Sunlight Regeneration
3ba31551-564c-5cb3-b53c-0a4ed301b5bd.description: While in sunlight the witchalder regains 5 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

attributes.description: While in sunlight the witchalder regains 5 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

b742a373-6607-5bb2-a9d2-c3e0756a52e1.name: Wrack Form
b742a373-6607-5bb2-a9d2-c3e0756a52e1.description: While animating a pile of wrack has AC 18 and can use Slam and Deluge actions. Also loses its immunity to grappled and restrained conditions and can’t fly. If it moves through a creature or object with Incorporeal Movement while animating wrack wrack falls off its ghostly body ending this. Otherwise can end this as bonus action. If it takes 15+ damage in single turn while animating wrack must make DC 13 Con save or be ejected from wrack ending this.

65859433-7a06-5875-aee6-51061685bdc3.name: Wrack Jump

6d7b30b4-2ad7-5b7e-8a55-6226cf07c5ce.name: Aura of Oathbreaking
6d7b30b4-2ad7-5b7e-8a55-6226cf07c5ce.description: Any creature that begins its turn within 30' of wraith: DC 13 Cha save or become cursed losing its resolve in important oaths it has taken. While cursed creature has disadvantage on Con saves to maintain concentration and can’t add its proficiency bonus to ability checks and saves in which it is proficient. On success creature is immune to wraith’s Aura of Oathbreaking for 24 hrs.

367a535e-8e4d-55aa-995b-ecbb89dcbdea.name: Oathseeker
367a535e-8e4d-55aa-995b-ecbb89dcbdea.description: Can pinpoint the location of any cleric paladin celestial or other divine connected creature within 60' of it.

attributes.description: Can pinpoint the location of any cleric paladin celestial or other divine connected creature within 60' of it.

e707b71f-765a-5bf9-a92d-60e7f056c596.name: Amorphous (Xecha)
e707b71f-765a-5bf9-a92d-60e7f056c596.description: Can move through a space as narrow as 1' wide with o squeezing. Any equipment worn/carried is left behind when it goes through a space too small for the equipment.

e6074f91-1395-5641-a5c8-28e798cc8ba5.name: Assume the Dead
e6074f91-1395-5641-a5c8-28e798cc8ba5.description: Enters corpse of a Small Medium or Large creature that has been dead less than 24 hrs impersonating it for 2d4 days before body decays. If xecha takes 15 damage or more on a single turn while inhabiting body it must make DC 15 Con save or be ejected from the body which falls apart and is destroyed. Its stats except size are same in each body.

cef7cbc2-a23f-5324-ad5b-2de82c426849.name: Transparent (Xecha)
cef7cbc2-a23f-5324-ad5b-2de82c426849.description: Even when in plain sight it takes a successful DC 16 Wis (Perception) check to spot a xecha that has neither moved nor attacked. A creature that tries to enter the xecha’s space while unaware of it is surprised by the xecha.

3a8a0e08-43f4-598b-ba1b-9ba9f547066b.name: False Appearance (Yali)
3a8a0e08-43f4-598b-ba1b-9ba9f547066b.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary statue.

attributes.description: While motionless indistinguishable from ordinary statue.

6d2fd070-b237-5cf9-9703-3bd1e3e90d30.name: Flinging Pounce
6d2fd070-b237-5cf9-9703-3bd1e3e90d30.description: If it moves 20'+straight toward a Large or smaller creature and then hits it with Tusk on same turn target thrown up to 15 ft. in a random direction and knocked prone (DC 12 Str negates throw and prone). If thrown target strikes a solid surface target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage per 10 ft. it was thrown. If target is thrown at another creature creature takes same damage and knocked prone (DC 12 Dex negates both).

5b238d30-e34d-58d3-b1b0-488ad50af519.description: Long jump is up to 40' and its high jump is up to 20' with or with o a running start.

eafef951-5316-594e-b9d2-fe10e112692e.name: Eidetic Memory
eafef951-5316-594e-b9d2-fe10e112692e.description: Remembers everything it hears or reads. It has advantage on Int (Arcana) and Int (History) checks.

attributes.description: Remembers everything it hears or reads. It has advantage on Int (Arcana) and Int (History) checks.

1f3ffaba-6dbd-557c-ab0d-004f2349a393.name: Two-Headed
1f3ffaba-6dbd-557c-ab0d-004f2349a393.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) checks and on saves vs. being blinded charmed deafened frightened stunned and knocked unconscious.

attributes.description: Advantage on Wis (Perception) checks and on saves vs. being blinded charmed deafened frightened stunned and knocked unconscious.

00b035be-e939-562d-a960-ae772a3c28a1.name: Smoldering Death
00b035be-e939-562d-a960-ae772a3c28a1.description: When it dies its body crumbles into smoldering coals releasing a great plume of smoke that fills 15 ft. radius sphere centered on zombie’s corpse and spreads around corners. Area is heavily obscured and difficult terrain. When creature enters area for first time on a turn or starts its turn there: 7 (2d6) poison (DC 14 Con half). Smoke lasts for 1 min or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hr) disperses it.

eaa0a0f5-3c40-507f-90e3-a69005d88638.name: Undead Fortitude
eaa0a0f5-3c40-507f-90e3-a69005d88638.description: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 hp it must make a Con save with DC of 5+the damage taken unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success the zombie drops to 1 hp instead.

657b3d79-4771-5627-a008-bcfa6071dca0.name: Erratic Movement
657b3d79-4771-5627-a008-bcfa6071dca0.description: Opportunity attacks vs. the voidclaw zombie are made with disadvantage.
